title: Senior Software Developer
description:
**Who We Are**


At MittLogik Group, we’re driven by a passion for solving complex challenges through technology. As a growing IT services provider, we specialize in delivering high-impact consulting and engineering expertise across the Automotive, Embedded Systems, and Telecom industries.


With a strong focus on quality and adaptability, we help our clients accelerate development, scale innovation, and stay ahead in fast-moving technical environments. Our ability to connect niche talent with critical projects has made us a trusted partner to both startups and industry leaders.


Recognized with the DI Gasell award in 2020, 2021, and 2023, we’re proud to be one of Sweden’s fastest-growing companies.


Headquartered in Lund, with teams across Stockholm, Gothenburg, Linköping, and Bangalore, we operate globally with a local mindset.


Explore more at mittlogik.se

**Summary:**


This position centers on developing reliable, high-quality embedded systems for complex vehicle environments. You will contribute to software that directly impacts functionality, safety, and overall performance in modern bus platforms.

**What you will do:**

* Develop and maintain embedded software for bus control units and related vehicle systems
* Implement new features in C++ within complex real-time environments
* Perform system integration, testing, and debugging on both software and hardware levels
* Ensure software quality in alignment with automotive standards and best practices
* Participate in design reviews and code reviews
* Collaborate closely with system engineers, test engineers, and cross-functional teams
* Contribute actively in an agile/Scrum-based development environment

**Your experience and skills:**

* Degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, or a related technical field
* Strong professional experience in C++ development (mandatory)
* Proven experience working with embedded systems in complex real-time environments
* Ability to work independently while contributing effectively within a collaborative team
* Professional working proficiency in English (Swedish is a plus)

**Desired skills and experience:**

* Knowledge of automotive communication protocols such as CAN, LIN, or similar
* Familiarity with functional safety standards
* Experience with continuous integration pipelines and embedded debugging tools
* Previous experience within a similar automotive development environment is considered an advantage

title: Frontend Developer with focus on UX/UI
description:
At Evolution AB / Nolimit City, we're building cutting-edge gaming products that redefine how players experience online entertainment. As we continue to grow, we're looking for a Frontend Developer with a strong UX/UI focus, or a UX/UI Designer with frontend development chops, to join one of our expanding engineering teams.
 



  





 You'll play a key role in shaping the look, feel, and interactivity of products that reach a global audience—contributing not only to how things work but also how they feel. At Evolution, design and development are not siloed; you'll be an essential part of product decisions from day one, working in highly collaborative, autonomous teams.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Design and build intuitive, responsive, and beautiful interfaces with React (Next.js) and TypeScript.
* Bring UX and UI designs to life—from wireframes to pixel-perfect implementation.
* Collaborate closely with product owners and engineers to craft seamless user experiences.
* Own the frontend from concept to production, including performance optimization, accessibility, and maintainability.
* Contribute to our design system and help shape a consistent visual language across products.
* Continuously experiment, iterate, and improve based on real user feedback and data.
* Be part of a team that values learning through iteration, experimentation, and shared responsibility.



  





**You Might Be a Great Fit If You** 



* Have solid experience with React, TypeScript, and modern CSS techniques.
* Possess a keen eye for design details, and care deeply about creating delightful user experiences.
* Enjoy bridging the gap between design and development.
* Are comfortable building advanced components.
* Believe in clean, maintainable code and smooth user flows.
* Have good communication skills in English and love working in a collaborative environment.



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience with Next.js, Redux Toolkit, or Headless CMSs like Strapi.
* Understanding of accessibility and web performance best practices.
* Familiarity with UI/UX testing tools or user research methods.
* An interest in gaming or digital entertainment interfaces.



  





**Technologies You'll Touch** 



* React / Next.js
* TypeScript / JavaScript
* Redux Toolkit
* CSS / Tailwind CSS
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Git (GitHub Actions)



  





**Who we are** 




 We care more about your potential than checking every box. If you're excited about building exceptional interfaces and love working in small, empowered teams, we want to hear from you.
 



  





 Join one of Sweden's fastest-growing tech companies and help us craft experiences that players around the world love.
 



  





 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
 



  





 Apply on LinkedIn, or send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
 



  





 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Software Engineer (Junior - Mid Level)
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Job Summary
   

  

 Software Engineers conduct, plan, or oversee one or more aspects of the analysis, design, programming, debugging, and modification of computer programs for commercial or end user applications. They write code, complete programming, and perform testing and debugging of applications. Responsibilities also include completing documentation and procedures for installation and maintenance. Software Engineers may interface with users to define system requirements and/or necessary modifications or develop cost estimates, budgets, and schedules.
   

  

 All roles require digital fluency, including the ability to work with emerging technologies such as Generative AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot) to support everyday work.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Write, modify, and review high-quality, testable, and efficient code across front-end, back-end, and data layers.
* Integrate systems via APIs, messaging queues, and databases.
* Develop and maintain data pipelines and large-scale data processing jobs using appropriate frameworks and cloud services.
* Develop unit, integration, and end-to-end tests with a strong focus on automation.
* Maintain CI pipelines to run tests automatically upon code commits.
* Debug and perform root cause analysis on issues, using AI-driven tools where applicable, and enforce code quality gates through reviews and static analysis.
* Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines; package and deploy applications to various environments using containerization and orchestration tools.
* Monitor applications in production using observability tools; investigate incidents, analyze logs, identify root causes, and implement fixes.
* Optimize code for performance, cost efficiency, and maintainability.
* Apply secure coding practices, manage secrets properly, validate inputs, and ensure authentication/authorization is robust.
* Comply with regulatory standards and maintain documentation for audits.


 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor's degree OR relevant work experience.
* Experience in developing and/or implementing web-based or mobile applications.
* Experience in writing, modifying, and reviewing code for commercial or end user applications.
* Experience in debugging and performing root cause analysis on software issues.
* Experience in developing unit, integration, and end-to-end tests.
* Experience in integrating systems via APIs, messaging queues, and databases.
* Experience in maintaining CI/CD pipelines and deploying applications.
* Experience in applying secure coding practices and complying with regulatory standards.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in developing and maintaining data pipelines and large-scale data processing jobs.
* Experience in using AI-powered coding tools to enhance productivity.
* Experience in optimizing code for performance, cost efficiency, and maintainability.
* Experience in collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: React Developer
description:
Join a high growth fintech company in Stockholm building scalable, user focused products used by a growing customer base. Technology sits at the core of the business, with a strong focus on performance, usability, and continuous improvement. You’ll be part of a senior engineering team shaping high quality frontend experiences with real impact.
 



  





 This is a hybrid role with
 **3 days per week** 
 in the Stockholm office, working closely with product, design, and backend teams in a fast paced, collaborative environment.
 



  





**Must haves:** 



* 7+ years of experience in software development
* Strong experience building frontend applications with React
* Solid understanding of JavaScript or TypeScript
* Experience working with APIs and integrating backend services
* Strong focus on clean, maintainable, and scalable frontend code
* Eye for detail with a strong focus on UX and performance
* Ability to work closely with product and design teams
* Fluent English communication skills



  





**Nice to haves:** 



* Experience within fintech, payments, or financial systems
* Familiarity with modern frontend tooling and frameworks
* Experience with state management solutions and component architecture
* Knowledge of CI/CD and modern DevOps practices
* Exposure to high scale, high traffic applications



  





**What you’ll be doing:** 



* Building and maintaining high quality frontend applications using React
* Developing responsive, performant, and user friendly interfaces
* Collaborating closely with designers and backend engineers
* Improving performance, scalability, and usability of existing products
* Contributing to frontend architecture and best practices

title: Solutions Developer
description:
Born autonomous. Born electric.
   

  

 Since 2016, our technology has connected global communities with the things they need – and all without the emissions. We’re made up of experts in multiple fields and that’s how we’ve developed a new way to move goods. This is technology purpose-built for the industry. This is safer, cleaner, and more reliable movement.
   

  

 We are Einride and this is how we build a better future.
   

  

 Want to be part of transforming road freight – for good? Einride is showing the world a new way to move, based on the latest digital, electric and autonomous technologies. Through freight capacity as a service, we enable businesses around the world to accelerate towards their sustainability goals.
   

  

 Founded in 2016, Einride became the first company in the world to deploy a cab-less autonomous electric vehicle on a public road (Sweden, 2019). In 2022, we were the first to successfully operate such a vehicle on a US public road. Today our award-winning technology has been launched across 8 countries (and counting). Our clients are some of the world’s biggest shippers, including Fortune 500 companies. We are also operating Sweden’s largest truck dedicated public charging network and counting.
   

  

 Your mission when joining the Autonomous Solutions Delivery team at Einride will be to drive autonomous freight sales for Einride by analyzing customers’ freight network data and transforming it into compelling, data-driven proposals.
   

  

 We’re seeking a Solutions Developer who excels at the intersection of a sales-driven mindset and strong analytical skills. This role will own and drive the solution and deployment work for one of the key regions for Einride. As a key player in the sales and deployment process, you’ll collaborate closely with cross-functional teams—product, sales, operations, safety, charging, electric mobility, and public affairs—to deliver seamless, impactful solutions and proposals.
   

  

**You Will**
* Analyze customer’s freight network data and turn raw data into insights for customers in autonomous and electric transportation roadmap.
* Generate sales proposals for the customer based on the analysis outcomes.
* Conduct research and technical/business analysis, developing presentations and reports that tell a compelling story.
* Lead and facilitate customer discussions with senior stakeholders in conjunction with the commercial representatives.
* Drive projects from conception to deployment while expertly managing internal and external stakeholders.
* Be the voice of the Autonomous Solutions Delivery team to the Product org to improve internal and external software products.
* Support on other sales, operations, product, or strategic projects.


**We Expect You To Have**
* A Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in a technical field such as Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics, Business, or equivalent experience.
* 5+ years of experience in analytical, customer-facing roles, preferably in transportation, logistics, management consulting, high-growth startups, or big tech firms.
* Expertise in Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, Google Slides, Google Data Studio, Python, or other data analytics tools.
* Acquainted with and eager to learn more in how to apply major AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT/Codex and Gemini in daily work.
* Strong sales mindset with the ability to translate complex data into clear, compelling narratives that drive client adoption.
* Experience in freight, logistics, autonomous vehicles, EVs, and/or supply chain.


 This is a full-time position based in Stockholm. You will be part of a truly diverse, high performing team with a common passion for sustainability and making things happen in an innovative way. We recommend that you submit your application as soon as possible since selection and interviews are held continually.
   

  

 At Einride, we are innovators, building solutions the world has never seen before – but urgently needs. That’s why we take action, and it’s why we are always eager to be challenged. We know that our best innovations come from having a diverse mix of people, including those of different experiences, career paths, and walks of life. By coming together and sharing our perspectives openly – by disagreeing, discussing, and committing – we deliver greater impact.
   

  

 Please note that as part of our standard recruitment process, we conduct a background control on the final candidate for this role. This may include verification of education, employment history, any relevant professional certifications or other information that may be of our interest.

title: .NET Backend Developer | SEB, Solna
description:
Join us in building SEB’s next‑generation payment platform on a modern and future‑proof tech stack.
   

  

 Since SEB was founded in 1856, our focus on customers and long-term relationships has been at the heart of our success. We aim to drive positive change by providing capital to help everyone reach their goals and accelerate progress towards a sustainable tomorrow. As a leading financial services group in northern Europe, we'll help you grow and empower you to take on more responsibility to create a real difference. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

 About the role:
   

  

 As a .NET Developer in Payments & Reporting, you will be part of a cross‑functional team working to build SEB’s new payment platform — one of our highest‑priority initiatives. You’ll work with a modern microservices landscape and a young codebase, using technologies such as .NET 10, Kafka, IBM MQ, Redis, and MS SQL. Our container and orchestration environment includes Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift. Together with colleagues in Stockholm and Vilnius, you’ll contribute to shaping scalable, secure, and resilient payment solutions for the future.
   

  

 “Working with the new payment platform means working with modern tech that truly impacts millions of customers every day.”
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* Strong experience building and operating backend services using .NET/C#, with a solid understanding of microservice architectures and distributed systems.
* Proven ability to design, optimize, and operate data‑intensive systems, including schema design, performance tuning, and production troubleshooting in MS SQL Server-based environments.
* Deep understanding of database performance and reliability, including indexing strategies, query optimisation, and handling production issues.
* Hands‑on experience designing and working with asynchronous messaging and event‑driven systems, using Kafka, IBM MQ, or similar technologies.
* Practical experience running services in containerised and orchestrated environments (Docker, Kubernetes/OpenShift), with awareness of scaling, resilience, and failure modes.
* Experience contributing to or owning CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation, with a focus on safe, repeatable releases.
* A collaborative engineering mindset, with a willingness to share knowledge, learn continuously, and improve how the team builds and runs software.
* Strong communication skills, with fluency in English; Swedish is a plus.


 What we offer:
   

  

* Impact at scale - Play a key role in building SEB’s next‑generation payment platform used by millions of customers across the Nordics.
* Modern technology landscape - Work hands-on with .NET 10, Kafka, IBM MQ, Redis, MS SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift in a young, fast‑evolving codebase.
* Clear product vision & roadmap - Be part of a long-term strategic initiative with strong business backing and a shared roadmap across multiple teams.
* Combine focused remote work with meaningful in‑office collaboration — 3 days per week on site.
* Great benefits - Competitive compensation, pension, insurance, wellness allowance, and employee banking benefits.
* International collaboration - Work closely with colleagues in both Stockholm and Vilnius in a diverse, cross‑functional setup.


 Ready to Join?
   

  

 Itis our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-06-01. If you have questions about the position, please contact Kristina Meller at kristina.meller@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Software Developer
description:
Vi söker efter ännu en ny fullstackutvecklare! Objective Solutions har i över 20 år skapat lösningar åt flygindustrin och vi ser fram emot att växa under 2026. Objective hjälper dagligen tusentals resenärer världen över att ha en så smidig flygupplevelse som möjligt - och vi behöver din hjälp.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




  





 Som utvecklare på Objective kommer du få möjligheten att tillsammans med vårt team och våra kunder skapa, underhålla och utveckla våra innovativa produkter. Läs gärna mer om vad vi gör på www.objective.se . Då vi är ett mindre team med många produkter kommer du få chansen till stort inflytande samt ägandeskap med det du arbetar med. Du kommer få ha direktkontakt med våra trevliga och fantastiska kunder så som SAS, Norwegian, Swedavia m.m.
 



 Vi har en varierad tech stack - du behöver inte vara bäst på allt men gärna villig att lära dig!
 



  





 Frontend:
 


* React
* Next.js
* Cordova



  





 Backend:
 


* Java
* Java Spring
* SQL
* Ruby on Rails
* NodeJS



  





 Nice to haves:
 


* Google Cloud, maven, k8s, Docker, git
* Bekväm med Linuxmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av att skapa och arbeta med REST/SOAP API:er
* Nyfiken på flygindustrin



  





**Vem vi söker** 




  





 Precis som oss så älskar du kreativa lösningar med en varierad tech stack som är kul att arbeta med. Vi tror att du är avslappnad, social och vill kontinuerligt lära dig och växa i din roll tillsammans med teamet. Samarbete och att bolla lösningar och koncept med dina kollegor är något som uppskattas och uppmuntras så vi kan bygga grymma produkter. Om du har ett förslag på tillägg till vår tech stack som du tror vore en bra lösning framöver så är vi alltid öppna för förslag. Du kommer få ha direktkontakt med våra fantastiska och trevliga kunder.
 



  





**Förmåner** 




  





 Kontoret ligger i fräscha lokaler högst upp på Vasagatan 46, centralt med utsikt över Kungsgatan och ett stenkast ifrån T-Centralen. Frukost på kontoret, AW’s på fredagar, frekventa teamaktiviteter, årliga resor med bolaget och inte minst en superhärlig atmosfär med kanske världens bästa team. Du har även 5000 kr / år i friskvårdsbidrag.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




  





 Skulle du passa in i teamet och rollen, tveka då inte att ansöka. Ansökan skickar du smidigast in här på LinkedIn. Har du frågor kring tjänsten är du välkommen att höra av dig till mig: Jacob Möller | jacob.m@objective.se
 



  





 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Senior Fullstack Developer
description:
**Join Corafone as a Senior Fullstack Developer**
 The accounts receivable market is massive, complex, and overdue for a revolution. Corafone is automating and transforming it end-to-end, with AI voice agents already live with customers across the US. The traction is real. The timing is perfect. And we are well positioned to take the market.
   

  

**Why join Corafone**
* The founding team has done this before. Experienced founders who have scaled startups from zero to one to 100, and are doing it again.
* Backed by investors who wrote the first check for Deepgram and the founders of Moltbook. People with a track record of backing the right teams at exactly the right moment, supporting Corafone in the journey.
* The rocket is already off the ground. This is your chance to get on board before we land on the moon.
* Work directly with F500 companies, in a culture combining Silicon Valley speed, with a Scandinavian touch


**What You'll Do**
* Design and ship world-class AI voice agents that handle real calls, real payments, and real compliance end to end
* Solutions engineering: Work directly with customers in a hands-on, relationship-driven industry
* Product engineering: Shape the technical foundation of a product that's already in production and scaling fast
* Sit at the table with the founding team and help decide where this goes next


**Who You Are**
* You have a passion for startups and building
* 5+ years of full stack experience with strong system design and architecture instincts
* Comfortable building from scratch and making decisions without a playbook
* Willing to work closer to US hours
* Proven experience with AI agents or LLMs in production


**Bonus If**
* You’ve led a team
* You’re an ex-founder or were an early hire at a startup


**What We Offer**
* Real equity at pre-Series A prices, with competitive pay
* Work at a SF type company, in the Nordics
* A founding team that moves fast, a market ready to be taken, and work that actually matters

title: Java developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Senior engineer with 6–9+ years’ hands-on software engineering experience.
* Java 17+, Spring Boot, and Spring Framework.
* Strong microservices and cloud-native architecture experience.
* Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD/continuous deployment.
* SQL/NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL or Cosmos DB.
* Testing strategy, TDD, integration testing, and performance testing.


**Application deadline:** 
 31-05-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Backend Developer
description:
På Tele2 arbetar vi målmedvetet varje dag för att fortsätta vara ledande inom hållbarhet, vilket har lett till att vi blivit utnämnda klimatledare i Europa av Financial Times. Tele2 är också Sveriges mest hållbara företag och rankades 37:a globalt av Time Magazine och Statista på deras första lista över världens mest hållbara företag med 500 företag från över 30 länder. Vi fortsätter att uppnå nya mål och vi hjälper våra kunder att uppnå sina hållbarhetsmål eftersom vi åtagit oss att övergå till en cirkulär ekonomi.
   

  

 Our Values; Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficient.
   

  

*Are you a seasoned Java Developer passionate about building robust, scalable solutions that directly impact business success? We're looking for an engaged Senior Java Developer to take a key role, contributing to and shaping our critical core systems for Sales.*
**What You'll Do:**
 You'll design, develop, and maintain backend solutions that power our sales processes and streamline order fulfillment. This involves leading strategic projects, ensuring stability, and optimizing performance across the entire software development lifecycle. Your work will have a direct and measurable impact on our business.
   

  

**Who You Are:**
 You're an experienced Java Developer with several years of relevant experience building robust, scalable systems. You possess a proven ability to take significant ownership of technical solutions and are passionate about delivering high-quality code.
   

  

 We foster a culture of continuous improvement and agile methodologies. Therefore, we expect you to:
   

  

* Drive technical initiatives and design with a strong focus on quality and performance.
* Thrive in an agile environment where the team shares responsibility.
* Be driven by curiosity, staying updated with the latest Java ecosystem trends.
* Proactively monitor and improve service performance.


**Your Technical Expertise Likely Includes:**
 To succeed and thrive in this role, you have solid experience with:
   

  

* Backend & Language: Java (ideally Java 21), Spring Boot
* APIs & Messaging: REST APIs, Apache Kafka
* Build Tools: Maven
* Containerization & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes
* Database: MongoDB


 Meriting If you also have experience with some of the following:
   

  

* ReactJS, NodeJS, Typescript, or other relevant frontend technologies.


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Staff Frontend Engineer - Observability Drilldown | EMEA | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**This is a remote opportunity and we would be interested in applicants based in Spain, Sweden, Germany, the UK or Ireland at this time.**
**The Opportunity**
**The Drilldown team** 
 builds intuitive, guided workflows that make complex telemetry easy to explore and understand. We let users navigate seamlessly through their signals, facilitating their ability to gain insights and identify issues. Our mission is to design and maintain intuitive, opinionated, queryless user experiences that empower users to quickly answer telemetry questions through simple point-and-click interactions.
   

  

**What We Do**
* Guided Exploration: We build simple, intuitive UIs that help users troubleshoot and answer questions without writing queries.
* Cross-Data Insights: We seek opportunities to integrate the Drilldown plugins with other parts of the Grafana ecosystem, in order to provide a seamless experience to users.
* Community Driven: We listen to users and contributors, and turn feedback into real improvements.
* Operational Excellence: We write robust, extensible code and own qualification and delivery of our plugin. We monitor usage and performance and always look for ways to improve our functionality and increase the efficiency of our workflows.


**How We Work**
* No blame: We cultivate a growth mindset, with a focus on learning and improving ourselves and our product.
* Better done than perfect: We iterate quickly and deliver value continuously.
* Experimentation: We develop ideas for new offerings and try them out, then monitor their usage and user feedback on them.
* Performance is non-negotiable: Drilldown must always feel responsive and interactive.
* Mentorship & Innovation: we grow together through knowledge sharing, mentorship, internal hackathons, and constant learning.


**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Improve and enhance queryless exploration workflows.
* Collaborate with your team and with others at Grafana to deliver new features, analyze outcomes, and make improvements.
* Lead projects from concept to implementation, incorporating ongoing customer support.
* Take an active role in influencing our roadmap and your own career objectives.
* Participate in shared on-call rotations and take responsibility for the services you oversee.
* Support and mentor team members, engage in design conversations, and work closely with colleagues.
* Expand your skill set by deepening your knowledge of our cloud products, understanding our customers, and learning about our codebase.


 We invest heavily in developer productivity. You can use modern AI coding assistants as part of your daily workflow (your choice of tools, within security guidelines), backed by a company-funded usage budget so you can iterate quickly without unnecessary friction.
   

  

 We encourage pragmatic AI-assisted development: faster prototyping, test generation, refactors, documentation, and incident follow-ups—always paired with strong code review and quality standards.
   

  

 You’ll also have access to frontier models (e.g., GPT-Codex 5/3, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3 Pro).
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* You are a motivated self-starter with a bias toward action.
* You embrace a user-centric design sensibility.
* You can take complex challenges and break them down to achieve short feedback loops: to analyze, design, and build modular solutions, deliver MVPs, gather data and feedback and then progress iteratively.
* You invest in your colleagues and generously share your experience and knowledge, while also learning from your peers and growing your own skillset.
* You know how to communicate and collaborate effectively in a remote first environments
* Deep experience building integrated, frontend applications with React and TypeScript, following modern patterns and best practices.
* Proven ability to take ideas from concept to reality — from brainstorming and design discussions to prototypes, polished UIs, and production-ready features.
* Strong sense of product design and usability, with the ability to contribute creatively to user workflows and visual polish.
* Expertise in best-in-class coding practices, including automation-based testing strategies, maintainable architectures, accessibility, and performance optimization.
* Excellent communication skills in a remote-first, collaborative environment, with a track record of working effectively across teams.
* Bonus: Experience with Open Telemetry.


 In Sweden, the compensation range for this role is SEK 878,578 - SEK 1,054,294. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Fullstack Engineer - Lovable Apps Platform Team
description:
**About Lovable & Lovable Apps Platform**
 Lovable is an AI-powered software creation platform. Millions of users use Lovable to go from idea to working application, generating hundreds of thousands of apps every day.
   

  

 The Lovable Apps Platform is what makes those generated apps actually run in production. The moment a user hits deploy, the Apps Platform takes over — provisioning the database, handling user auth, storing files, serving the app over a custom domain, capturing logs, and metering usage. It's the full backend and hosting layer for every app built on Lovable, designed so creators never have to think about infrastructure to ship something real.
   

  

 The Lovable Apps Platform is what makes those generated apps actually run in production. The moment a user hits deploy, the Apps Platform takes over — provisioning the database, handling user auth, storing files, serving the app over a custom domain, capturing logs, and metering usage. It's the full backend and hosting layer for every app built on Lovable, designed so creators never have to think about infrastructure to ship something real.
   

  

 The Apps Platform is growing fast, and we're investing heavily in each layer of the stack — building deeper ownership over the services that power our users' apps so we can move faster, scale better, and shape the product experience us and our users actually want.
   

  

**The Role**
 We're looking for product-minded fullstack engineers who can own end-to-end slices of our Lovable Apps Platform. You'll build the interfaces, APIs, and integrations that let Lovable users manage their cloud resources — from admin panels and analytics dashboards to vendor abstraction layers and the AI gateway. This is the highest-surface-area layer of the stack: identity, logging, metering, workflow engine, buckets, database connection strings, secrets, custom domains, and connectors.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Create UX for our users to build with Apps Platform features
* Build and own platform services like identity, logging, metering, workflow engine, object storage, secrets
* Create abstraction layers for deep integrations with key partners and vendors


**What We're Looking For**
* Strong fullstack background: deep comfort with TypeScript/React on the frontend and Node.js or similar on the backend
* Experience building and operating SaaS platform features — auth flows, metering/billing pipelines, API gateways, or developer tooling
* Product instinct: you think in user outcomes, not just API endpoints
* Comfort working with third-party services and building clean abstractions over vendor APIs Familiarity with managed cloud services (AWS, GCP) and the tradeoffs of buy-vs-build
* Experience with observability, logging, or metering systems is a strong plus
* You've shipped features in fast-moving, high-ownership environments where you wore multiple hats
* Experience with DNS, TLS/SSL automation, and custom domain provisioning at scale


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with BaaS or PaaS platforms (Supabase, Firebase, Vercel, Render, etc.)
* Familiarity with TanStack Router/Query or similar modern frontend stacks
* Background in developer experience or developer tools
* Interest in AI-assisted development and how cloud infrastructure enables it


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love. Lovable software engineers are capable of working across the whole stack. Examples of tech in our stack include:
   

  

* Frontend: React and Typescript.
* Backend: Golang and Rust.
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Modal.
* Data: Clickhouse, Firestore, Spanner, BigQuery.
* DevOps & Tooling: CI/CD pipelines, OTEL, Kubernetes, Terraform.


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Android Developer
description:
Join us at Kivra! We are looking for people with passion for software development, love solving problems, and thrive in agile development environments. We have grown tremendously and are looking for an Android developer that, together with a team of motivated developers, will make the app more valuable for all Kivra users.
   

  

 At Kivra, we are building services that connect over 6 million people by providing a safe and accessible digital infrastructure that everyone in Sweden can trust and use. At the same time, we are saving trees - reducing the paper that is printed and transported - by providing a better digital alternative to physical paper communication.
   

  

**Are you our next Android Developer?**
 We are looking for a skilled Android developer with a strong sense of both usability and design to help build our native Android app. You will be part of a cross-functional product team of developers, designers, and a product owner, while working closely with our 6 Android developers to continuously improve the app. With around 2.1 million users engaging with our app daily, your work will have real and immediate impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will work closely with all parts of our mobile application lifecycle. This includes designing, implementing, testing and deploying our Android application with focus on performance and scalability. Together with the team you will be focusing on improving existing services and features, as well as creating new ones.
   

  

 You will be part of one of our product teams and report to the Engineering Manager. Fluency in English is required and fluency in Swedish is a plus but not required. We are unfortunately not able to sponsor new work permits, but are able to sponsor/renew existing work permits.
   

  

 If you want to be part of an innovative team, this is it!
   

  

**We Think That You**
* Are skilled in Android, Kotlin, Kotlin for Gradle, Multiple module projects, Dagger/Hilt and Espresso.
* Are interested in building Android applications with Compose. Our app is in Compose and using primarily Compose navigation.
* Are experienced in software development and agile methodology.
* Enjoy working within all aspects of agile development focusing on writing, reading and talking about the code.


 Just like us, you are passionate about your craft and take ownership over your own development!
   

  

**We offer**
 Kivra offers a place in a committed team with the opportunity for a high degree of innovation. You will be involved in influencing Kivra's exciting business and product development of a service that is currently used by more than half of Sweden's population. We offer the flexibility that life sometimes requires, but we believe that collaboration and value creation happens best when we sit and work together from our office in central Stockholm.
   

  

 We offer competitive remuneration and great benefits. Read more about our core values and benefits here: https://jobs.kivra.dev/!
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Easy peasy, just send in your CV and cover letter as soon as possible. If you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact Sarah Ohlsson, Talent Acquisition Lead at sarah.ohlsson@kivra.com.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Senior mjukvaruingenjör till DeLaval**
 Vill du arbeta i ett globalt företag där du kan bidra till en mer hållbar livsmedelsproduktion? DeLaval är en ledande utvecklare, tillverkare och leverantör av lösningar för mjölkproducenter världen över. Som ett företag byggt på innovation arbetar vi ständigt för att hitta nya sätt att hjälpa våra kunder att göra mer med mindre.
   

  

 Nu söker ett av våra utvecklingsteam en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare som vill vara med och driva den fortsatta utvecklingen av våra embedded-lösningar.
   

  

**Roll och ansvarsområden**
 I vårt team arbetar vi med produktutveckling från idé till färdig lösning, samtidigt som vi kontinuerligt vidareutvecklar och förbättrar befintliga system och komponenter. Vi utvecklar huvudsakligen embedded‑programvara i Java, där kraven specificeras i Polarion och även utgör grunden för våra automatiserade testfall.
   

  

 Vi följer en agil arbetsmetodik med 10‑veckors increment och 2‑veckors sprintar för att säkerställa regelbundna leveranser och ett tydligt tempo i utvecklingsarbetet. Samarbete är en central del av vår vardag, och vi arbetar tätt med både kravteam och integrationstest för att skapa robusta och välfungerande lösningar.
   

  

 För att kvalitetssäkra våra produkter har vi tillgång till egna testmiljöer, och vid behov utför vi också tester på riktiga robotsystem ute på gårdar. Detta säkerställer att våra lösningar fungerar i verkliga miljöer och uppfyller kundernas behov på bästa sätt.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 För att lyckas i denna roll tror vi att du har:
   

  

* Du är en lagspelare som är stolt över ditt arbete och strävar efter hög kvalitet.
* Du har tillräcklig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling för att kunna ta ett arkitektur ansvar.
* Du har en masterexamen inom datavetenskap eller motsvarande utbildning.
* Du trivs med att lösa komplexa problem och gillar nya utmaningar.
* Du behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Du har erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt.


**Det Är Också Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Kunskap i Python, C eller C++ (används i äldre system).
* Erfarenhet av att skriva automatiserade testfall.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som Jira, Confluence, Polarion, NetBeans och Git.
* Kunskap inom code quality assurance-verktyg.


**Att arbeta på DeLaval**
 Våra kärnvärden Passion, People, Professionals och Partnerships förenar medarbetare över olika enheter och geografier. Framgång handlar om mer än kunskap – det är starkt kopplat till beteende. På DeLaval guidas vi alla av våra tre beteenden: Set Direction, Make Things Happen och One DeLaval .
   

  

 Vi Erbjuder Dig En Arbetsplats Som Saknar Motstycke, Där Toppmodern Teknologi Går Hand i Hand Med Djurvälfärd. DeLaval Är En Del Av Tetra Laval-koncernen Tillsammans Med Tetra Pak Och Sidel. Dessutom Erbjuder Vi
   

  

* Trygg anställning och förmåner enligt kollektivavtal (tjänstepension, arbetsskadeförsäkring).
* Föräldralön (ca 10 procent av medarbetarens månadslön).
* Friskvårdsbidrag på 4 000 kr/år.
* Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring.
* Flexibla arbetstider och arbetstidsförkortning.


**Övrig information**
 Detta är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering på DeLavals huvudkontor i Tumba, söder om Stockholm. Vi erbjuder en hybrid arbetsplatsmodell som möjliggör flexibilitet att arbeta på distans.
   

  

 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via e‑post, men om du har frågor om rollen eller rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta oss.
   

  

**Kontakt**
**Rekryterande chef:** 
 Kattis Karttunen, kattis.karttunen@delaval.com
   

  

**Rekryterare:** 
 Agnes Edbom, agnes.edbom@delaval.com
   

  

**Om DeLaval**
 Vår vision är att möjliggöra hållbar livsmedelsproduktion. Som ett företag byggt på innovation arbetar vi ständigt för att hitta nya sätt att hjälpa våra kunder – mjölkproducenter – att göra mer med mindre genom att tillhandahålla världsledande mjölkningsutrustning och lösningar.
   

  

 Idag har DeLaval cirka 4 500 engagerade medarbetare verksamma i mer än 100 marknader världen över. DeLaval är en del av Tetra Laval-koncernen.
   

  

 Läs mer på
 **corporate.delaval.com**

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**About Froda**
 Founded in 2015, Froda’s mission is to democratize access to financing, giving small businesses the same growth opportunities as large ones. Through digital innovation, we’ve transformed the loan process from months to minutes, offering fair, fast, and accessible financing. Now, through embedded lending, we’re integrating our technology with global banks and fintechs, building the next generation of lending infrastructure. Join us in creating opportunities for small businesses to invest in their ideas to the best possible terms.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Froda continues to scale, we’re looking for a Platform Engineer to join our Platform team — the team at the heart of our technology. The team’s mission is to build and maintain the internal platform that enables and supports our developers to deliver reliable, scalable, and secure fintech solutions efficiently.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll work closely with engineers across Froda to understand their needs and ensure they have the tools, environments, and automation required to succeed. You’ll be part of a small, high-impact team that values helping others, simplifying complexity, and improving developer experience through collaboration and support.
   

  

 Your work will directly impact how quickly and safely our product teams can innovate, making you a key enabler of Froda’s growth.
   

  

****Our Platform & Tech Stack****
 The Platform team builds and evolves a scalable internal platform that enables product teams to focus on delivering customer value. We do this by providing self-service capabilities and continuously improving the developer experience.
   

  

 At Froda, the entire platform is standardized on Kubernetes — from core infrastructure to all product team applications — giving us a consistent, scalable foundation and a shared way of working across engineering.
   

  

 Technologies you’ll work with include:
   

  

* Kubernetes for all workloads
* GitOps with ArgoCD
* Azure
* Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Terragrunt
* Observability with Prometheus and Grafana


****Who You Are****
 You’re a technically skilled engineer who takes pride in building robust, scalable systems that others can depend on. You see infrastructure as a shared foundation, one that requires both strong technical execution and close collaboration. You thrive in a team environment, value clear communication, and enjoy enabling others to move faster and more confidently.
   

  

 We’re looking for someone who:
   

  

* Thrives in a collaborative environment where support and communication are key.
* Enjoys solving infrastructure challenges and enabling others to succeed.
* Is proactive, approachable, and has a strong sense of ownership.
* Balances technical depth with a genuine interest in teamwork and shared success.


**Key Qualifications**
**Experience:**
 2–5 years in a Platform Engineering, DevOps, or Infrastructure role.
   

  

**Skills & Tools:**
* Infrastructure as Code: Experience with Terraform or similar IaC tools.
* Cloud Platforms: Hands-on experience with Azure, GCP or AWS.
* CI/CD: Ability to design, implement, and improve pipelines that serve multiple teams.
* Containers & Orchestration: Strong understanding of Docker and Kubernetes in production.
* Monitoring & Observability: Experience with tools that support proactive issue detection and team visibility.
* Security: Awareness of cloud security best practices and shared responsibility models.


****What’s in it for You****
 At Froda, you’ll be part of a company that combines the best of both worlds, a fast-moving, high-energy culture with the stability and structure to support long-term success. We’re 100+ ambitious self-starters who genuinely care for each other and the work we do, all while having fun together.
   

  

 Here, you’ll have the opportunity to take ownership of your work, develop your skills, and shape your own growth journey. With big ambitions and a rapidly evolving business, there’s plenty of room to grow, lead initiatives, and make a real impact on both our company and the industry. If you're looking to be part of a success story and contribute to something bigger, this is the place for you.
   

  

 Furthermore, you’ll get:
   

  

* An opportunity to be part of an exciting journey, shaping the future of our company and transforming the SME financing landscape
* Fabulous office overlooking Stockholm and a friendly culture that values work/life balance
* We prioritize working in the office to maximize the positive impact of in-person collaboration, but we offer flexibility with work hours and remote work
* Competitive compensation package
* Insurance and pension plan


 This role is all about building the tech that powers funding for thousands of entrepreneurs, if you're excited by our mission, apply or tell a friend!

title: iOS Developer
description:
**About the role** 




 We are looking for an iOS Developer to join our team in Stockholm. You will be working directly with our customers in dynamic and engaging projects. It is a great opportunity for a long term cooperation.
 



  





**About Codepole** 




 Codepole is a fast-growing consulting company & venture enabler. We are experts in finance, product development, and app development working with large companies (Spotify, HBO Max, Swedbank, Tele2) as well as scale ups and start ups. In addition to our consulting services, we build and launch our own ventures together with our team members.
 



  





**What we offer** 



* Challenging and interesting assignments, internally and at our client’s across the world
* An environment that allows, encourages, and supports you in your professional development
* Competitive salary
* A lot of office fun 😊



  





**Requirements** 



* 5+ years of experience.
* Proficiency in Swift.
* Good knowledge of Xcode IDE, as well as UIKit or SwiftUI.
* Familiarity with common iOS frameworks.
* Knowledge of Kotlin is beneficial.
* Computer Science degree preferred.
* Swedish fluency is a plus



  





**How we work** 




 We believe that it is key for our team members to grow their skill set, and that this is done by experiencing challenging technical projects and by learning from each other. The work is varied between time based projects for clients, team augmentation for clients, and our own ventures and products. This allows our team members to continuously develop as they get to experience different software, problems, and solutions. Our team members share their knowledge with each other on a daily basis, so we ensure that we learn as much as possible.

title: Junior Business Developer, Cybersecurity – Sectra Communications
description:
**Graduating this summer and looking for a role that combines business development with cutting-edge technology? Want to work closely with decision-makers, defense organizations, and authorities—while helping protect some of Sweden’s most sensitive information? This is your opportunity to join a market leader in secure communications, where technology meets real-world impact.**
 At Sectra Communications, we understand and deliver on our customers need for trustworthy and state-of-the-art secure communication systems for their daily operations, as well as for unexpected crisis situations. For nearly 50 years, we have been a leading provider of secure communication solutions for defense organizations, civil authorities and corporations.
   

  

 Working with business development at Sectra Communications means operating at the intersection of technology, strategy, and trust. It also means meeting customers in their own environments, which can range from an afternoon in a secure bunker or meeting room to a day on a military vessel. This is not traditional sales - we build long-term relationships with highly specialized customers who place extreme demands on security and performance.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Business Developer, you will join our sales team and work with sales of cryptographic products and services to Swedish authorities. You will operate with a high degree of ownership and freedom in how you drive your work – focusing on high-impact solutions that truly make a difference for national and societal security.
   

  

 You will:
   

  

* Act as an ambassador for Sectra’s products and represent us in high-level customer dialogues
* Identify, develop, and drive business opportunities with both new and existing customers
* Build and maintain long-term relationships within the public sector
* Present and explain advanced technical solutions in a clear and compelling way
* Participate in exhibitions and industry events across Europe
* Collaborate closely with product owners and engineering teams to stay at the forefront of the technology
* Capture customer needs and translate them into product and business insights


 The role involves travel, primarily within Sweden but also regularly across Europe.
   

  

 ,
   

  

 At Sectra, we value attitude and ability to learn and take on new tasks quickly. An analytical mindset is essential to understand, break down, and solve complex problems. We also believe you are a strong communicator, with the ability to interact with colleagues, partners, and customers in an effective, clear, and constructive way.
   

  

 In addition to these qualities, we would like you to:
   

  

* Hold a Master of Science in Engineering with strong academic results
* Be fluent in both Swedish and English
* Be highly motivated and goal-oriented, and eager to take ownership of your work
* Have strong time management and organizational skills
* Be able to create and deliver presentations tailored to the needs of different audiences
* Have strong relationship-building skills and be open to feedback


 Nice to have:
   

  

* Previous experience in sales or customer-facing roles
* Military service or completed conscription


**Additional information:** 
 Swedish citizenship is required for this position. We review applications on an ongoing basis.
   

  

 Learn more about our recruitment process here. If you have any questions regarding this position, please feel free to reach out to our recruiter Cajsa Hjortzberg, cajsa.hjortzberg@sectra.com

title: Software/HMI developer - Java
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
**Din roll**
 Som senior Javautvecklare arbetar du med vidareutveckling och förvaltning av ett Java‑baserat HMI med fokus på Java Swing. Den första versionen är redan på plats, och nu väntar nästa fas med fortsatt utveckling, nya integrationer och hantering av buggrapporter. Här kliver du in med din erfarenhet och blir en viktig spelare för att säkerställa kvalitet, stabilitet och fortsatt utveckling över tid.
   

  

 Du har ett helhetsansvar för mjukvaran, från designbeslut och arkitektur till implementation och förbättring av användargränssnittet. Med ett tydligt UX‑fokus bidrar du till att bygga ett gränssnitt som är intuitivt, effektivt och anpassat för användarens behov.
   

  

 Arbetet sker i ett etablerat Scrum‑team där ni planerar i sprintar, samarbetar tätt och regelbundet visar upp ert arbete i demos. Du förväntas ta en senior roll i teamet, bidra med teknisk vägledning, stötta kollegor och vara en drivande kraft i både tekniska diskussioner och långsiktiga vägval.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Du är en erfaren Javautvecklare som trivs i expertrollen och har lätt för att sätta dig in i komplexa system. Du har arbetat med Java Swing tidigare och känner dig trygg i att vidareutveckla, förbättra och underhålla både ny och befintlig kod, även i legacy‑miljöer.
   

  

 Kollegor upplever dig som en självklar kunskapsresurs som gärna delar med sig av sin erfarenhet och coachar mer juniora utvecklare. Du kombinerar teknisk skärpa med ett genuint intresse för användarvänlighet och ser värdet av god UX även i tekniskt avancerade system.
   

  

 Vi ser att du har:
   

  

* Flerårig erfarenhet av Javautveckling (senior nivå, cirka 5 år eller mer)
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Java Swing (inte nödvändigtvis i 5 år, men i skarpa miljöer)
* Förmåga att ta välgrundade design- och arkitekturbeslut
* Ett tydligt UX‑fokus och intresse för att bygga användarvänliga gränssnitt
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och samtidigt vara en stark lagspelare


 Meriterande är erfarenhet av exempelvis databasprogrammering eller arbete i tekniskt komplexa systemmiljöer.
   

  

*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad blir du en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med syfte att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidra till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här

title: Full Stack Application Developer: AI & Automation
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 Join our Data Team as a Full Stack Application Developer / Automation Engineer, where you will design, build, and scale automation solutions that connect core business systems across ecommerce, CRM, supplier operations, and data platforms.
   

  

 You will combine workflow orchestration, full-stack development, APIs, backend services, and internal tools to create reliable end-to-end business processes. Your work will reduce manual effort, improve efficiency, and handle real-world complexity such as retries, partial failures, inconsistent data, and system-to-system handoffs.
   

  

 Beyond traditional automation, you will also help build AI-powered and agent-driven workflows, using LLMs to reason over data, make decisions, call tools, and coordinate multi-step processes.
   

  

 You will work closely with business, data, and technical stakeholders to identify high-impact opportunities and deliver maintainable, secure, and scalable automation systems that connect people, tools, and data across the business.
   

  

**KEY RESPONSIBILITES:**
**Build backend-driven automations**
 Design and implement workflows and services that orchestrate data, actions, and business logic across multiple systems, including transformations, retries, edge cases, and failure handling.
   

  

**Develop and manage integrations**
 Work hands-on with REST APIs, webhooks, ecommerce platforms, CRM systems, marketing tools, internal APIs, and data platforms, ensuring secure and reliable system-to-system communication.
   

  

**Build AI-enhanced and agentic workflows**
 Create workflows where LLMs can reason over data, decide next steps, call APIs or tools, and support semi-autonomous processes using structured outputs and human-in-the-loop patterns.
   

  

**Own production reliability**
 Monitor, debug, and improve workflows in production, strengthening observability, performance, error handling, and data consistency across connected systems.
   

  

**Contribute across the stack**
 Build backend services in Node.js or Python, integration layers, APIs, and frontend tools in React or similar frameworks when needed to support automation workflows.
   

  

**Collaborate across teams**
 Work with data, product, business, and engineering teams to translate business processes into scalable automated systems and identify opportunities for automation and AI augmentation.
   

  

**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:**
 We value both technical expertise and cultural fit. You enjoy collaborating, experimenting, and building solutions that make a real impact.
   

  

**Technical expertice:**
* 5+ years of experience building backend systems
* Experience with real-world integrations, including APIs, webhooks, and third-party services
* Experience building or maintaining automation workflows using n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar tools
* Experience working with LLMs or AI systems, such as APIs, structured outputs, or tool usage
* Strong ability to debug production issues
* A systems-oriented mindset, with an understanding of data flows, failure handling, and operational reliability
* Ability to move from idea to working solution to production


**Nice to Have:**
* Experience with n8n, especially self-hosted setups
* Familiarity with agent frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, or similar
* Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL or NoSQL
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or similar
* Understanding of event-driven systems or data pipelines
* Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field


**WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:**
* Business processes are reliably automated end-to-end
* Manual operations are reduced through smart workflows and internal tools
* AI-driven automations are introduced beyond static rule-based processes
* Systems are scalable, observable, secure, and maintainable


**WHY THIS ROLE IS INTERESTING:**
 This is not a traditional automation role. You will work at the intersection of workflow automation, full-stack engineering, backend integrations, and AI-driven systems, helping the business evolve from simple integrations to intelligent, semi-autonomous workflows.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Lead Software Engineer - Privileged Access Management
description:
**Principal Software Engineer — Privileged Access Management (PAM)** 




 Help us build the backbone of secure cloud infrastructure.
 



  





 Our globally renowned client is looking for a senior engineer who thrives in complex distributed systems, loves owning problems end-to-end, and wants to build security-critical infrastructure that developers actually enjoy using. You’ll work on the platform layer that powers privileged access, identity, and secure operations across modern cloud environments.
 



  





 This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys designing systems, shipping production code, improving reliability, and making smart architectural decisions in a fast-moving engineering culture.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 




  




* Build and operate cloud-native platform services on AWS
* Own systems from architecture and implementation through to production operations
* Design secure, scalable, and highly reliable infrastructure services
* Help shape technical direction and engineering standards across the platform
* Work across Python, Go, and TypeScript — choosing the right tool for the job
* Improve observability, reliability, and operational excellence across critical systems
* Collaborate closely with engineers, security, and infrastructure teams
* Solve hard problems around access control, automation, and cloud-scale operations



  





**What we’re looking for** 




  




* Strong experience building and running production systems on AWS
* Deep familiarity with services like Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, EC2, SQS, EventBridge, CloudWatch, and Route 53
* Excellent Python skills, plus experience with Go for high-performance tooling or services
* Experience with infrastructure-as-code using Terraform and/or CloudFormation
* Strong systems design and architectural judgment
* Comfortable taking ownership of complex problems with minimal oversight
* Pragmatic mindset with a bias toward shipping and continuous improvement
* Bonus points for frontend experience with Svelte or TypeScript

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 



  


 To further empower our engineering organisation, we are looking for a product-minded Senior Platform Engineer. Our platform team's mission is clear: Empower teams to deploy and operate services quickly and safely through a self-service platform that reduces cognitive load and enforces security, reliability, and compliance by default.
 


  


  


 At this level, your biggest shift is moving from owning your personal work to owning organizational outcomes, and from following paths to creating the "paved road" for others. You will act as a true technical partner to our engineering teams, treating the platform as a product, actively shaping its vision, and driving the roadmap that enables our developers to build faster and more safely.
 


  






  




**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 
  

  
* **Architect the Paved Road:** 
 Own and evolve the product deployment chain utilized by our development teams, including CI/CD pipelines  and underlying delivery infrastructure. You will design these systems for scale, aiming for appropriate complexity ("as simple as possible, but no simpler")
  
* **Drive Ways of Working:** 
 Act as a cultural and technical driver for modern engineering practices. You will champion and implement SLO frameworks, promote trunk-based development, and build the tooling required for product teams to significantly increase their service availability
  
* **Champion Observability:** 
 Ensure monitoring, logging, and tracing are built in from the start, never as afterthoughts. You will provide the observability primitives that allow product teams to truly understand and trust their systems in production
  
* **Span Boundaries & Elevate Standards:** 
 Work closely with Infrastructure, Security, and Product teams to ensure a consistently high standard. You will embed "security and compliance by design" into the daily workflows of the entire engineering org without sacrificing velocity
  
* **Multiply your impact:** 
 Lift the skills of those around you by developing teammates, mentoring colleagues through detailed feedback, and evangelising platform capabilities across the broader engineering organization
  

  


  


  




**WHO YOU ARE** 
  

  
* **Experienced Platform Builder:** 
 You have significant senior-level experience (typically 7+ years) building, scaling, and operating developer platforms, CI/CD toolchains, and high-availability distributed systems in production
  
* **A "Platform as a Product" Thinker:** 
 You naturally view internal tooling from a customer perspective. You focus on developer outcomes and reducing cognitive load rather than over-engineering solutions for the sake of technical elegance
  
* **Operationally Driven:** 
 You have a veteran instinct for spotting systemic failure modes and identifying operational risks long before they impact availability. You deeply understand SLOs, error budgets, and how to balance reliability with feature velocity
  
* **Comfortable in Ambiguity:** 
 You do not wait for perfect clarity; you make timely decisions, define problems when they are unclear, and do not let uncertainty become paralysis
  
* **A Boundary-Spanning Collaborator:** 
 You proactively cross team boundaries to solve problems. You know how to build alignment between product developers, security experts, and infrastructure engineers, navigating difficult technical trade-offs with empathy and direct communication
  

  


  





  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits
 
 (varies by location)
 

 🌴
 **20 to 25 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 ☕
 **Office perks** 
 such as refreshments (coffee, sodas etc.), breakfast, fruit and snacks
 




 🍴
 **Meal card** 
 to
 
 enjoy
 

 a daily lunch allowance to make your workdays even more convenient
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact
 
 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses.
