With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Information Technology Technical Support
description:
*Vill du arbeta i en användarnära IT-support där du får kombinera teknisk problemlösning med förstklassig service i en modern och högpresterande miljö?* 




  





*Vi söker nu en IT-Supporttekniker till ett konsultuppdrag hos vår kund i Stockholm på 40 %, med arbete onsite två dagar i veckan. Rollen passar dig som trivs med varierande arbetsdagar, gillar att lösa tekniska problem och vill vara en viktig del av ett engagerat supportteam där användaren alltid står i fokus.* 




  





*Uppdraget startar i juni 2026 och löper till februari 2027, med god möjlighet till förlängning.* 




  





**Om uppdraget** 




 I rollen som IT-Supporttekniker blir du en del av ett högpresterande team som ansvarar för att leverera professionell och användarnära IT-support till kundens medarbetare och dotterbolag. Arbetet sker onsite hos kunden i Stockholm och omfattar support inom både klientmiljöer och mobila enheter.
 



 Du arbetar nära användarna och får möjlighet att hantera både dagliga supportärenden och mer avancerad felsökning. Rollen innebär stor variation där du får kombinera teknik, service och problemlösning i en dynamisk miljö.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som IT-Supporttekniker ansvarar du för att ge snabb, professionell och lösningsorienterad support till användare onsite. Du arbetar med installation, felsökning och support inom både Windows- och Mac-miljö samt hjälper användare med olika typer av IT-relaterade frågor.
 



 Du blir en viktig kontaktpunkt i organisationen och arbetar nära både användare och leverantörer i en roll där service och kommunikation är avgörande.
 



  





*Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:* 



* Installation och felsökning av datorer och mobila enheter
* Support och hantering av användarärenden onsite
* Teknisk felsökning inom klientmiljöer och nätverk
* Hantering av ärenden inom Windows, Mac OS och M365
* Administration i AD/EntraID
* Support kring Teams, SharePoint, Planner och övriga Microsoft 365-tjänster
* Samarbete med leverantörer och interna supportfunktioner
* Hantering av mer avancerade supportärenden och 2nd line-relaterad felsökning
* Bidra till en trygg, effektiv och användarvänlig IT-miljö



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som är serviceinriktad, pedagogisk och trivs i en roll med mycket användarkontakt. Du är lösningsorienterad, kommunikativ och har tålamod även i situationer där problemlösningen kräver extra noggrannhet. Du har ett genuint teknikintresse och håller dig gärna uppdaterad kring modern teknik och nya arbetssätt inom IT-support.
 



 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du är en lagspelare som uppskattar samarbete och som drivs av att ge användarna bästa möjliga service.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* Teknisk utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Tidigare erfarenhet som IT-supporttekniker i onsite helpdesk
* God logisk och analytisk förmåga inom teknisk felsökning
* Erfarenhet av:
* Windows
* Mac OS
* Microsoft 365
* Teams, SharePoint och Planner
* AD/EntraID
* Nätverk
* Obehindrade kunskaper i svenska och mycket god engelska i tal och skrift



  





*Meriterande* 



* Erfarenhet av 2nd Line Support
* Erfarenhet av M365 Copilot
* Viss erfarenhet av Intune och JAMF
* Intresse för modern teknik och omvärldsbevakning inom IT



  





 Låter detta som rätt uppdrag för dig? Skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag då urval och intervjuer sker löpande.

title: Information Technology Service Management Consultant
description:
**Role: ITSM/ ITIL Consultant** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Type: Contract** 




  





**Job Description:**



* Manage multiple concurrent changes in fast-paced, high-pressure environments while ensuring minimal disruption to services.
* Own the end-to-end change lifecycle, including intake, validation, planning, scheduling, execution oversight, and post-implementation review.
* Assess and prioritize change requests based on impact, risk, urgency, and technical/business dependencies.
* Ensure all changes comply with ITIL frameworks and established organizational governance standards.
* Plan, coordinate, and facilitate Change Advisory Board (CAB) meetings, including documentation of decisions and actions.
* Apply strong knowledge of ITIL v4 and modern IT Service Management (ITSM) practices; relevant certifications are preferred.
* Utilize ServiceNow (or equivalent ITSM tools) for change management, tracking, and reporting activities.
* Demonstrate technical understanding across cloud, networking, platform, and application layers to evaluate change impact effectively.
* Engage and communicate effectively with stakeholders, including senior leadership, ensuring clear and structured updates.
* Drive continuous improvement using data-driven analysis, root cause analysis (RCA), and customer/stakeholder satisfaction metrics.

title: Chief Technology Officer
description:
**What will you do?**
 As the Chief Technology Officer at Rebtel, you will lead our global technology organization through its next phase of growth and transformation. You will scale teams, modernize how we build and deliver software, and ensure our platform remains secure, reliable, and ready for the future.
   

  

 You have experience from startup and scale-up environments and understand what it takes to move from scrappy execution to predictable, high-quality delivery. You will introduce modern organizational design and delivery models, creating clarity in ownership, accountability, and engineering standards.
   

  

 You are comfortable operating in modern cloud-native architectures. You will guide safe modernization efforts while ensuring business continuity and operational stability. As a key member of the executive team, you will partner with the CEO and Board, contributing both strategic insight and operational rigor.
   

  

**Areas Of Ownership**
* Define and execute the company-wide technology strategy aligned with business and product goals
* Lead Rebtel’s AI vision, experimentation, and implementation, positioning the company as an early and practical AI adoption leader
* Build and evolve a high-performing engineering organization, including leadership development and org design
* Establish modern delivery models and clear ownership structures that enable predictable, high-quality execution
* Ensure platform scalability, reliability, and operational excellence across legacy and modern systems
* Drive technical modernization and systematically reduce technical debt without disrupting live production
* Own cloud infrastructure, architecture, and high-availability production environments
* Safeguard security, data protection, and compliance across all systems
* Own the technology budget, workforce planning, and engineering cost efficiency
* Partner with Product and Commercial leadership to ensure technology directly supports growth and customer value


**Requirements**
* You are an excellent communicator and collaborator. We work in English, but you will hear many languages in our Stockholm office
* 10+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 5+ years leading engineering teams of 15+ engineers
* Experience managing engineering managers and building strong leadership layers
* Experience reporting to a CEO and executive team, and comfortable constructively challenging leadership and Board when needed
* Proven track record of hiring, scaling, and retaining high-performing engineering teams
* Experience of frontier AI dev tools, Cursor, Claude code and/or Codex.
* Understands MCP servers and how product, design and development work is being transformed by AI
* Experience owning a technology budget with P&L accountability and workforce planning
* Strong background in distributed systems and scalable architecture
* Experience designing and operating high-availability production systems
* Hands-on understanding of cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
* Experience improving CI/CD, DevOps practices, and overall engineering velocity
* Experience working with legacy systems and modernizing them safely while reducing technical debt
* Strong understanding of security, data protection, and compliance
* Demonstrated ability to improve system reliability and operational stability in live production environments
* Experience restructuring or modernizing an engineering organization, introducing clear ownership structures and engineering standards
* Demonstrated ability to move an organization from reactive firefighting to predictable, structured delivery
* Shares context openly and makes architecture visible and understandable across the company
* Encourages cross-team knowledge sharing and collaboration
* Coaches and develops engineering managers, setting clear performance expectations
* Builds a culture of accountability and ownership
* Calm under pressure and able to bring structure to ambiguity
* Structured, systems-oriented thinker with high integrity and low ego


**Why Rebtel?**
 Rebtel has been connecting people across borders for nearly 20 years. Today, we’re profitable, growing, and at a pivotal moment in our journey. As we enter our next phase, we’re building an organisation designed for speed, ownership, and real impact, where every role contributes directly to shaping what comes next.
   

  

 This is a place with global ambition and a strong foundation, where ideas move quickly and decisions matter. You won’t get lost in layers of process or slow-moving structures. Instead, you’ll find the space to take ownership, collaborate across teams, and make meaningful contributions from day one. Based in Stockholm, we bring together a diverse, international team united by a shared purpose: to simplify the way people connect worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:
   

  

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.


*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
 Rebtel is a company of about 70 people from 31 countries who share a common mission to empower diaspora communities around the world to stay connected to where they come from. From our office in central Stockholm, we help our user base of 1 million dual-culture people—predominantly from the global south—connect with and support their communities through affordable data-free international calling and mobile top-ups. With our app and online platform, we help dissolve the space between their worlds so they can live more connected lives.

title: Graduate Program IT & Technology - Sweden
description:
**Job Description**
 Are you looking to kick off your career journey?
   

  

 Do you like the idea of joining the European PayTech?
   

  

 If so, you are at the right place!
   

  

 Our Graduate Program offers you the chance to create your unique career path within our diverse international team, operating in more than 25 countries. Rotate among different departments, learn from experienced professionals, and make a difference by working on real business cases.
   

  

**About The Program**
 Our Graduate Program is more than a learning path, it's a journey where you will work on real business cases and have a direct impact on business results.
   

  

**What Can You Expect?**
* Career Path: Start with a permanent contract from day one. Over 12 months, experience two rotations across departments and transition into a landing role where you can continue to grow.
* Training & Development: Receive a well-structured, dedicated Project Management training program, tailored to strengthen your ability to lead projects and deliver results. Plus, gain access to a wide range of learning opportunities through our Digital PayTech University, empowering you to continuously build your skills and expand your knowledge.
* Impact & Networking: Contribute to real business solutions and expand your network by working alongside talented colleagues and senior leaders from across Europe.


**Who are We Looking For?**
 If this sounds like you, we encourage you to apply:
   

  

* You have graduated within the past 12 months or will graduate within the next 6 months with a master’s degree in Engineering, STEM disciplines, Business, or related fields, and are available to work full-time.
* You are fluent in English and Swedish.
* You bring international experience, whether through study, work abroad, or collaboration in a global environment.
* You are a career starter with no more than one year of professional experience.
* You have the legal right to work in Sweden (e.g., residency, visa).
* You are committed, curious, and eager to take ownership of projects while thriving in a team environment.
* You see formal training as just the beginning and aim to make a difference in everything you do.


**Diversity, Equity and Inclusion**
 We are committed to building a diverse culture where talents from all walks of life feel they truly belong. By applying to our Graduate Program, you are one step closer to joining us. Next starts with you, everyday.
   

  

**Apply Now!**
 Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity. Apply today and discover what's in it for you!
   

  

 Please ensure both your CV and all answers in the application form are completed in English.
   

  

**About Us**
 Are you interested in joining one of Europe's leading PayTech companies?
   

  

 Do you want to be part of a diverse team, collaborating with colleagues from across Europe? If so, you're in the right place!
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are the result of merging Nexi, Nets, and Sia, with a presence in over 25 countries. With over 80 years of experience, we offer plenty of opportunities for personal and professional growth
   

  

 At Nexi, we learn, adapt, and think like entrepreneurs. Discover more about our culture by visiting this page: https://www.nexigroup.com/en/people/life-at-nexi/overview/?utm\_source=career-platform&utm\_medium=job-openings&utm\_content=about-the-team

title: Network Engineer
description:
*Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now we are about to do it again and the aim is to create the next generation of bank, in the cloud. We know that this requires great people, great teams, and great technology. Do you want to join us and build the new Nordnet?*
 In brief
   

  

 IT Infrastructure belongs, together with IT Support, Business systems and Customer systems to IT Operations. Together we manage all of Nordnet's IT systems from client desktops to our most critical trading servers. We are now looking for a Network Engineer that will work together with our development teams which are independent, product oriented, agile, full stack teams including product owners, developers, QA and system engineers.
   

  

 This is part of the role
   

  

 In your role as a network engineer in the IT infrastructure team you will be responsible for continuously improving and maintaining our network infrastructure and also be part of our Cloud journey. Together with a team of experts you will focus on automation, stability and security to be able to handle tomorrow's workloads. As a team we are easy going, forward leaning and always looking at new technologies to help us improve. Our sysadmins, that are part of the IT Infrastructure team, will be your best friends and together you will ensure that our network and systems are always up and running and that our development teams can work at full speed.
   

  

 This is you
   

  

**As a Network Engineer You**
* are organized, careful and methodical in a way that benefits the team's working climate and ability to deliver high quality solutions
* are highly communicative, transparent and a good listener
* are used to work in high performing business critical systems
* keep track of the new trends in your area of expertise
* love new technology and see problems as an opportunity to improve
* are passionate about modern proactive operational work


 Background
   

  

**You Are Well Founded In The Following**
* Datacenter networking (routing, switching, vxlan)
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* Cloud networking, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Wireless networking
* Load balancing
* Network security
* Network automation


 Good to have
   

  

* Arista experience
* Palo Alto experience
* F5 experience
* Python experience
* Terraform and Ansible
* Linux experience
* Experience from banking and finance


 Language skills
   

  

 Fluent in English and Swedish is mandatory.
   

  

 We offer
   

  

 Nordnet started from a passionate belief that changing the hierarchic financial world was possible. We became part of redefining the industry when we gave the customers power over their own savings.
   

  

 You will become part of a journey that has only yet started towards the vision to become the number 1 choice for savings and investments in the Nordic countries and a true digital bank! To be leading in infrastructure is vital for that journey and you will work with colleagues who have a great passion for that goal.
   

  

 We are around 1000 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen. We cooperate, exchange ideas and use our core competencies in order to continuously improve the way we meet our customers. Open communication, creativity and engagement are important parts of our everyday life at the office.
   

  

 Visit us on www.nordnetab.com, www.nordnet.se, www.nordnet.no, www.nordnet.dk and www.nordnet.fi.
   

  

 Application
   

  

 Please apply today by using the button below – we will start interviewing immediately. Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 If you have questions, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Lovisa Malmberg, lovisa.malmberg@nordnet.se.
   

  

 We also want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Förvaltningsledare - IT
description:
**Om arbetsplatsen**
 Kemikalieinspektionen är en statlig myndighet som har i uppdrag att minska riskerna för att människor och miljö skadas av kemikalier. Som medarbetare hos oss är du en del av ett betydelsefullt arbete för hållbar utveckling i Sverige, inom EU och globalt. Vi är 250 medarbetare och vårt kontor ligger i centrala Sundbyberg.
   

  

 Sekretariatet för IT & digitalisering ansvarar för myndighetens strategiska IT-frågor, tillhandahåller gemensamma IT-plattform samt tillgodoser myndighetens behov av IT-lösningar. I sekretariatet ingår funktioner för servicedesk, infrastruktur, cybersäkerhet, IT-projekt samt systemförvaltning och digital verksamhetsutveckling.
   

  

 Trivs du att driva, utveckla och förbättra en verksamhet har du goda möjligheter att kunna påverka. Vi erbjuder ett meningsfullt arbete och många kunniga och trevliga kollegor som bidrar till ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag. Vi erbjuder bra villkor för bland annat friskvård, flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet till distansarbete.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Som förvaltningsledare IT är du en nyckelperson inom Kemikalieinspektionens systemförvaltning. Rollen är bred och du planerar, samordnar och driver arbetet inom förvaltning i nära samarbete med verksamhet och leverantörer. IT-miljön består av både egenutvecklade- och standardsystem. Du agerar länk mellan kärnverksamheten, IT och leverantörer samt bistår vid behovsanalys, kravställning och att fram tekniska lösningsförslag. Du har ett nära samarbete med övriga medarbetare på IT-enheten.
   

  

 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Du arbetar med processer, rutiner, kvalitets- och förbättringsarbete inom förvaltning
* Budgetarbete
* Kort och långsiktig planering samt uppföljning av förvaltningsaktiviteter
* Livscykelhantering
* Rapporterar status, avvikelser och kostnadsuppföljningar
* Planerar och följer upp arbete inom utvecklingsteamet.
* Leverantörsstyrning
* Genomför upphandlingar och ser till att verksamheternas krav omhändertas.
* Du driver ditt arbete självständigt samt deltar i uppdrag och utvecklingsarbeten.


**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har minst tre års erfarenhet av en liknande roll. Du har en relevant akademisk utbildning inom IT/ teknik eller motsvarande som vi bedömer likvärdigt och god förmåga att kommunicera i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.
   

  

 Du har goda kunskaper och dokumenterad erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Förvaltningsledning enligt etablerad förvaltningsmodell såsom PM3 eller liknande
* Kravhantering
* Projektarbete
* Utarbeta, budgetera, realisera och följa upp förvaltningsplaner


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att utveckla förvaltningsobjekt med gemensamma arbetssätt.
* Erfarenhet från verksamhetsutveckling inom IT och förändringsledning
* Erfarenhet av samverkan med externa IT-leverantörer
* Erfarenhet av IT inom offentlig sektor


 Personliga egenskaper
   

  

 För att lyckas och trivas i rollen är det viktigt att du har ett starkt driv, ansvarstagande för de uppgifter du tar dig an samt har förmåga att fatta beslut. Du är en nyfiken och en produktiv medarbetare. Du ser möjligheter i det som ligger framför dig, är operativ och tvekar inte att komma med förbättringsförslag. Vidare kan du kombinera det analytiska med det praktiska och besitter förmågan att strukturera, planera och prioritera bland arbetsuppgifterna.
   

  

 Du trivs med att arbeta i team och har en mycket god samarbetsförmåga. Du har fallenhet för att se helheten och är en lyhörd kommunikatör. Du är säkerhetsmedveten och känner ett starkt ansvar inför dina arbetsuppgifter. Du har goda kunskaper i svenska i både tal och skrift.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt på dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 På Kemikalieinspektionen är varje medarbetare viktig för att vi som myndighet ska fungera och vi värnar därför om din hälsa och arbetsmiljö. Hos oss tas dina kunskaper till vara och du har stora möjligheter att utvecklas.
   

  

 Vi förväntar oss att alla medarbetare bidrar till ett gott arbetsklimat och förstår sin roll som statstjänsteman i vårt gemensamma uppdrag.
   

  

 Du arbetar och agerar efter vår medarbetarpolicy och vår värdegrund. Vi bedriver också ett målinriktat arbete för lika rättigheter och möjligheter.
   

  

 Utifrån verksamhetens behov finns möjlighet, efter överenskommelse med chef, att arbeta upp till hälften av arbetstiden på distans.
   

  

 Kemikalieinspektionen tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning på alla anställningar.

title: IT Supporttekniker inom Mac & Windows
description:
Vi söker nu en driven IT Supporttekniker med erfarenhet av både Windows- och Mac-miljöer, som vill utvecklas vidare i en dynamisk IT-miljö. Om du vill vara del av en varm och inkluderande företagskultur som investerar i din utveckling, kan det här vara rätt möjlighet för dig!
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du att hantera supportärenden på plats på huvudkontoret samt via telefon, e-post och ärendehanteringssystem. Din arbetsdag kommer att vara varierad, med frågor av olika karaktär, men oavsett är ditt fokus alltid att leverera en personlig och engagerad support för att underlätta användarnas dagliga arbete. Här får du möjlighet att jobba med förbättring av interna processer och man får gärna ta initiativ till förbättringsarbete.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har ett par års erfarenhet av användarsupport både inom macOS och Windows-baserade system och som brinner för att ge användarfokuserad, pedagogisk support.
   

  

 Din erfarenhet inkluderar:
   

  

* Mac OS och Windows OS
* Microsoft 365
* Jamf/Intune
* Google Workspace
* Active Directory/Azure AD
* Konferensutrustning och skrivare
* ServiceNow eller liknande ärendehanteringssystem
* Vi ser att du behärskar svenska och engelska flytande, både i tal och skrift.


 Som person är du lyhörd, har en stark förmåga att prioritera och kan snabbt förstå användarens behov. Du är social, tycker om att träffa nya människor, och din pedagogiska förmåga gör att du kan förklara tekniska frågor på ett lättförståeligt sätt. Dessutom har du ett starkt intresse för IT och håller dig uppdaterad om de senaste tekniska trenderna.
   

  

**Start** 
 : Omgående start med hänsyn till uppsägningstid. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Ansökan:** 
 Intervjuer sker löpande och tillsättning sker vid rätt match
   

  

**Vad vi står för:**
 Vi på Camai erbjuder ett av marknadens branschledande anställningsvillkor med stor frihet som ledord. Vi drivs av att hitta det bästa uppdraget för våra medarbetare. Det roligaste som finns är att hitta en perfekt matchning mellan konsult och kund. Vi vet att alla har ett drömarbete, och vi är ett tight entreprenörsdrivet team som arbetar för att se till att du tycker att det är roligt att gå till jobbet, varje dag. Vi tror att kompetenta människor dras till varandra och vill jobba med likasinnade i spännande kunduppdrag.
   

  

 Vi har en av marknadens mest förmånliga ersättningsmodell anpassad för en modern konsultorganisation med mycket frihet. Vi har helt enkelt kul tillsammans!
   

  

**Varför ska du välja oss?**
 Med många års erfarenhet i konsultbranschen har vi valt våra tre värdeord med omsorg; kommunikation, ambition och balans. För att lyckas tror vi att våra medarbetare får vara med och forma sitt arbete efter prioriteringar och intresse i livet. Med din ambition och rätt verktyg från oss ser vi till att du utvecklas och samtidigt belönas på vägen.
   

  

*Vill du vara en del av vår fortsatta tillväxt?*

title: IT Service Manager
description:
Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in e-health with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our e-health solutions supports health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.
   

  

**The position**
 You will be responsible for securing the control functions of our service operation such as Release, Change, Test and Environment management. You will collaborate closely with development teams, operations, and end users to enable stable and efficient service delivery.
   

  

 You will lead a team of approximately 15 employees located in Linköping, Stockholm, and Sri Lanka. The team works in virtual, cross-functional setups across most parts of Cambio and plays a key role in leading and facilitating the deployment of new services and functionalities to our users. The combined commitment of your service area team enables a quality assured, stable and efficient IT service delivery through, controlled releases, managed changes, optimized environments, and continuous improvement.
   

  

 As an IT Service Manager, you will work closely with other IT managers to utilize competencies in the most effective and optimized way. You will be part of our IT Service Organization, consisting of around 100 dedicated colleagues working within areas such as Application Management, IT Operations, IT Tooling Management, Change, Release & Environment, and IT Security.
   

  

**We Offer**
* An important leadership role where you inspire and support your team’s growth while contributing to the success and continuous improvement of our service organization.
* Broad contact areas – from end users to IT specialists and leaders at all levels of the organization.
* The chance to work with driven and dedicated colleagues who truly care about our customers and the positive impact we create for society.
* You’ll join a welcoming organization with a warm and inclusive culture, where teamwork and open collaboration are at the heart of everything we do!


**Responsibilities**
* Drive, through your team’s expertise, the predictable and efficient delivery of the customers service management functions, such as test, release and change.
* Lead and inspire your team – from recruiting new talent to supporting their growth through performance reviews and development opportunities.
* Drive continuous improvement of ways of working, processes, and collaboration models to ensure efficient and effective service delivery.
* Be a key player in the IT management team, helping shape strategy and spotting smart tech solutions that boost how we work and help us reach our goals. You provide the clear focus on user needs and customer value
* Build strong internal relationships, working closely with stakeholders across the organization to ensure alignment and smooth collaboration.


**About You**
 You have experience leading larger teams and have worked in medium to large organizations, preferably in roles involving partner or vendor collaboration. You are used to operating in environments with many employees and varying levels of digital maturity. Experience in ITIL-based service delivery and optimization is highly valued in this role. You understand established frameworks, know what works in practice, and can identify opportunities for improvement.
   

  

 We believe that you thrive in fast-paced environments and have a structured approach to getting the right things done, at the right time, in the right place. You have a coaching leadership, with a focus on clear communication, cooperation and shared responsibility. Strong networking and interpersonal skills make it natural to communicate just as effectively with highly technical specialists as with executive stakeholders.
   

  

 Leadership at Cambio builds on trust, openness and safety. It is important for us to treat everyone with dignity, respect and fairness. We use failures as learning opportunities and a way to stimulate development. Our leaders must always “walk the talk” and lead by example.
   

  

**Requirements** 
  

  

* You have documented experience in leading and facilitating deliveries in complex IT environments, as a team manager, project lead or similar. Experience in a role with managerial responsibility is a bonus.
* You are accustomed to coordinating work between multiple functions (development, operations, users and stakeholders) in connection with new functions and changes
* Solid understanding of ITIL processes, with hands-on experience working in a process-oriented ITIL environment
* Experience in coordinating processes with a focus on structure, planning and resource optimization in larger organizations
* Excellent communication skills in both Swedish and English


**Additional Information**
**Place of employment** 
 :  Stockholm
   

  

**Scope** 
 : Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
   

  

**Form of employment:** 
 Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 The recruitment process will include a personality test and a problem-solving test.
   

  

 The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
   

  

 We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**
 Cambio Healthcare Systems is Sweden’s leading suppliers of healthcare information systems and a growing player in the European market with just over 100,000 users across general and university hospitals, specialist units and outpatient units. Through the use of our integrated solutions, our customers provide services to 4 million patients.

title: Active Directory Specialist
description:
**ADDS Technician** 




  





 Proxify – uncovering the world’s hidden talent since 2018
 



 Proxify connects talented tech professionals like you with long-term remote
 



 opportunities at top companies in the USA, Sweden, Germany, the Netherlands, and
 



 beyond.
 



 We believe that talent has no borders and value skills and experience above all else.
 



 Since our launch, Proxify has connected over 5,000 talented developers to land their
 



 dream remote job at over 1,200 companies.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We are looking for a skilled and motivated ADDS Technician to join one of our largest
 



 client teams operating in the automotive sector.
 



 In this role, you will be responsible for managing, maintaining, and securing Active
 



 Directory Domain Services (ADDS) and hybrid identity environments. You will play a
 



 key role in authentication, authorization, identity lifecycle management, and access
 



 control, ensuring a secure, stable, and efficient infrastructure.
 



 This position requires a proactive, security-first mindset and close collaboration with
 



 IT Operations, Security, and Engineering teams.
 



 As part of a diverse and global team, strong English communication skills are
 



 required.
 



**This is a long-term, full-time hybrid engagement.** 




**IMPORTANT:** 
 The candidate is expected to work onsite in Södertälje, Sweden, 2–3
 



 days per week. This may vary depending on project needs (e.g. 5 days onsite one
 



 week and none the following week).
 



  





**Main responsibilities** 



* Manage and maintain Active Directory (on-prem & hybrid with Entra ID)
* Ensure domain controller health, replication, and DNS integration
* Administer users, groups, permissions, and Group Policies (GPOs)
* Implement and monitor security controls (MFA, SSO, Conditional Access)
* Troubleshoot AD, authentication, and access issues
* Automate tasks using PowerShell scripting
* Support identity lifecycle processes (onboarding/offboarding)
* Collaborate with IT, Security, and Infrastructure teams
* Participate in upgrades, patching, and disaster recovery
* Maintain documentation and support audits/compliance



  





**Requirements** 



* Strong experience with Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS)
* Knowledge of Entra ID (Azure AD) and hybrid identity
* Experience with Windows Server (2016/2019/2022)
* Expertise in Group Policy Management
* Understanding of IAM principles and security best practices
* Experience with MFA, SSO, and Conditional Access
* PowerShell scripting skills for automation
* Knowledge of DNS, DHCP, LDAP, Kerberos
* Experience in enterprise or multi-domain environments



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience with hybrid AD environments
* Familiarity with identity governance tools
* Microsoft certifications (AZ-104, SC-300, MS-102)
* Experience integrating AD with SaaS and cloud platforms
* Knowledge of security frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, Zero Trust)
* Experience working in global or distributed teams



  





**Why work remotely with Proxify?** 



* Accelerate your tech career
* Discover exclusive long-term remote engagements at the world's most interesting product companies.
* Find your dream role
* Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched engagements.
* Gain more freedom
* All Proxify roles are 100% remote, no more long commutes and being restricted to the local job market.
* Speedy application
* You only need to apply to Proxify once, and, if successful, we’ll recommend you to jobs matching your profile. No more endless edits of your resume!

title: Windowsspecialist
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker en Windowsspecialist med nätverkskunskap som vill bidra till bättre IT-lösningar för våra kunder. Är du vår nya kollega?
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society**
 Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort. Med huvudkontor i Stockholm verkar Iver främst i Norden med en agenda att fortsätta expandera. Iver omsätter drygt 3 miljarder SEK och har cirka 1 300 anställda som arbetar på ett av våra 23 kontor i Norden.
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 Vi söker en erfaren
 **Windowsspecialist** 
 med goda kunskaper inom nätverk till vår vertikal
 **Financial Services and Fintech** 
 på Iver. I denna roll kommer du att arbeta med drift, underhåll och utveckling av våra kunders IT-miljöer, med fokus på Windows-baserade system och nätverksinfrastruktur.
   

  

 Du kommer att vara en nyckelperson i att säkerställa hög tillgänglighet, stabilitet och säkerhet. Tjänsten innebär både operativt och strategiskt arbete, där du får möjlighet att påverka och förbättra våra kunders IT-miljö.
   

  

 Du kommer att vara en del av ett kundteam med ansvar för några av våra kunders tjänsteleverans. Vi arbetar med områden så som arkitektur, projekt, drift/förvaltning av våra kunders infrastruktur och nät. Våra kunder är ofta stora nordiska företag, fintech, startups eller myndigheter med krav på hög nivå av informationssäkerhet och lösningar i teknisk framkant. Vissa av dem utgör samhällskritisk verksamhet.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter:**
* Administration, underhåll och felsökning av Windows Server-miljöer
* Hantering av Active Directory, GPO, DNS, DHCP och andra Windows-tjänster
* Övervakning och optimering av nätverksinfrastruktur (LAN/WAN, brandväggar, switchar, VPN)
* Säkerhetsarbete, inklusive patchhantering och skydd mot intrång
* Implementering och hantering av backup- och återställningslösningar
* Dokumentation och förbättring av IT-processer


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På Iver får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa. Vi är inkluderande och strävar efter ett genuint samarbete mot gemensamma mål. Inom Iver finns stora möjligheter till utveckling och vi finns här för att inspirera dig till att nå dina yrkesmässiga mål. Vi står bakom dig när du vill lära dig mer inom ditt specialområde, ledarskap eller nya områden. Hos Iver är du också en del av ett ambitiöst och innovativt företag, vilket innebär att förbättra, testa, utvärdera och våga ändra hur vi gör saker är viktiga ingredienser för att vi ska utvecklas.
   

  

 Vi på Iver ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder. Löftet är att alltid vara ”beside you”, ”behind you” och ”before you”. Vi kallar det för "
 **The Iver way** 
 ".
   

  

**Förmåner hos oss:**
 📄 Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor
   

  

 🏠 Hybridarbete
   

  

 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

 👓 Terminalglasögon
   

  

 ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år
   

  

 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
   

  

**Din bakgrund och profil:**
 Du plockade troligen sönder den första dator du fick bara för att se hur den fungerar, och du har lagt en ansenlig mängd tid på att bygga Lego under din uppväxt. Din vilja att förstå hur saker fungerar är mer än bara ett arbete eller inlärt beteende. Därutöver trivs du sannolikt av att jobba i ett högpresterande team och drivs av viljan att göra tekniska lösningar i framkant ännu bättre.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen vill vi att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av Windows-serveradministration
* Erfarenhet av utveckling av arkitektur och design för Active Directory
* Proaktivt underhållsarbete för AD / ADFS / Windows Server
* PowerShell
* Nätverk, tcp/ip och brandvägg
* Erfarenhet av Windows failover kluster


**Meriterande kunskaper:**
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Microsoft Exchange
* Linux-kunskaper
* Produktionsmiljö med särskilda krav på informationssäkerhet och tillgänglighet
* MS PKI / Certifikathantering
* Tidigare arbete som TAM
* Övervakning och visualisering med exempelvis Zabbix, Prometheus, Grafana, Kibana
* Virtualisering


**Placeringsort:** 
 Iver finns på 23 orter i Norden. För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från kontoret i Solna.
   

  

**Övrig information:** 
 Vi har kunder inom säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser. Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav för tjänsten.
   

  

**Sök till oss!** 
 Urval sker löpande, tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald. Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-05-30
   

  

**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Välkommen att kontakta Kajsa.holzwart@iver.se vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society** 
 . Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation.
   

  

**Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder – utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.** 
 Vi säkerställer att sjukvården har tillgång till rätt patientdata, att samhällskritiska system aldrig ligger nere och att flygplanen landar säkert. Som en lyhörd och affärsnära helhetspartner möjliggör vi våra kunders innovation – idag och imorgon.

title: Country Manager, Nordics
location: Upplands Väsby och Sollentuna, Stockholm County, Sweden
description:
Viking Nordic distributes Minimax-Viking technologies across Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, and Iceland. It offers the region’s most complete fire‑protection portfolio, including water-based systems, water mist, prefabricated piping, foam, gas suppression, and detection, and operates from its headquarters and distribution center in Sollentuna, supported by local sales, customer service, technical support, and logistics teams.
 



  





**The Role:** 




  





 The Country Manager Nordic holds full accountability for the regional business performance, including revenues, EBITDA, and cash flow in the Nordic region. As P&L owner, you drive profitable growth across all product lines and oversee all the operations, including sales, customer service, logistics, and technical support.
 



  





 This role combines strategic leadership with hands-on commercial execution. You are responsible for driving sustainable growth, strengthening market position, and ensuring operational excellence across all the functions.
 



  





 The Country Manager Nordic is responsible for defining and executing a robust growth strategy that combines ambitious targets with disciplined risk management, in line with EMEA policies. You act as a real entrepreneur, personally driving senior-level relationships with key customers and industry stakeholders Beyond delivering profitable growth, the role requires building, developing, and aligning the local organization into a high-performing, cohesive team positioned to operate at best-in-class industry standards.
 



  





**Key responsibilities:** 




  




* Own and deliver sales growth, profitability, and cash flow performance for the Nordic region
* Define and execute a clear market strategy to increase market share across all product linesand covered countries
* Build strong, senior-level relationships with key stakeholders: customers, consultants, end users, and industry influencers
* Lead and develop a high-performing local organization across sales, operations, and support functions
* Ensure best-in-class customer service and operational efficiency
* Adapt and fine-tune Viking’s business model to local market dynamics
* Provide clear market intelligence and strategic input to EMEA leadership
* Ensure full compliance with company policies, regulations, and local laws



  





**LEADERSHIP SCOPE:** 




  





 You lead the Nordic organization, reporting directly to the Managing Director of Viking EMEA, and work closely with EMEA Sales, Operations, Finance, and other central functions such as HR, Compliance, Product Management, IT, Marketing, and Business Development. Travelling is required for this role approximately 50%, depending on business needs.
 



  





 You will operate with a high level of autonomy and decision-making authority, consistent with Viking EMEA’s strategy and governance.
 



  





**OBJECTIVES**




  




* Accelerate market penetration and grow revenue and profitability across all product lines
* Develop and execute a mid- to long-term regional growth plan, suggesting appropriate enablers and investments
* Strengthen the organization to support scalable and sustainable growth
* Drive commercial excellence across pricing, product mix, and channel strategy
* Expand presence in both core and underdeveloped market segments
* Establish Viking as a preferred partner through key account and specification strategies
* Build a high-performance, engaged, and entrepreneurial team



  





**DUTIES:**




  





**MANAGEMENT** 




  




* Lead the regional organization with a clear vision and strong execution discipline
* Define and monitor sales, financial, and operational targets
* Structure roles, responsibilities, and processes to maximize performance
* Drive performance management, coaching, and talent development
* Ensure alignment with EMEA strategy and cross-functional collaboration
* Monitor performance against budgets and take corrective actions when needed
* Manage SG&A and cost efficiency
* Oversee contracts, framework agreements, and supplier relationships



  





**SALES & MARKET DEVELOPMENT** 




  




* Personally drive key commercial initiatives and major accounts
* Optimize sales volume, margins, and product mix
* Define and implement pricing and discount strategies
* Segment customers and tailor sales approaches accordingly
* Identify growth opportunities and develop business cases
* Monitor competitors and strengthen competitive positioning
* Lead key account planning and long-term partnerships
* Represent the company in industry associations and market forums
* Drive marketing and specification initiatives targeting end-users and influencers



  





**EDUCATION & EXPERIENCE:** 




  




* Business or technical Bachelor or Master’s Degree
* Proven track record in a Country Manager / Managing Director / Division Manager / Sales Manager or similar P&L responsible role
* Experience in B2B technical industries (fire protection, HVAC, construction, or similar)
* Strong commercial background with demonstrated success in sales growth and business development
* Experience working with contractors and project-based environments
* Proven ability to negotiate with large customers or distributors
* Experience in the Swedish market is essential -other Nordic countries are a plus
* Strong analytical and financial skills
* Fluent Swedish and English



  





**PERSONAL CHARACTERISTICS:** 




  




* Entrepreneurial mindset with strong ownership and accountability
* High energy, hands-on, and execution-driven
* Strategic thinker with strong business acumen
* Team builder and leader who develops people and organizations
* Strong negotiation and influencing skills
* Comfortable operating in a matrix organization
* Results-oriented with a strong customer focus



  





**Our offer:** 




  





 Stable company: for over
 **three decades** 
 , our company has stood the test of time, weathering economic shifts, technological revolutions, and industry changes. We are not just stable; we are a ship that has sailed through storms and emerged stronger. Be part of a team that values tradition, experience, and unwavering commitment.
 



  





 Package: we offer
 **competitive compensation** 
 that recognizes your expertise and dedication. Plus, enjoy the added perk of
 **exciting work travel opportunities** 
 that broaden your horizons and enrich your professional journey
 



  





 Great place to work: we are not just a big company; we are a close-knit community that spans continents. As you contribute to impactful projects, you will experience the best of both worlds: the resources and reach of a multinational structure combined with the warmth and support of a tight-knit family.
 **Grow your career** 
 with us, collaborate across borders, and enjoy the
 **advantages** 
 of a truly
 **inclusive and nurturing environment** 
 . Apply now and become part of our extraordinary journey!

title: Data Analyst
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 Are you passionate about leveraging data to drive business impact and take analytics to the next level? Join Mentimeter as our
 **Data Analyst** 
 , where you will set new standards for our analytics craft within the Data & Analytics (DNA) team and play a pivotal role in advancing our analytics capabilities to drive impactful, data-informed strategies for our SaaS-based business. Data is not only central, but crucial, to how Mentimeter will reach success.
   

  

 At Mentimeter, the Data & Analytics team is on a mission to catalyse our company strategy and drive innovation, growth and impact throughout our company and user journey by using data. We work at the intersection of analytics, data science, and business to deliver actionable insights and solutions that enable better decisions across departments, including Product, Marketing, Sales, and Revenue Operations. Your contributions will directly influence key business outcomes such as customer retention, engagement, and expansion.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll collaborate with and be supported by cross-functional teams of data scientists, analytics engineers, user researchers, product managers and revenue leaders who are passionate about Mentimeter’s mission and using data to achieve it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Partner with senior leaders and stakeholders to define key questions, success metrics, and analytical approaches that enable strategic decisions.
* Deliver high-impact analyses and decision support that connect insights across our functions and company.
* Be a key part of our Analytics team to align priorities and ensure solutions are relevant and impactful.
* Collaborate closely with Analytics Engineering and other close teams to enable the business to proactively act on data and create business impact.
* Elevate the analytics craft by setting new standards, implementing innovative approaches and best practices.
* Act as a trusted thought partner and mentor to analysts and stakeholders alike, raising analytical maturity across the organization.
* Translate complex business questions and analytical findings into compelling narratives and visualizations that resonate with diverse audiences.


**We believe you have**
* A minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience.
* Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to convey complex concepts through clear narratives and visualizations.
* Strong business acumen and experience applying analytics within a domain such as product, sales or marketing.
* Proven expertise in analytics and data exploration, with proficiency in tools such as SQL and BI/visualization platforms.
* A builder mindset and interest to create analysis and systems that scale, leveraging automation, generative AI, and data to drive Mentimeter’s growth and efficiency.
* Comfort working with analytics engineering practices and collaborating with data engineers on data models and pipelines.
* A track record of delivering high-quality, actionable insights aligned with business objectives.
* Experience partnering closely with senior stakeholders and leadership teams.


**Nice to have**
* Familiarity with modern data tools (e.g. Looker, Hex, Snowflake).
* Experience applying AI in analytical workflows, such as setting up AI agents or automation to accelerate analysis, insight generation, and decision support.
* Experience working within a SaaS environment, with a strong understanding of the unique business challenges and opportunities it presents.


**Not Required**
* Swedish is not required (as daily work is carried out in English and the Mentimeter team currently boasts 50+ different nationalities)


**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Dotnet Developer
description:
**About Us:** 




  





**AmpsTek –** 
 a global technology leader since 2013 – is transforming how businesses approach
 **technology and staffing solutions.** 
 Founded by seasoned technology leaders across the
 **UK, Europe, APAC, North America, and LATAM,** 
 and with registered offices in
 **30+ countries,** 
 we deliver
 **exceptional service, scalable solutions, and measurable impact.** 




  





 With a portfolio of
 **200+ clients** 
 and millions of users across web and mobile platforms, we empower businesses to
 **innovate, grow, and succeed.** 




**Join our team** 
 and be part of a dynamic, growth-oriented organization that values
 **talent, creativity, and results.** 




  





**Role : .NET Developer** 




**Location : Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid 2 days onsite/week)** 




**Employment Contract** 




  





 In the role of Technology Lead, you will develop design of applications, provide regular support/guidance to project teams on complex coding, issue resolution and execution. You will collaborate with some of the best talent in the industry to create and implement innovative high-quality solutions. You will be part of a learning culture, where teamwork and collaboration are encouraged, excellence is rewarded, and diversity is respected and valued.
 



**Qualifications** 




**Basic:** 



* Bachelor’s degree or foreign equivalent required from an accredited institution. Will also consider three years of progressive experience in the specialty in lieu of every year of education.
* At least 6+ years of experience with Information Technology.



**Preferred** 



* Experience in telecommunication domain.
* Technical expertise
* .Net Framework (C#, ASP.NET), L2/L3 support ,ITIL processes and ITSM tools (ServiceNow or equivalent), Handling 24x7 operations, critical incidents, Monitoring & observability tools (APM, logs, alerts)
* Familiar with latest trends in industry from technology and domain standpoint
* Experience and good understanding of IT SDLC lifecycle phases. Through understanding Agile principles and practices
* Strong business process/system analytical skills
* Excellent oral and written communication skills with ability to interact with technical and functional staff at all levels.
* Creative, innovative and able to work in a fast-paced environment
* Team Player
* Experience and desire to work in a Global delivery environment.



**Responsibilities** 



* Responsible for all codes delivery.
* Use XP practices like TDD/Pair Programming.
* Delivery of application code, functional test automation code, unit test code, integration tests, and service virtualization.
* Build and maintain test programs.
* System implementation including, but not limited to, gathering requirements, system solution design.
* Performing development activities including hands-on development, reviews and providing technical guidance to team members
* Interfacing with technical and business stakeholders – internal and external
* Configuration, customization and integration of application.
* Client interfacing and offshore coordination.
* Available to be on-call and support production issues.

title: Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare SCADA – Stockholm
description:
**🚀 "Bli en del av vårt växande IT-konsultteam" 🚀**
 "VIPAS AB växer och söker nya talanger inom IT-konsulting. Här får du möjlighet att bidra till innovativa projekt och utveckla din kompetens i en professionell miljö."
   

  

**"Om oss"**
 "VIPAS AB strävar efter att göra komplex IT enkel och affärsnyttig. Vi utvecklar skräddarsydda lösningar med de senaste teknikerna, inklusive Java och Python, och vårt kompetenta team inom mjukvaruutveckling och DevOps säkerställer att varje projekt genomförs med kvalitet, precision och innovation."
   

  

****Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare SCADA – Stockholm****
 🚆 Vill du vara med och utveckla framtidens kollektivtrafik i Stockholm?
   

  

 Nu söker vi en erfaren och tekniskt kunnig Projektledare / Delprojektledare inom SCADA till ett omfattande och samhällsviktigt projekt hos Trafikförvaltningen i Region Stockholm.
   

  

 Du får möjlighet att arbeta i ett strategiskt projekt med fokus på framtidens SCADA-arkitektur och moderna driftledningssystem inom kollektivtrafiken.
   

  

**Om uppdraget**
 Projekt RISTA syftar till att implementera en ny arkitektur för SCADA-system hos Trafikförvaltningen. Projektet omfattar utveckling och framtidssäkring av system som stödjer driftledning och tillgångsförvaltning inom Stockholms kollektivtrafik.
   

  

 Som Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare kommer du att ansvara för utpekade delar av projektet samt bidra operativt och strategiskt genom projektets olika faser. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med tekniska specialister, verksamhet och andra projektintressenter.
   

  

 Du blir en del av sektionen Tillgångssystem & Driftledning som arbetar med SCADA- och tillgångssystem som övervakas via Driftledningen.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Leda och koordinera tekniska delar inom SCADA-projektet
* Ansvara för delprojekt och säkerställa leverans enligt tidplan
* Delta i tekniska analyser och lösningsdiskussioner
* Samverka med interna och externa intressenter
* Stödja implementation av ny SCADA-arkitektur
* Bidra med teknisk kompetens och erfarenhet inom industriella styr- och övervakningssystem
* Hantera varierande arbetsuppgifter genom projektets olika faser


**Vi söker dig som har**
* Erfarenhet av teknisk projektledning eller delprojektledning
* Erfarenhet av SCADA-system och driftledningsmiljöer
* Förståelse för industriella styrsystem och systemarkitektur
* Erfarenhet från infrastruktur-, transport- eller industriprojekt är meriterande
* God samarbetsförmåga och vana att arbeta i komplexa projektmiljöer
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat och driva projekt framåt


**Uppdragsinformation**
 📍 Plats: Stockholm / Kungsholmen
   

  

 🏠 Hybridarbete möjligt enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 ⏳ Omfattning: Heltid, 40 timmar/vecka
   

  

 🔄 Möjlighet till förlängning: 1+1+1 år
   

  

**Utvecklas med VIPAS AB**
* "Att arbeta på VIPAS AB innebär mer än bara ett jobb – det är en chans att växa professionellt. Vi erbjuder flexibla möjligheter i olika branscher och attraktiva anställningsvillkor enligt Teknikföretagens kollektivavtal. Här blir du en del av ett kreativt och tekniskt kunnigt team som driver innovation inom telekom, fordon, detaljhandel och bank."


**Bli en del av vårt team**
 "Är du redo för nästa utmaning? Skicka din ansökan till
 **pooja@vipas.se** 
 och ta chansen att växa med VIPAS AB."
   

  

**Viktigt att veta**
 "Ansökningar accepteras endast från personer som har svenskt medborgarskap eller giltigt arbetstillstånd i Sverige."
   

  

**Ansök nu**
 Intresserade kandidater uppmanas att skicka sitt CV och personliga brev. Vi rekryterar kontinuerligt – ansök omedelbart för att inte missa möjligheten!"

title: Learning & Development specialist with a passion for creating impactful learning experiences | SEB, Stockholm (Temporary Assignment, 12 months)
description:
Are you an emerging L&D professional with a passion for learning development and a talent for creating impactful learning experiences? Join SEB as a Learning & Development Specialist and help unlock the full potential of people while driving the L&D agenda across SEB.
   

  

 At SEB, we recognise that the world of finance is evolving at an extraordinary speed. That's why we're committed to driving towards a more sustainable future for everyone — people, businesses, and society. Since we welcomed our first customer in 1856, we have been a catalyst for positive change by providing reliable advice and capital to people with ideas for the future. If you are ready to make your mark on our industry and positively shape the world, you will thrive at SEB.
   

  

 About the role:
   

  

 We are looking for a Learning & Development Specialist to join our team in a one‑year temporary position during a maternity leave, starting as soon as possible, with the possibility of becoming permanent.
   

  

 In this role, you will lead learning and development initiatives linked to our learning portfolio for client‑facing roles. Working closely with L&D colleagues, subject matter experts, and business stakeholders, you will translate learning needs into impactful learning experiences.
   

  

 You are self‑driven and collaborative, with the ability to work across the organisation and build positive relationships. Your experience in applying AI tools within an L&D context will play a key role in accelerating innovation and strengthening the effectiveness of our learning offering.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Proven experience (1-3 years) in Learning & Development, with hands‑on experience of modern LMS/LXP platforms.
* A solid understanding of Learning Design (concepts and tools) and Service Design methodology, and the ability to apply AI tools effectively in an L&D context.
* Strong collaboration skills and practical experience with MS365 tools.
* Excellent project management skills and the ability to work effectively with a wide range of stakeholders.


**What we offer:**
* Possibilities to reskill by shifting areas/departments and location
* A diverse, inclusive and equal environment
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-05-29. If you have questions about the position, please contact Markus Lind, markus.lind@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: FOREX söker Vikariat till IT-tekniker roll
description:
FOREX är Nordens marknadsledare inom resevaluta och erbjuder expertis och tjänster kring resekonomi. Vi hjälper våra kunder med att maxa sin reskassa, både i butik och digitala miljöer med hög tillgänglighet för våra kunder, något som ställer krav på både våra system och våra arbetsprocesser.
   

  

 Som IT-tekniker blir du en viktig del av vårt team som ansvarar för hela FOREX IT-miljö. På FOREX arbetar vi ständigt för att utveckla och förbättra våra tjänster och produkter, och som IT-tekniker blir du en del av detta arbete. Du är placerad på vårt huvudkontor Stockholm.
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Ansvarsområden Inkluderar**
* Ge teknisk support till användare via telefon, e-post och på plats.
* Förvaltning och förbättring av vår Office365-miljö.
* Arbeta nära tredjepartsleverantörer.
* Dokumentera IT-miljön.
* Hantera och lösa problem relaterade till hårdvara, mjukvara.
* Installera och konfigurera datorer, skrivare.


 För att lyckas i rollen krävs det att du har relevant arbetslivserfarenhet och har jobbat med IT-Support. Du bör ha kommit i kontakt med följande tekniska områden: AD, DNS, Office365, Entra ID, VPN, Windows-server, Windows-klienter.
   

  

 Meriterande kunskaper är JIRA,Powershell, Azure, intune och MAC-kunskaper.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är genuint intresserad av IT och har en god kommunikationsförmåga. Du är strukturerad, har en positiv attityd och har inga problem med att hjälpa till med det som behövs. Som IT-tekniker på FOREX kommer du att arbeta i en utmanande och omväxlande miljö. Du kommer att sitta i samma team som erfarna IT-drifttekniker och kommer få chansen till att bredda dina IT-kunskaper.
   

  

 Tjänsten är ett vikariat på heltid och placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Stockholm. Om du trivs i en dynamisk arbetsmiljö och har vad som krävs för att bli en del av vårt team, så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan till oss idag. Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

 Låter det som något för dig? Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om ansökan**
 Av säkerhetsskäl kommer vi att ta en kreditupplysning samt be om ett utdrag ur belastningsregistret innan anställning kan ske. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen vill vi att du som söker den här tjänsten genomför ett kortare test. Testet kommer att mailas till dig, du har sedan sju dagar på dig att besvara och slutföra testet.
   

  

 Frågor om tjänsten besvaras av Head of IT-operations & Infrastructure Michel Ådefjäll, michel.adefjall@forex.se
   

  

 Vid frågor till fackliga företrädare, Unionen, kontakta unionen@forex.se
   

  

 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl.

title: Intresseanmälan för praktik/LIA inom IT, Systemutveckling eller UX på Svea Bank
description:
Studerar du inom IT, systemutveckling, UX eller närliggande område och är nyfiken på att få erfarenhet i en modern, produktdriven organisation? Då är du varmt välkommen att skicka in en intresseanmälan till oss på Svea Bank!
   

  

 Vi tar löpande emot ansökningar från studenter som vill göra praktik/LIA hos oss. Om vi har ett aktuellt behov som matchar din profil och inriktning, hör vi av oss.
   

  

**Att göra praktik på Svea Bank**
 När möjlighet finns erbjuder vi praktik inom flera områden, exempelvis:
   

  

* Systemutveckling (frontend, backend eller fullstack)
* UX/UI-design och research
* Data och analys


 Praktikanter som kommer in till oss blir en del av ett team och får, i den mån det är möjligt, arbeta med verkliga case och bidra i det dagliga arbetet.
   

  

**Det här kan du få hos oss**
* Erfarenhet av moderna techstackar och arbetssätt
* Inblick i agila arbetssätt och tvärfunktionella team
* Stöttning från erfarna kollegor


**Vi tror att du**
* Studerar inom IT, systemvetenskap, interaktionsdesign, UX eller liknande
* Har ett intresse för teknik, användarupplevelse och digital utveckling
* Är nyfiken och vill utvecklas


**Om Svea**
*Svea är en finansiell koncern med över 2000 anställda och verksamhet i flertalet europeiska länder. Med mer än 40 års erfarenhet är vi stolta över att erbjuda innovativa och hållbara finansiella lösningar till våra kunder. Svea präglas av en familjär företagskultur där varje medarbetare bidrar med sin unika kompetens och engagemang. Vår företagskultur betonar gemenskap, handlingskraft, och balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Välkommen att följa med oss på vår spännande resa!*
**Skicka in din intresseanmälan**
 Berätta vad du vill utvecklas inom och när din praktikperiod är. Bifoga gärna projekt, portfolio eller GitHub om du har.
   

  

 Detta är en öppen intresseanmälan och innebär inte en garanti för praktikplats.
   

  

 Vi återkommer om vi har en möjlighet som matchar din profil och våra verksamhetsbehov.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

*Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen genomför Svea Bank bakgrundskontroller på slutkandidater innan eventuell praktik påbörjas.*

title: Project Manager
description:
**Assignment Description:** 




  





 We are looking to bring in a consultant Project Manager with a few years of experience from the management consulting industry, as well as knowledge and understanding of IT and SAP.
 



  





 We are seeking a Project Manager who understands both finance and IT and who will initially be responsible for driving the following projects:
 


* Set up an existing (smaller) company in SAP (currently operating outside SAP in another ERP system)
* Eliminate one day from the financial closing process by implementing a robust technical solution between SAP and our consolidation tool (Cognos)
* Create automatic pre-accounting for supplier invoices
* Establish governance (and overall visibility) regarding the archiving of accounting information
* Create clear role and authorization structures within SAP



 The Project Manager will receive expert support in the projects from stream leads and specialists within both IT and finance. Therefore, the main focus of the role is to coordinate and manage the projects and ensure successful delivery.
 



  





 The role will belong to the Finance Development unit (one of eight units within Group Finance) and will work across other units within Group Finance. You will report to the Head of Finance Development while also working with respective steering groups as stakeholders and requirement owners.
 



  





**Requirements:** 




**Must Have:** 



* At least 3 years of experience managing projects involving both finance and IT
* Academic degree or equivalent
* Fluency in English and one Nordic language
* Knowledge of SAP or similar ERP systems
* Structured and self-driven personality
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Ability to speak, understand, or communicate in more than one Nordic language
* Some knowledge or experience in change management



  





**Individual Qualities:** 



* Highly structured
* Self-driven and proactive
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to make things understandable for all stakeholders
* Solution-oriented mindset

title: QA specialist/Test automation engineer within Savings & Investment | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fuelled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

 Do you want to be part of an exciting journey developing SEB's future Savings & Investment solutions?
   

  

 Our customers have told us that our digital Savings and Investments-offering isn't good enough, and we are listening. Instead of a low ranking, we aim for first place in customer satisfaction. Our brilliant teams are working hard to achieve that, and now we are looking for a senior QA specialist/Test Automation Engineer who wants to join and is up for the challenge.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The team is responsible for developing and maintaining backend services for Savings & Investment area, and used by Internet Bank, Mobile apps and internal CRM-applications. Our main priority now is to develop the next generation of our API-platform. You will be a part of a highly motivated and creative team that works in close collaboration with our product owners, architects and other teams within Technology. We have an open culture where we help each other and drive the development of our area together. The team has a strong interest in new technology, and you have great opportunity to develop in your role as a QA-specialist/Test Automation Engineer.
   

  

 Our backend tech stack consists of:
   

  

* .Net Core
* C#
* ReadyAPI/SoapUI
* Git (Hub)
* Azure DevOps
* OpenShift
* GCP


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Worked as QA specialist/Test automation engineer for several years.
* Experience with testing backend services, APIs, integrations.
* A passion for quality assurance, test automation and TDD.
* Experience in working with different test tools is a must and experience in ReadyAPI is meriting.
* Experience in backend development.
* A personality who likes to be proactive with a strong sense of ownership and responsibility, someone who loves to work in a team and is eager to learn and share knowledge.
* A bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent is required.
* You need to be able to understand Swedish, but you don’t need to speak it fluently.


**What we offer:**
* Opportunities to design and develop automated tests from scratch.
* A team of experts that will support you.
* Existing tools, processes and infrastructure.
* Work-life balance and flexibility.
* Friendly and welcoming culture.


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than 20 of May 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Lena Fureman at lena.fureman@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
