title: Kundtjänstmedarbetare
description:
At Fiskars Group we are unified and driven by our common purpose: pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary. Join our team and seize the extraordinary opportunity to influence the everyday!
   

  

*Kundservice på Vita Brands Sverige arbetar nära våra återförsäljare och våra egna kanaler och är en av Vita Brands viktigaste bidragsgivare när det gäller kundnöjdhet och konkurrenskraft på marknaden. Kundservice är Vita Brands ansikte utåt och ska genom ett positivt och lösningsorienterat förhållningssätt skapa goda relationer med kunderna. Internt fungerar kundservice som en viktig länk mellan de olika avdelningarna inom Vita Brands och samarbetar aktivt med alla parter. Vi har nu en ledig tjänst i vårt team.*
 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Registrering och ändring av olika typer av kundorder
* Följa upp, koordinera och säkerställa kampanjer i samarbete med vår säljorganisation
* Besvara frågor från kunder och kollegor gällande produkter, produktkvalitet, tillgänglighet och leveranser
* Följa upp och spåra ordrar för att säkerställa leverans till kund
* Professionell hantering av alla typer av reklamationer från våra återförsäljare
* Underhåll av Vita Brands ERP-system: hantering av orderstock, ändring av orderdatum vid behov, radering av gamla ordrar med mera
* Administration och underhåll av Vita Brands Trade Portal (beställningsportal för våra återförsäljare)
* Bidra till vidareutveckling av kundservices interna arbetsprocesser, rutiner och samarbetet med försäljningsavdelningen


 Övriga arbetsuppgifter inom kundservice kan inkludera att stötta säljorganisationen vid olika evenemang och mässor, bidra aktivt till den övergripande utvecklingen av kundservice samt verka för ett gott samarbete mellan de olika avdelningarna inom Vita Brands Sverige och inom kundserviceteamet.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som
   

  

* Har erfarenhet av arbete inom kundservice, gärna från detaljhandel eller restaurangbranchen.
* Är starkt serviceinriktad och brinner för att ge kunderna en förstklassig service
* Har lätt för att snabbt sätta dig in i produkter och system och vill använda dem för en så effektiv verksamhet som möjligt
* Arbetar självständigt, är noggrann och har ett gott öga för detaljer
* Har god samarbetsförmåga
* Är proaktiv och strävar efter ständig förbättring och effektivisering av service gentemot kunder och interna processer
* Talar och skriver flytande svenska samt har god kommunikativ förmåga
* Har goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet av SAP är meriterande men inget krav


 Ansökningar behandlas löpande, med sista ansökningsdatum 24 maj.
   

  

**Last day of application:**
 2026-05-23
   

  

 At Fiskars, we value providing benefits that matter to you and cater to our diverse global workforce, no matter where you are in the world. While benefits may vary based on location, here are some of the incredible offerings you can expect when joining our team:
   

  

**Competitive Compensation:** 
 We ensure that our employees are fairly compensated based on industry standards and local market factors.
   

  

**Collective Agreement:** 
 We believe in setting the right standards when it comes to working conditions, we are therefore bounded by collective agreements that ensure a good pension plan, occupational and health insurance, parental leave and vacation days to mention some.
   

  

**Health and Wellness:** 
 Your well-being matters to us and we want to help you achieve it. We offer a well-being allowance (Friskvårdsbidrag) that covers wellness-related costs up to 4000 SEK per year.
   

  

**Work-Life Balance:** 
 We understand the need for balance in your life. Our paid time off plans and flexible work arrangements and policies are designed to accommodate local customs and personal commitments, enabling you to thrive in both your professional and personal life. We currently offer hybrid work arrangements where possible.
   

  

**Professional Development:** 
 We believe in nurturing talent and supporting professional growth. Through training programs, skill development initiatives, and learning resources, we empower our employees to reach their full potential.
   

  

**Inclusive and Diverse Environment:** 
 We celebrate diversity and foster an inclusive culture across all our markets. Our commitment to creating an environment where everyone feels welcome and respected remains consistent, regardless of location.
   

  

**Recognition and Rewards:** 
 We believe in celebrating and recognizing the contributions of our employees worldwide. Our recognition programs are designed to acknowledge exceptional performance and achievements, ensuring that your efforts are celebrated and valued.
   

  

**Vested Interest:** 
 Through our Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP), you have the opportunity to invest in Fiskars Group and become a proud co-owner, sharing in the success and growth of the company.
   

  

**Employee Discounts:** 
 We want to ensure our team members make each day extraordinary with use of our products and offer product discounts across our brands.
   

  

*Please note that specific benefits may vary based on local regulations, market conditions, and other factors. We are committed to providing competitive and meaningful benefits to our employees in every market we operate.*
***Pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary***
*Fiskars Group (FSKRS, Nasdaq Helsinki) is the global home of design-driven brands for indoor and outdoor living. Since 1649, we have designed products of timeless, purposeful, and functional beauty, while driving innovation and sustainable growth. In 2024, Fiskars Group’s global net sales were EUR 1.2 billion and we had close to 7,000 employees. We have two Business Areas (BA), Vita and Fiskars.*
*BA Vita offers premium and luxury products for the tableware, drinkware, jewelry and interior categories. Its well-known brands include Georg Jensen, Royal Copenhagen, Wedgwood, Moomin Arabia, Iittala and Waterford. In 2024, BA Vita’s reported net sales were EUR 605 million. Already 50% of BA Vita’s net sales comes from direct-to-consumer sales, comprising approximately 500 stores and approximately 60 e-commerce sites.*
*BA Fiskars consists of the gardening and outdoor categories, in addition to the scissors and creating, as well as cooking categories. The brands include Fiskars and Gerber. In 2024, BA Fiskars’ net sales were EUR 547 million.*
*Read more: fiskarsgroup.com*
 OBR1

title: Manager AI & Automation Solutions
description:
At Telenor Sweden, we are moving beyond AI experimentation to actual business value creation, integrating AI into the very fabric of our enterprise-wide processes. We are now looking for a
 **Manager AI & Automation Solutions to** 
 our Data Analytics & AI Team. In this role, you will hold the keys to unlocking true business value through the strategic use of AI. As Manager AI Solutions, you are the essential bridge between cutting-edge innovation and real-world application in one of the most dynamic sectors of the telecom industry.
   

  

**How You Will Make a Difference With Us**
 As Manager AI & Automation Solutions, you will play a key role in driving the development, delivery, and scaling of AI solutions across Telenor Sweden. You will mentor and lead AI & Automation experts to deliver high‑quality, end‑to‑end solutions aligned with our strategic priorities and seamlessly integrated into our IT landscape.
   

  

 You set and activate our enterprise‑wide AI strategy, defining the vision, priorities, governance, and roadmap in line with TnSE’s goals and the Nordic AI First program. You identify and scale high‑impact AI use cases from concept to production, ensure strong solution architecture, and drive innovation across teams. You will also lead & guide our RPA and Agents/Automations roadmap in line with evolving technologies and Google’s agentic framework.
   

  

 Through close collaboration with senior leaders and key stakeholders, you secure alignment and sponsorship to accelerate AI adoption. You uphold Responsible AI governance, ensuring ethical and compliant development, and guarantee that our AI solutions are robustly integrated for long‑term scalability and stability. Finally, you strengthen Nordic collaboration by promoting knowledge sharing and aligning AI practices across markets.
   

  

**Are you the one we’re looking for?**
 We are looking for a high‑energy AI leader with a strong belief in the transformative power of AI and Generative AI. This role suits someone who enjoys turning innovative ideas into robust, enterprise‑ready solutions on cloud platforms such as GCP and AWS, and who naturally takes ownership from early proof‑of‑concept to fully scaled solutions.
   

  

 Success in this role comes from combining strategic perspective with hands‑on execution. You navigate complex technical landscapes with clarity, connect architecture to real business value, and collaborate effectively across functions. Building and scaling next‑generation AI capabilities means being comfortable engaging senior stakeholders as well as leading diverse teams through change.
   

  

 Leadership is grounded in trust, clear communication and accountability. By building strong relationships and making change actionable, you create engagement and momentum. Curiosity, passion and a drive for continuous improvement come naturally, making this an ideal environment for someone who thrives in a fast‑moving, evolving setting.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Degree in Computer Science, Computer/Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field (e.g., Data Science, Physics).
* Proven experience leading AI/ML teams and fostering a high‑performance, value‑driven culture.
* Demonstrated success in building and scaling end‑to‑end AI and analytics solutions for real‑world applications across areas such as customer experience, operations, and commercial optimization.
* Strong technical background in AI, GenAI, and Agentic Automation.
* Experience managing complex AI/ML programs and driving cross‑functional collaboration across business, IT, and senior leadership.
* Excellent communication skills, able to translate complex technical concepts into clear insights for senior stakeholders.
* Extensive people leadership qualities and developing talent pipelines
* Proven ability to deliver business value through data‑driven innovation.
* Deep understanding of data architectures and secure data processing.
* Proficiency in English; telecom experience and Swedish proficiency are meriting.


**Our promise to you**
**We are better together.**
 Here, you’ll be part of a family-like and inclusive culture, built on strong shared values and leadership that empowers you with both trust and confidence. We believe in enabling each other to act and make decisions, while always having each other’s backs through ups and downs.
   

  

**We support relationships and societies.**
 Telenor plays a vital role in the society, giving your work a greater purpose. Every day, we create value for millions of people and maintain a customer-first approach where human relationships are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

**We make room for life.**
 Work from home up to two days a week, if your role allows it. The rest of the time, we create magic together at the office. Leadership based on trust and flexible working hours helps you balance work and life. We support you through every stage of life with our benefit package, including collective agreements, occupational pensions, wellness allowances, and customized insurance solutions tailored to your needs.
   

  

**We invite you to a career in motion.**
 Your development is at the center of our culture. We dedicate at least 40 hours per year for you to deepen your expertise, explore new areas, and develop your role. Through Telenor Academy and other learning initiatives, you’ll have the tools and freedom to advance your career. If you want to broaden your horizons, we are present throughout the Nordics.
   

  

**Apply today!**
 Will you take the next step in your career with us? We look forward to your application! We review applicants on an ongoing basis, so don’t wait, reach out today. If you have any questions or want to know more, feel free to contact the hiring manager Asad Khan at
 **asad.khan@telenor.se** 
**.** 
 Please note that we cannot accept applications via email. The last day to apply is Tuesday 26th of May 2026.
   

  

**Good to know**
 As part of Telenor’s policy, we conduct background checks on final candidates for all recruitments.

title: Kafka Support Engineer
description:
**Job description :** 



* Maintain and monitor the Kafka platform to ensure stable, secure, and reliable operations.
* Perform Kafka administration tasks, including topic management, broker configurations, partition management, and access control (ACLs).
* Provide Level 2 and Level 3 support to users, application teams, and developers.
* Troubleshoot and resolve incidents related to Kafka performance, connectivity, consumer/producer issues, and message flow.
* Analyze system performance and recommend optimizations for scalability, reliability, and throughput.
* Guide users and development teams on Kafka best practices, architecture, configuration, and usage patterns.
* Support deployment, upgrades, and maintenance activities across Kafka environments.
* Monitor platform health using observability and alerting tools to ensure proactive issue resolution.
* Maintain and update technical documentation, operational procedures, troubleshooting guides, and knowledge base articles.
* Collaborate with infrastructure, DevOps, and application teams to ensure seamless integration and operational excellence.

title: Solutions Architect (EMEA North)
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.
   

  

 We are looking for data experts who have a strong background in building data platforms and love to use their skills to supercharge data teams. Our team helps customers on their data journey with Snowflake, which is very fast becoming the central data platform for companies big and small. That means you will work on some of the most challenging data projects you can find, in a post-sales capacity.
   

  

 We are hiring a range of seniority levels, though we do not currently hire people without relevant experience. During the interview process, we will form a view on your current level of expertise and match it to our internal career levels.
   

  

**What we are offering:**
**We help each other to stay on top of the game** 
 and up-to-date with the latest features in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Snowflake had the biggest software IPO of all times and we continue to grow at a rapid pace, which means there is ample opportunity to change the future of data analytics by joining us. Not only will you work with Snowflakes latest and greatest capabilities, but also t
 **he cutting edge technologies of our partners** 
**.**
 Our
 **compensation package** 
 offers a very competitive salary, plus equity on top. We are looking after the work life balance of our employees, which means our annual vacation is at the top of the market. We also have Snowdays - have a look at
 **this LinkedIn post** 
 or other #snowday tagged posts from Snowflakes around the world.
   

  

 For young families we are offering
 **very attractive parental leave** 
 and support with adoption, surrogacy, pregnancy or infant care related questions. Private medical and insurance plans are part of our benefits, in markets where this is a customary employment benefit. Furthermore we provide strong private pension plans and other benefits, tailored to your country of employment.
   

  

**Who we are:**
 The Snowflake Data Cloud was built from the ground up for the modern cloud, which means we can easily scale from empowering small start-ups to the largest companies in the world.
   

  

 It is our mission to
 **mobilize the world's data** 
 , so that businesses can be truly data driven. We think it is important that our platform is easy to use, which allows us to power companies at all stages of the data maturity journey.
 **Here** 
 you can find examples of how we have helped companies in a wide range of industries.
   

  

 We have seen a tremendous amount of success with our platform and continue to grow at a very fast pace, both in Europe and worldwide. That means we are constantly adapting the way we work and input is welcome from everybody on the team, which gives you the chance to make an impact.
   

  

**What we do:**
 We are the service delivery team of Snowflake, which means we help our customers by
 **creating solutions that shape their businesses** 
 . Once our customers have made the decision to implement Snowflake, we accompany them in their journey with us.
   

  

 This journey might start with our migrations team, who help our customers to plan and execute the migration of their data to Snowflake. Or it might begin with a Quick Start consultation, where we simultaneously explain best practices for working with Snowflake and translate them to our customers' specific use case.
   

  

 After a period of time we might return to analyse our customers progress and provide further guidance. We might also look at specific topics such as their security posture.
   

  

 Other customers prefer a more continuous engagement with us. In these cases we stay with them for a year or longer, in order to guide them from the initial setup of the platform all the way to advanced use cases that solve their trickiest challenges.
   

  

**How we work:**
 We
 **provide guidance** 
 to our customers. For most implementation work, we partner with our customers' engineering teams or members of our partner network.
   

  

 While our core expertise is Snowflake, our platform is almost always at the centre of larger data architectures, which we help to design. Examples include architecting for GDPR or integrating with existing data lakes.
   

  

 In addition to helping our customers,
 **we help each other** 
 by answering questions on our internal Slack channels, writing content for our internal knowledge base or organising internal lunch and learn sessions.
   

  

 Currently we work
 **mostly remote** 
 , which has proven to be successful. While we do have region specific practices, we work with customers from across Europe. A consultant from Finland might for example work with a customer in the Netherlands. Internally we work together as a global team.
   

  

**What are we looking for:**
 People who have a strong background in building
 **data platforms** 
 and working on the surrounding data landscape. Some of our colleagues have a stronger background in
 **data warehousing, data engineering** 
 , while others might be more at home on the
 **data science or analytics** 
 side. The data warehouse is where we all come together.
   

  

 Our ideal candidate can translate vague business requirements into technical requirements, find the appropriate solution and communicate both its technical merits and the business impact to stakeholders at different seniority levels. We are constantly adding new features, so explaining new concepts is essential for our success.
   

  

 Since Snowflake is only available in the cloud, having experience of architecting solutions on AWS, Azure or GCP is a big plus. Similarly, having experience with data security, governance and discoverability concepts will be helpful in this role.
   

  

 While
 **SQL** 
 is a language everybody on the team knows very well, Snowflake is fast evolving to allow native integrations with
 **Python, Java** 
 and
 **Scala** 
 & with
 **Snowpark** 
 , if you have experience with
 **Spark** 
 you will definitely be able to put these skills to good use.
   

  

**DataOps** 
 or
 **DevOps** 
 for data teams is getting ever more important. Setting up
 **CI/CD** 
 pipelines with automated tests and rollback capabilities is an activity we regularly engage in.
   

  

**Bonus points to have:**
 We think Data Sharing will play a big role in the next generation of data cloud so if you are familiar with
 **Data Sharing** 
 &
 **Data Marketplace** 
 implementation that would be a big advantage.
   

  

 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Project Manager
description:
**Job Title**
 Project Manager
   

  

**Job Description Summary**
 The Project Manager is responsible for the end‑to‑end delivery of real estate development and fit‑out projects, including early technical advisory and Technical Due Diligence through completion and handover. The role represents the client throughout the project lifecycle and applies technical expertise and commercial judgement to manage scope, cost, programme, quality and risk.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Project Manager, you will take end‑to‑end responsibility for complex real estate development and fit‑out projects from early feasibility and technical advisory through delivery and handover.
   

  

 You will act as a senior, trusted advisor to occupiers, investors, and landlords, combining deep technical competence with commercial judgement and a pragmatic understanding of the Swedish real estate and construction market. You will be given a clear mandate, autonomy, and visibility - internally and externally - and are expected to take ownership, challenge assumptions, and drive decisions.
   

  

 This role is suited to an established project leader who wants to shape both projects and a growing service offering, while remaining hands‑on where it matters.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Take full project leadership across development, refurbishment and fit‑out projects, with accountability for scope, cost, programme, quality and risk
* Act as the client’s independent representative throughout the entire project lifecycle, from early technical and commercial advice to completion
* Lead procurement strategies and manage consultants and contractors in line with Swedish regulations and market practice
* Conduct and lead Technical Due Diligence (TDD) assignments, identifying risks, cost, constructability, opportunities and value‑creation measures
* Actively challenge briefs, budgets and solutions to safeguard client interests and long‑term asset performance
* Build and maintain strong client relationships, contributing directly to repeat business and new opportunities
* Support the development of the PDS offering in Sweden, including methodologies, market positioning and business development
* Mentor and support junior colleagues, setting a high professional standard through leadership and example


**Qualifications**
* Degree in Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management or equivalent
* Experience in leading real estate or construction projects in Sweden
* Proven experience working with occupiers, investors and/or landlords
* Strong knowledge of Swedish building regulations, procurement and construction standards
* Comfortable operating independently with senior stakeholders and decision‑makers
* Fluent in Swedish and very good in English


**Why join us?**
* A senior, hands‑on role where your technical experience and judgement matter
* Clear responsibility for projects, clients and outcomes, with freedom to act and challenge when needed
* The ability to influence projects from early technical assessment and commercial advice through controlled delivery and handover
* A growing PDS team with momentum in the Swedish market, where you help set standards rather than inherit them
* A pragmatic, professional culture focused on doing the right thing for the asset, the client and the long term
* Opportunity to work with international clients and access world-class global expertise


 INCO: “Cushman & Wakefield”

title: Corporate Development Manager
description:
* Solna
* Hybrid


 I'm interested
   

  

* Solna
* Hybrid


**Job Description**
 Adapteo is a leading space service provider in Northern and Central Europe. We help society thrive in an ever-changing world. With solutions based on our services and modular building concepts, customers get the impact they want with the flexibility of being able to transform, repurpose, scale up and scale down based on their changing needs. Our business model is circular and sustainable we aim to lead the industry on these topics to drive growth and make a positive impact on the world. Customer applications are in commercial and industrial offices, defense, health care, education, day care, and accommodation. In addition, we provide premium spaces for large events and exhibitions.
   

  

 Backed by Goldman Sachs’ private equity and infrastructure funds, we are expanding and growing rapidly. We are now operating in more than nine European countries and intend to further strengthen our business and market position in Europe through both organic and inorganic growth. To support this growth agenda, we are looking for an experienced Corporate Development Manager to join our Strategy and Corporate Development team.
   

  

 As a Corporate Development Manager you provide hands-on support and catalyzation to strategically important projects connected to our value creation plan. You work closely with management and the different entities in our Pan-European organization, contributing focus, energy and structure. You are key to practically and pragmatically driving the realization of Adapteo's ambitious growth and development agenda.
   

  

 The role reports to the VP Strategy and Corporate Development and you will be a member of the Adapteo Group Strategy and Corporate Development team. The position is based at our office in Solna, Stockholm (SE). Some Nordic and European business travel will be required for meetings and local support.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 In this role, you will provide practical and hands-on support to strategic and key operational initiatives chosen by our management team as well as local and functional business leaders. You will typically be involved in several projects at the same time across our portfolio. We care only about real impact and operate a focused and highly structured value creation model centred around a market strategy and target operation model, a full potential plan and defined value creation plan. The value creation plan is updated continuously and currently focus on operational smartness, industry leadership and customer proximity. In the role, you will get significant exposure to senior business leaders, group business functions and local business unit management. Projects span the whole value chain e.g. IT, operations, sustainability, commercial and finance. Working closely with business leaders and stakeholders, you will play a key role in ensuring that our strategy is up to date and sound and that we effectively build a
   

  

 strong organisation to deliver on it through the initiatives in the value creation plan. As a direct report to the VP of Strategy and Corporate Development, you have complete visibility into, and the opportunity to influence, our strategy and value creation plan.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include**
* Lead and support business projects across operations, finance, commercial and/or IT
* Drive impact from successful project delivery - from pre-study to implementation
* Support our business leaders with strategic and operational development capacity
* Manage stakeholder dialogues and internal communication about value creation projects
* Support, coach and develop business units in project management and value delivery


**Skills & Requirements**
**Your profile**
**To Be Successful In This Role**
* You should be an agile high performer with strong drive and integrity
* You have a structured way of working and solid analytical skills
* You thrive in a fast-paced environment where you get to use your social skills and creativity to get around obstacles and build strong relationships
* You are proactive, collaborative and committed and enjoy interaction and relationships with people in an international environment
* You are an excellent listener and verbal and written communicator with a solid consultancy toolbox
* You hold an academic degree (preferably M.Sc.) within business management, finance or engineering and have around 3-5 years relevant experience from e.g. management consulting or similar role, preferably in an international setting
* You already have a broad range of experiences from - for example - transaction services, organizational transformation, commercial excellence or business process optimization.
* Ideally you have worked both as an advisor (consulting) and in a more operative role where you have been implementing and delivering real impact
* You must be fluent in English. It is an advantage if you are also fluent in one of the Nordic languages


**We Offer**
 In this role you are given the opportunity to gain mileage and rapidly develop your own skillset and expertise while contributing to Adapteo Group's Strategy and Corporate
   

  

 Development function. Working closely with your colleagues and stakeholders, this is an opportunity to grow in your profession within an organization that dares to think new and that challenges the ordinary, encouraged by an highly experienced and recognized investor. We invest in our leaders and across the whole organization, and all seniority levels, we are supporting each other and sharing ideas and expertise in an open and constructive manner. For the successful individual Adapteo offers good career options and we have a proven track record of promoting people from the Strategy & Corporate development team to key internal commercial and operational roles.
   

  

**Application**
 If you are excited about the opportunity to join our team, please apply as soon as possible via the application link. Please apply by attaching your CV and by answering the selection questions. We do not accept applications sent via email.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding the recruitment process, please reach out to Talent Acquisition & Employer Brand Partner Sonja Paganus: sonja.paganus@adapteo.com
   

  

 We are looking forward to your application!
   

  

 Great Place to Work
   

  

* We contribute to a better future
* We accelerate together
* We are a solid company with a growth mindset
* We love flexibility
* Proactive, Collaborative & Committed


**About The Company**
 Adapteo is the leading adaptable space partner in Northern Europe. We develop, build, rent out and sell adaptable buildings for schools, daycares, care centres, offices, and accommodation. With our modular and circular building solutions, our customers can transform, repurpose, scale up and scale down based on their changing needs. That is how we build adaptable and sustainable societies (see our circular film here). Adapteo has a building portfolio of 1.6 million square meters and operates in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, Germany, Belgium, the Netherlands, Lithuania, Latvia and Estonia. We currently number about 600 employees with head offices in Stockholm, Sweden and Vantaa, Finland. A majority of our revenues is generated by rental contracts from the public sector.
   

  

 Adapteo’s core values provide a foundation for our business and our culture. Whether employee, customer or stakeholder, your experience of Adapteo should be of a company that is
 **Proactive** 
 ,
 **Collaborative** 
 and
 **Committed** 
 .

title: Senior Software Engineer - Platform
description:
We're looking for an exceptional engineer to build the entire platform that teaches cameras how to understand the world. You'll work directly with our product team to turn video streams into intelligent systems that detect behavior, understand context, and generate real-time insights.
 



  





**Most cameras record. Ours think.** 




 Preventai is the infrastructure layer that turns existing camera networks into intelligent systems — detecting theft, understanding behavior, and generating real-time insights across retail. We process video the way the brain processes vision: not frame by frame, but as a continuous stream of meaning.
 



 We're backed by serious investors, working with Sweden's largest grocery retailers, and building something that has never existed at scale before.
 



  





**What you'll actually be doing** 




 You'll own the platform. Full stack, front to back — building the applications that connect our Video Language Models to real stores, handling thousands of camera streams in production, and making sure it all works when it matters.
 



  





 You won't be writing code in isolation and handing it off. You'll be shipping. Designing, building, deploying, monitoring — the full loop, in a product that real customers depend on.
 



  





**You'll thrive here if you** 



* Ship both front-end and back-end without hesitation
* Have built applications with AI models in production — not just API integrations, but real architectural decisions around LLMs
* Know your way around React Native and mobile — our tech needs to work everywhere
* Understand data pipelines and can build ETL processes that handle real-time video streams
* Care about latency, reliability, and user experience — not just features
* Want to work on a problem that is genuinely unsolved at scale
* Have a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent experience



  





**Tech stack** 




 For Front-end:
 


* JavaScript, TypeScript, React (Next.js)
* Tailwind CSS
* Zustand for state management



  





 For Back-end:
 


* Python
* Node.js
* PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
* Prisma or Drizzle ORM



  





 Regarding Infrastructure & AI
 


* Docker, CI/CD, Git
* React Native (Expo)
* LLM integration: prompting, function calling, RAG
* DevOps fundamentals



  





**Nice to have but not required** 



* Experience with video processing or real-time data streams
* Computer vision integration — object detection, tracking
* Cloud infrastructure at scale — AWS, GCP, Azure
* Experience with WebRTC or streaming protocols



  





**What we offer** 



* Direct ownership of the platform at a company built around AI
* Hard problems that most engineers never get close to
* Funded and working with real customers at scale
* Stockholm office with a team that ships fast
* Competitive salary + equity



  





**Who we are** 




 We started this because we believe the world's camera infrastructure is sitting largely unused — and turning it into something intelligent is one of the most interesting engineering challenges out there. We move fast, we're direct, and we care deeply about the people we build with.
 



  





**Ready to join us?** 




 No cover letter — just send your GitHub, portfolio, or tell us about something you've built that you're proud of. We interview on an ongoing basis and recruit fast.
 



  





 Questions? Reach out on LinkedIn.

title: Senior Security Engineer - Enterprise Security
description:
We're hiring a Senior Security Engineer to lead and raise the bar for enterprise security at Spotify. In this role, you'll be hands-on across core security domains, IAM, endpoint management, networking, and shaping how we secure an increasingly AI-enabled enterprise. You'll build tooling and automation, define policies and guardrails, and partner closely with teams across IT, infrastructure, legal, and beyond to keep Spotify moving fast without compromising on security.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings solid professional experience in enterprise security, strong technical foundations, and a genuine comfort with AI, both as a tool to augment their own work and as a surface area to secure. Just as importantly, you're an excellent communicator who can translate security priorities into language that resonates across a global, cross-functional organization.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Drive the evolution of Spotify's enterprise security program by identifying gaps, proposing improvements, and implementing changes that balance strong security with a frictionless employee experience
* Design and build security automation, integrations, and internal tooling to scale enterprise security and reduce manual toil.
* Collect and analyze high-quality security data to improve detection capabilities and generate data-driven insights that shape the direction of the enterprise security program
* Define and implement security hardening, guardrails and policies for enterprise applications and SaaS platforms.
* Partner with Site Reliability, IT, and other Security teams to provide expert guidance on enterprise security best practices and drive meaningful improvements to systems and processes.
* Investigate, propose and implement changes to Spotify’s Enterprise Security posture across domains including: IAM, Single Sign-on, Endpoint Management, and Networking.
* Lead governance and oversight of enterprise security tooling, including password managers and enterprise browsers.
* Champion and enforce enterprise security best practices across endpoints, enterprise products, and network infrastructure, advising bandmates and teams along the way.
* Collaborate closely with IT, infrastructure, legal and communications to ensure a coordinated approach to enterprise security.
* Mentor and support the growth of engineers around you, raising the security bar across the organization.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have several years of experience in enterprise security at fast moving technology companies. Alternatively, you have deep expertise in enterprise systems engineering and are ready to transition into a security-focused career.
* You have demonstrated experience applying enterprise security principles across IAM, SSO, networking, and device management, and you understand how these domains interrelate to form a cohesive security foundation.
* You can think like an attacker and understand how to identify risks and implement countermeasures against threats that span identity, endpoint, network, and cloud boundaries.
* You have a solid understanding of the risks introduced by agentic AI in an enterprise context and you are eager to get hands-on identifying and mitigating these risks in our environment.
* You actively leverage AI tooling to augment your own work and are eager to explore how emerging AI capabilities can be applied to enterprise security challenges.
* You can critically evaluate tools, practices and procedures, and you're willing to advocate for improvements and change when you see opportunities or risk.
* You have an understanding of the current threat landscape, and want to be part of a team creating and implementing state of the art security solutions in a SaaS-driven enterprise environment.
* You communicate complex security topics clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, and you're skilled at building alignment across a global, cross-functional organization.
* You thrive in a flexible environment with broad scope and you're energized by the freedom to innovate and challenge conventional security thinking.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Platform Intern | Antler Sweden | 2026
description:
Platform Intern | Antler Sweden
   

  

 TL;DR: Be the right hand to the person leading our platform in Sweden. You'll start close, learning how we operate, supporting day-to-day execution across events and community, and earning more ownership as you go. You'll work alongside our founders, our team, and a network of leading tech companies, helping shape and execute the events and community work that make Antler what it is. It's a high-trust, high-ownership role. Some days you're shaping a fireside with a top founder; other days you're solving whatever needs solving so the day runs well. If that mix sounds like your kind of role, read on.
   

  

 Why Antler
   

  

 Antler backs the world's most ambitious founders from day zero. We're in 30 cities across six continents and invested in more than 1,500 startups — including a deep portfolio across the Nordics, where we continue to back ambitious teams at scale.
   

  

 Our Stockholm office sits in the heart of the city. It's where our founders build, where our community gathers, and where a steady stream of investors, operators, and ecosystem people pass through. Beyond the office, we run and co-host events across the Swedish ecosystem together with leading partners. You'd be in the middle of all of it.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Work as the right hand to our platform lead, supporting operations across Sweden and taking on more ownership as you grow into the role
* Help plan and run events, at our office and out in the ecosystem, from intimate founder dinners to larger events we put on together with partners
* Make sure the founders building in our house have what they need, day to day
* Manage communication and logistics across our community
* Help build and strengthen the Nordic founder community
* Pitch in across the Nordics team on whatever needs doing to strengthen Antler's position as a leading early-stage VC in the region


 What we're looking for
   

  

* Genuine interest in startups, not in the logo. You want to work with founders because you find that world interesting, and you can see yourself building a career in or around startups long after this internship ends
* No task is too big or too small. One moment you're prepping a founder session, the next you're solving something practical so an event lands well. You don't need a title to feel good about either. Roll-up-your-sleeves is a default, not a stretch
* You don't wait for tasks — you see what's needed. You understand what Antler, the ecosystem, and our founders need at any given moment, and you act on it. Direction is a starting point, not a requirement
* Highly organized operator. You run multiple things at once without dropping balls. Tight deadlines, shifting priorities, and ambiguity don't throw you off
* Strong communicator. Sharp written and verbal communication. Comfortable around founders, investors, and the people who pass through our doors
* Some foundation. Academic grounding in business or operations, and/or a track record of leading projects, organizing events, or building communities. Bonus if you've run something yourself


 What we offer
   

  

* A front-row seat to the Nordic startup ecosystem and the people building it
* Real responsibility from week one, with more autonomy as you grow into the role
* A network you'll keep long after the internship ends
* Hands-on coaching from a team of ex-entrepreneurs and investors
* A path to a full-time role at Antler for the right person


 Details
   

  

* Location: Stockholm
* Duration: 5-6 months
* Start: August 18th or Asap
* Commitment: Full-time, can be combined with studies

title: AI Engineer
description:
*Vill du arbeta i teknikens absoluta framkant och skapa AI-lösningar som gör verklig skillnad? Som AI Engineer hos oss på Länsförsäkringar får du vara med och utveckla robusta, skalbara och användarvänliga AI-system som stöttar både våra kunder och medarbetare. Hos oss blir du en del av ett innovativt team där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och nyfikenhet står i centrum.*
*Inom avdelningen Data & AI skapar vi nya möjligheter till proaktiva kundmöten och sömlösa helhetslösningar. Här kan du växa, utvecklas och vara med och bygga framtiden, på riktigt.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som AI-Engineer med fokus på generativ AI blir du en nyckelperson i vårt tvärfunktionella spjutspetsteam inom Data & AI. Vi bygger lösningar från ax till limpa och arbetar med hela livscykeln för våra applikationer. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta brett över alla lager i applikationen och utveckla din förståelse för hur moderna AI-system fungerar i praktiken.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med flera plattformar - både exponerade mot kund och interna system som används av våra medarbetare. En av våra mest centrala plattformar är vår interna GPT-lösning, som används av över 6000 medarbetare för att effektivisera arbetsflöden, beslutsfattande och kunskapsdelning.
   

  

 Rollen är fokuserad kring tre huvudsakliga områden:
   

  

* Språkmodeller Utveckla lösningar som använder språkmodeller och agentteknik för att förstå användarens behov, identifiera relevant information och fatta beslut kring hur denna information ska användas. Du arbetar med tekniker som retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering och agentramverk för att skapa kraftfulla och användarvänliga AI-drivna upplevelser.
* Databearbetning Bygg skalbara och robusta datapipelines som gör det möjligt för användare att ladda upp filer och extrahera relevant information. Du ansvarar för att konvertera, strukturera och lagra data i olika former, exempelvis objektlagring, vektor- eller grafdatabaser, samt bygga integrationer mot andra system för att tillgängliggöra information.
* Operationalisering Säkerställ att våra generativa AI-lösningar är robusta, säkra och skalbara i praktiken. Det innebär att hantera hela driftsättningen och livscykelhanteringen av plattformarna - från övervakning och felsökning till prestandaoptimering och rättighetshantering. Du ser till att lösningarna uppfyller de höga krav på säkerhet och dataskydd som gäller inom finansiell verksamhet och skapar förutsättningar för god observerbarhet.


**Vår teknikstack**
* Språk: Python, Javascript, Typescript
* Databaser: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis
* Frontend: React.js, Tailwind, DaisyUI
* API Gateway: Nginx
* Plattform: Azure Container Apps – planeras för Kubernetes
* Backend: FastAPI, Celery
* Lokal utvecklingsmiljö: Docker Compose, WSL, VS Code med GitHub Copilot
* CI/CD: Azure DevOps
* IaC: Bicep


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av backendutveckling, särskilt i Python och gärna FastAPI för att bygga API:er.
* Kunskap om databaser som MongoDB och PostgreSQL.
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar, gärna Azure, samt containerlösningar som Kubernetes.
* Vana av CI/CD och DevOps-arbete, gärna med Azure DevOps eller liknande plattformar.
* Förmåga att arbeta i tvärfunktionella team och kommunicera lösningar både tekniskt och icke-tekniskt.


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Celery och asynkron programmering.
* Kunskap om vektor- och grafdatabaser.
* Grundläggande kunskaper i React.js och Tailwind CSS.
* Erfarenhet av infrastruktur som kod (IaC), exempelvis Bicep.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av att integrera LLMs i olika lösningar.


 Som person är du nyfiken, självgående och har ett stort intresse för att skapa helhetslösningar. Du trivs med att arbeta i en dynamisk och innovativ miljö, är samarbetsvillig och vill ständigt utvecklas inom olika delar av teknikstacken. Du har lätt för att se helheten och gillar att bidra till att bygga framtidens lösningar tillsammans med andra.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Vi står inför en omfattande utveckling inom data och AI – ett initiativ som kommer att påverka både vår organisation och vår bransch under lång tid framöver. Just nu bygger vi ett AI center of excellence, där vi tar fram gemensamma plattformar och riktlinjer för hela Länsförsäkringsgruppen, driver på användningen av nya AI-lösningar och säkerställer återanvändbarhet. Genom detta center stärker vi både lokal innovation och gemensamt lärande, samtidigt som vi ökar kunskap och kompetens i hela organisationen.
   

  

 Som AI-arkitekt tillhör du vår avdelning Data & AI, men får också breda kontaktytor över hela Länsförsäkringar. Vi är ett av Sveriges ledande företag inom bank, försäkring och fondliv, och vi satsar stort på digitalisering och innovation. Här får du möjlighet att växa och utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor, samtidigt som du bidrar till att stärka hela vår affär.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter**
**Rekryterande chef:** 
 mattias.karlsson1@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Forena:** 
 jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:** 
 lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Teknisk systemförvaltare Medicinteknik till Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset
description:
Vill du vara med och driva utvecklingen vid ett av Europas främsta universitetssjukhus? Verksamhetsområdet Medicinsk Teknik (MT) har ett uppdrag att säkerställa att Karolinska Universitetssjukhusets vårdverksamheter har den medicintekniska utrustning som krävs för att ge vård i världsklass, idag och imorgon!
   

  





****Du erbjuds****



* möjlighet att vara med där det verkligen händer – på ett av Nordens största sjukhus
* en arbetsplats där du tillsammans med Karolinska Institutet är med och leder den medicinska utvecklingen
* att bidra till vår vision
 
 att bota och lindra imorgon det ingen kan bota och lindra idag
* en kultur präglad av våra värdeord: ansvar, medmänsklighet och helhetssyn.



 Självklart får du också ta del av våra generella förmåner  som Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset erbjuder dig. 
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 Verksamhetsområdet Medicinsk Teknik (MT) i Stab Teknik har fyra utrustningsorienterade enheter och en enhet för projektledning och verksamhetsutveckling. Verksamhetsområdet består av 120 anställda där enheten MT Bild och Funktion består av cirka 22 medarbetare. Enheten ansvarar för service, underhåll, installation och förvaltning av medicintekniska utrustningar och system. 
   

  





 MT Bild och Funktion hanterar avancerade tekniklösningar som används över stora delar av sjukhuset såsom datortomografer, magnetkameror, angio-utrustning, C-bågar, nuklearmedicin, ultraljud.
   

  





 Enhetens målsättning är att säkerställa effektiv och ändamålsenlig hantering av den medicintekniska utrustningsparken genom hela livscykeln. 
   

  





 Tjänsten är i första hand inriktad mot teknisk systemförvaltning av MT/IT-system inom bild- och funktionsområdet, exempelvis ultraljud, EKG, EEG, EMG, CTG, spirometri och tryckmätningar. Teknikområdena omfattar avancerade lösningar som används över hela Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset och i vissa fall även regionsövergripande.
   

  





 Arbetsuppgifter är allt ifrån installation, uppkoppling, integration, underhåll, felsökning samt support till verksamheter och kolleger. Det förekommer även rent administrativa arbetsuppgifter kring kvalitetssystem och utveckling av arbetsmetoder. I tjänsten ingår arbetsuppgifter inom bild- och funktionsområdet i samarbete med externa partners. Det finns stora möjligheter för egenutveckling inom Bild och Funktion.
   

  





****Vi söker dig som:****



* tar ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och driver arbetet framåt på ett självständigt sätt
* har god samarbetsförmåga och kommunicerar tydligt och professionellt med vårdpersonal, patienter, leverantörer och kollegor
* är lugn och tillmötesgående i ditt bemötande och arbetar för att leverera robusta och kvalitativa lösningar
* är kvalitetsmedveten, noggrann och arbetar strukturerat utifrån uppsatta mål och kvalitetsstandarder
* har förmåga att planera, prioritera och slutföra arbetsuppgifter även när flera processer pågår parallellt.



 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet och erbjuder ett arbete med stor flexibilitet, frihet och eget ansvar.
   

  





****Kvalifikationer****




**Krav:** 



* utbildning som civilingenjör eller högskoleingenjör inom MT/IT eller annat relevant område alternativt arbetslivserfarenhet inom den medicintekniska branschen
* erfarenhet av arbete med MT/IT-lösningar inom sjukvården
* mycket god kommunikativ förmåga, svenska och engelska i tal och skrift



**Meriterande:** 



* flerårig erfarenhet av arbete med medicinteknisk mjukvara och/eller arbete i gränslandet mellan teknik och vård
* erfarenhet av att arbeta med eller leda IT-installationer
* erfarenhet av arbete med sjukhusövergripande system
* erfarenhet av nära arbete med vårdverksamhet
* erfarenhet av underhåll, felsökning och reparation av medicintekniska produkter



****Om rekryteringsprocessen****




 Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande under ansökningstiden.
   

  





 I samband med din ansökan behöver du bifoga CV. Istället för ett personligt brev ber vi dig besvara urvalsfrågor samt kort motivera varför du passar för rollen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan - Tillsammans är vi Karolinska!
   

  





 Inför tillsättning av befattning som innefattar vård av barn och ungdom, kontrolleras den som erbjuds tjänsten mot misstanke- och belastningsregistret. Här kan du läsa mer om rekryteringsprocessen och om vilka kontroller som utförs på Karolinska.
   

  





  

 Som anställd på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset kan du komma att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om vad det innebär här.
   

  





  

 Om du är eller tidigare har varit anställd i Region Stockholm kommer vi att ta interna referenser från din nuvarande eller tidigare chef, om du blir aktuell för anställning.
   

  





  

 För tillsvidaretjänster kan provanställning komma att tillämpas.
   

  





**Om Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset**




  

 Vi på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset är stolta över att vi är ett av världens främsta universitetssjukhus. Förutom vårt särskilda ansvar för den högspecialiserade vården i Stockholmsregionen är huvuduppdraget att tillsammans med Karolinska Institutet utbilda framtidens vårdanställda och bedriva världsledande forskning samtidigt som vi fortsätter vårt arbete med att utveckla vården för patientens bästa. Vi arbetar inom en rad olika områden och professioner.
   

  





  

 Vår vision - Vi ska bota och lindra imorgon det ingen kan bota och lindra idag.
   

  





  

 Läs gärna mer om oss på karolinska.se och följ oss på sociala medier!
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Cyber Security Specialist
description:
*Det här är Rejlers* 




 Rejlers är en nordisk teknikkonsult med cirka 3 300 medarbetare och över 80 kontor i Sverige, Finland, Norge och Förenade Arabemiraten. Vi är Home of the Learning Minds – en organisation där lärande, nyfikenhet och innovation driver oss framåt. Med teknikens kraft och våra medarbetares expertis utvecklar vi lösningar som möter morgondagens utmaningar. Vi stöttar våra kunder i deras omställning mot ett mer hållbart samhälle – genom att minska klimatpåverkan, effektivisera processer och skapa långsiktigt värde. Rejlers befinner sig i en spännande tillväxtresa mot 2030, där vi utvecklas till ett ännu starkare, mer fokuserat och lönsamt bolag. Nu söker vi en erfaren Cyber Security Specialist som vill spela en viktig roll i vår fortsatta transformation.
 



  





*Om rollen* 




 Som Cyber Security Specialist har du en central roll i att skydda Rejlers informationstillgångar, IT-miljöer och digitala tjänster mot cyberhot. Du ansvarar för att utveckla och upprätthålla en säkerhetsnivå som möter verksamhetens behov samt efterlever relevanta lagar, regelverk och branschstandarder.
 



  





 Du arbetar både strategiskt och operativt i en verksamhet där digitalisering och AI spelar en allt viktigare roll, med ansvar för att säkerställa att utvecklingen sker tryggt ur ett säkerhetsmässigt perspektiv.
 



  





 Rollen omfattar ansvar inom:
 


* Infrastruktur och nätverkssäkerhet
* Identitets- och behörighetshantering (IAM)
* Endpoint- och klientskydd
* Applikationssäkerhet
* Incidenthantering och riskarbete



 Du rapporterar till CIO.
 



  





*Ansvarsområden & arbetsuppgifter* 




 Som Cyber Security Specialist ansvarar du för att utveckla, implementera och förvalta Rejlers säkerhetslösningar inom IT och digitala tjänster. Du arbetar både operativt och strategiskt med att säkerställa en hög säkerhetsnivå i organisationens infrastruktur, system och användarmiljöer.
 



 I rollen ingår att övervaka och hantera säkerhetshändelser, identifiera sårbarheter och driva åtgärder för att minska risker i IT-miljön. Du arbetar aktivt med säkerhetslösningar inom exempelvis endpoint protection, SIEM och identitets- och behörighetshantering samt säkerställer att system och plattformar hålls uppdaterade och skyddade genom effektiv patchning och hårdning.
 



  





 Du kommer även att delta i och vid behov leda hantering av säkerhetsincidenter, genomföra analyser för att identifiera grundorsaker och bidra med förbättringsåtgärder för att stärka organisationens motståndskraft mot cyberhot.
 



  





 En viktig del av rollen är också att stödja verksamheten i riskbedömningar kopplade till nya initiativ och förändringar samt säkerställa efterlevnad av interna policys och externa regelverk såsom ISO 27001, NIS2 och GDPR. Du bidrar till utveckling av säkerhetsstyrning, processer och riktlinjer och arbetar löpande med att stärka säkerhetsmedvetenheten i organisationen genom utbildningar och olika awareness-initiativ.
 



  





 Du kommer få möjlighet att gå utbildningar inom säkerhet Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP) samt Certified Information Security Manager (CISM).
 



  





*Kompetenser & förmågor* 



* Har relevant utbildning inom IT/cybersäkerhet eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Har 7 års erfarenhet av informations- och/eller IT‑säkerhet
* Erfarenhet att jobba i en större organisation och komplexare Cyber Security miljöer.
* God förståelse för säkerhetsstandarder och ramverk (t.ex. ISO 27001, NIST, CIS)
* Har god kommunikativ förmåga och kan omsätta säkerhetskrav till praktik
* Erfarenhet av molnsäkerhet, IAM, SIEM, SOC eller risk- och regelefterlevnad
* Mycket god kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga
* Meriterande är certifieringar såsom CISSP, CISM eller liknande



  





**WHAT YOU GET** 




 #PeopleFirst säger det mesta – på Rejlers tar vi hand om våra människor och skapar förutsättningar för dig att växa och utvecklas. Förutom ett roligt och varierat arbete blir du en del av ett kompetent och sammansvetsat team som värdesätter både glädje och hög kvalitet i leveranser till våra kunder. Du möts av en öppen och välkomnande atmosfär där nyfikenhet, förändring och samarbete genomsyrar verksamheten. Vi erbjuder dig en vardag med balans mellan arbete och privatliv, flexibilitet och attraktiva förmåner, med korta beslutsvägar och individen i fokus. Läs om våra fina förmåner här: Förmåner.
 



  





**Nästa steg** 




 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Rejlers med Active Search. Har du några frågor är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringskonsult Mia Wretborn-Hedberg på mia@active-search.se på 070 727 35 00 eller Fanni Orestav på fanni@active-search.se eller 073 852 79 63.
 



*Active Search AB utför rekrytering genom Search & Headhunting med fokus på specialister och ledande positioner, främst inom IT, Telekom, Tech. Med över 15 års erfarenhet har vi byggt ett stort nätverk av välmeriterade talanger, och kontakter, och kan genom vår flerkanalsstrategi på ett effektivt sätt finna lämpliga kandidater. Vi arbetar i nära dialog för att göra träffsäkra och lyckade rekryteringar, både för kund och kandidat*

title: INTRESSEANMÄLAN - STOCKHOLM
description:
**Vi på Nexer Tech Talent är alltid intresserade av att komma i kontakt med talanger inom tech som vill vara en del av vårt kandidatnätverk.**
**Vem söker vi?**
* Du som tar en examen under 2025 eller 2026 inom IT/tech-området.
* Du som är driven, engagerad och passionerad inom ditt område.
* Du som har goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.


**Observera att detta är en intresseanmälan för kommande uppdrag och talangprogram i Stockholm genom oss på Nexer Tech Talent. Genom att ansöka till detta jobb skickar du in en intresseanmälan där vi kan kontakta dig för framtida jobb.**
****Kontakt****
 Om du har du frågor eller funderingar är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsansvarig Molly Rytter på molly.rytter@nexergroup.com. Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via mail.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

**Om Nexer Tech Talent**
 Nexer Tech Talent
 *är specialiserade på att ge nyexaminerade techtalanger en ultimat start på karriären. Vi matchar talangers unika kompetens, personlighet och potential med ett uppdrag hos ett av Sveriges främsta bolag. Uppdraget varvas med en gedigen utbildning, mentorskap och sociala aktiviteter. Vi ger techtalanger en ultimat övergång mellan studier och arbetsliv och en brant utvecklingskurva mot en lovande framtid.*
*Vi är en del av Nexer Group – ett techbolag med djupa rötter i svenskt entreprenörskap och innovation. Tillsammans är vi över 2500 medarbetare i 16 länder som i mer än 35 år hjälpt våra kunder att ligga steget före både strategiskt, teknologiskt och kommunikativt* 
 .

title: Finance Project Manager
description:
**Assignment description** 




 Within the Group Finance unit at Customer, we will need to bring in a consultant as a project manager with a few years of experience from the management consulting industry and with knowledge and understanding of IT and SAP.
 



 We are looking for a project manager who has an understanding of both finance and IT and who will initially drive the following projects:
 



 - Set up a (smaller) existing company in SAP (which is currently outside of SAP in another ERP system)
 



 - Eliminate one day of bookkeeping by setting up a robust technical solution for the accounts between SAP and our consolidation tool (Cognos)
 



 - Create automatic accounting of supplier invoices
 



  





 - Create governance (and overview) regarding archiving of accounting information
 



 - Create clarity for roles and permissions within SAP
 



 The project manager will have expert support in the projects from streamleads and specialists in both IT and finance, i.e. the focus on the above project is to hold together and coordinate the projects and ensure that they are delivered.
 



  





 The role will belong to the Finance Development unit (one of eight units within Group finance) and work for other units within Group Finance. You will report to the Head of Finance Development, but will also have the respective steering group as "requirements setter".
 



**We are looking for a consultant who can start as soon as possible.** 




  





**Requirements** 




**Must have:** 




 At least 3 years of experience running projects where both finance and IT are involved
 



 Academic degree or similar
 



 Fluent in English and a Nordic language
 



 Knowledge of SAP or similar ERP systems
 



 Structured and self-driven
 



 Be able to use the office package
 



**Nice to have:** 




 It is an advantage if you can/understand/make yourself understood in more than one Nordic language.
 



 It would be advantageous if you have some knowledge in change management.
 



**Individual qualitites:** 




 Structured
 



 Self-propelled
 



 Communicative, i.e. making things understandable for everyone involved
 



 Solution-oriented

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Techster Solutions** 
 befinner i dagsläget sig i en spännande tillväxtfas och söker nu fler kollegor, inledningsvis dig med minst
 **3+** 
 års erfarenhet och som kan stärka teamet.
   

  

 Du kan förvänta dig en omväxlande miljö, dagarna kan se väldigt olika ut - men en sak är säkert, här får du använda dina kompetenser och sätter själv gränsen för hur mycket du vill utvecklas. Som ett kunskapsbolag är det viktigt för oss att våra specialister delar med sig av sin kompetens och får kollegorna att växa.
   

  

**Rollbeskrivning** 
 :
   

  

 Vi söker nu en senior Data Engineer.
   

  

 Uppdragsbeskrivning:
   

  

 Kund söker en driven och framåtsträvande senior data engineer till Digitaliseringsenheten. Enheten ingår i avdelningen för verksamhetsstöd och ansvarar för verksamhetsnära digitala lösningar som stöder myndighetens kärnverksamhet.
   

  

 Digitaliseringsenheten arbetar agilt i fyra utvecklingsteam och präglas av innovation, nytänkande och höga ambitioner.
   

  

 Som senior data engineer blir du en nyckelperson i utvecklingen och förvaltningen av vårt datalager och våra BI-lösningar. Du kommer att driva tekniska beslut, optimera dataprocesser och säkerställa robusta, långsiktiga lösningar som skapar värde för verksamheten samt analysera och lösa komplexa problem på djupet.
   

  

 Placering: kunds kontor i Stockholm men med möjlighet till visst distansarbete.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Designa, utveckla och underhålla datalager, ETL-flöden och SSAS-kuber för rapportering och analys.
* Bygga datamodeller i SSAS som möjliggör effektiva och användarvänliga Power BI-lösningar.
* Felsöka, analysera och lösa komplexa problem i datalager och dataprocesser, från rotorsak till färdig lösning.
* Driva tekniska beslut kring arkitektur, datamodellering, datakvalitet och optimering av kuber.
* Samarbeta nära verksamheten för att förstå behov och omvandla dem till datadrivna beslutsstöd.
* Coachning och mentorskap av kollegor i teamet, inklusive standardisering av kod och processer.
* Bidra till en insiktsdriven myndighet genom att identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter och föreslå nya lösningar.


 Krav
   

  

 Skallkrav:
   

  

* Relevant högskoleutbildning inom systemvetenskap, datavetenskap eller annan teknisk utbildning som bedöms relevant.
* Minst 3–5 års erfarenhet som data engineer med fokus på datalager, ETL, BI-lösningar eller motsvarande.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i SSAS (SQL Server Analysis Services) och erfarenhet av att bygga kuber, datamodeller och measures för analys och rapportering.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i SQL och erfarenhet av att skriva och optimera komplexa queries.
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft SQL Server on-prem, inklusive Management Studio och databasadministration på utvecklingsnivå.
* God förståelse för datamodellering och databasdesign (t.ex. 3NF och Kimball).
* Vana vid Git och versionshantering, samt dokumentation av kod och dataprocesser.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.
* Utvärdering av de personliga egenskaperna kommer att ske vid en eventuell intervju


 Börkrav:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team och nära kärnverksamheten.
* Erfarenhet av att driva förbättringar inom datakvalitet, datastyrning och best practices.


**Ansökan**
 Tror du att du är
 **Techster Solutions** 
 nästa stjärna? Tveka då inte att skicka in din ansökan redan nu. Urval sker löpande och tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Arbetsplats och kultur
   

  

 Vi är ett entreprenördrivet IT företag, med både produktkunskap och försäljning (Techster AB) och konsultativa tjänster (Techster Solutions AB). Det innebär att vi är mycket öppna för nya tekniska lösningar, kunskapsutbyte och ständigt lärande. Att ha roligt och samtidigt behålla den familjära andan utan hierarkier är lika viktigt.
   

  

 Vi vill skapa det konsultbolag som du alltid velat jobba för, men kanske inte hittat ännu. Redan idag har vi en blandning av seniora och yngre medarbetare, såväl som män och kvinnor. Det vill vi fortsätta att bygga på. Så välkommen med din ansökan!

title: 👻 Snapchat Growth & Geo-Storytelling Internship
description:
**FlavorScale is seeking a Snapchat Growth Intern to own the map. While Instagram is for the "aesthetic" and TikTok is for the "algorithm," Snapchat is where the real-time heartbeat of the city lives. We need a native creator who understands how to use Snap Maps, Lenses, and Spotlight to make FlavorScale the go-to utility for every Gen Z user in Northwestern Europe.**
**This isn't about polished commercials; it’s about capturing the "now." You will work directly with the Growth team to turn the streets of Amsterdam (and beyond) into an interactive playground of food discovery.**
 Who You Are
   

  

* Snapchat Native: You don't just have an account; you understand the ecosystem. You know how to make a Spotlight go viral and how to use Bitmojis and Lenses to build brand identity.
* Spatial Thinker: You understand the power of Snap Maps. You see a trending "Hot Zone" in the city and know exactly how to intercept that traffic for FlavorScale.
* The Raw Creator: You have a "Lo-Fi" but high-impact content style. You can shoot, edit, and post a "day in the life" or a restaurant "vibe check" in 60 seconds flat.
* High Agency: You don't wait for a script. You hear about a new pop-up opening in De Pijp and you're already there with your phone out before the doors open.
* Background: Studying Marketing, Creative Media, Communications, or a related field.


 Your Daily Mission
   

  

* The Snap Map Strategy: Curate and contribute to "Our Story" in key urban hubs, ensuring FlavorScale is the face of food discovery on the public map.
* Spotlight Dominance: Create high-velocity, short-form video content specifically for the Snapchat Spotlight feed to drive app downloads.
* AR & Lens Innovation: Work with our tech team to brainstorm and deploy custom FlavorScale AR Lenses that users can use when they visit our partner restaurants.
* Geo-Fencing Outreach: Help coordinate hyper-local campaigns that trigger when users are near our "Hot Zone" partners.
* Performance Tracking: Use Snap Analytics to measure reach and conversion, helping us prove the ROI of "Dark Social" before our 2026 Q3 funding round.


 The Opportunity
   

  

 This is a work-based internship that offers a
 **Masterclass in Social Utility** 
 . While we cannot promise permanent positions—as our key hires depend on 2026/2027 investment cycles—this role is a
 **Strategic Talent Pipeline** 
 . Successful interns who can "own the map" will be top-of-mind for Channel Lead roles as we scale worldwide.
   

  

 Specific Requirements
   

  

* Location: Based in Northwestern Europe (Remote-friendly, but a "boots on the ground" mindset for your local city is essential).
* Language: Fluent in English. (Fluency in French or Dutch is a major Plus for local community building).
* Tools: Expert in the Snapchat app suite, plus basic mobile editing (CapCut/InShot).
* Status: This must be a formal internship as part of your degree.


**The "Map" is Yours.**

title: Working student / Intern - Nordic Securities Services (Banking & Finance)
description:
**About BNPP**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. We operate in 64 countries & territories and have more than 180,000 employees worldwide.
   

  

 Our mission is to contribute to a responsible and sustainable economy by financing and advising clients according to the highest ethical standards. We offer secure, sound and innovative financial solutions to individuals, professional clients, corporates and institutional investors while striving to address the fundamental challenges of today regarding the environment, local development and social inclusion.
   

  

**About BNPP In The Nordics**
 BNP Paribas is the global bank with the strongest presence on the ground in the Nordic region. We have close to 1,000 employees based locally in the Nordics and offer our clients a wide range of services through our Group business units: BNP Paribas Corporate and Institutional Banking, Arval, BNP Paribas Asset Management, Alfred Berg, BNP Paribas Cardif, BNP Paribas Factor, BNP Paribas Leasing Solutions, and BNP Paribas Personal Finance.
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 Join the Nordic Securities Services team in Stockholm
 **as a working student/** 
 intern and get hands on experience while building a solid skill set you can carry forward in your career.
   

  

 The internship offers experience across a range of multi‑asset services helping clients achieve their ambitions in terms of both investments and cross border distribution. Our services are closely integrated with the capabilities of the BNP Paribas Group, including financing and global markets solutions. The internship is up to full time (60%-100%) for 12 months, giving you an immersive opportunity to learn about a variety of services, clients and markets, as a complement to your studies. Based in Stockholm, this opportunity provides interesting blend of global reach and local focus, letting you support Nordic institutional clients and take part in the origination of securities services mandates.
   

  

**What You’ll Do And Learn**
 You will support the Nordic Securities Services team in originating new mandates and managing existing business relationships. You will be exposed to a wide range of clients and projects. The role includes (but is not limited to):
   

  

* Gathering and synthesising financial and market information in relation to client activities.
* Contributing ideas on how internal AI and data‑science tools could be used to improve productivity in the sales process (i.e. quick data extracts, simple automation of routine tasks).
* Assisting the team in sales and account planning, including tracking client activities.
* Drafting presentations and memorandums for both internal and external clients.
* Attending team discussions and client meetings – you will be asked to actively participate.
* Working with the team on client projects, including procurement initiatives (RFI/RFP).
* Supporting global projects and managing sub‑projects independently, based on guidance from senior colleagues.


**Relevant Experience And Requirements**
* Interest in financial markets and a basic understanding of securities services.
* Curiosity about AI or data‑science concepts and how they might support sales efficiency
* Confident verbal communication and networking skills.
* Great multitasking and time management abilities.
* Team player who shows ownership and drives challenges to closure.
* Ongoing academic degree with an excellent track record.
* Analytical & quantitative skills are advantageous.
* Proficient with MS Office tools, especially Excel and PowerPoint.
* Excellent spoken and written English and fluency in at least one Nordic language.


**How to apply?**
 We are open for applications and will conduct interviews on a rolling basis.
 **We look forward to receiving your application latest on 5st of June 2026.**
 Diversity Statement
   

  

 As the Bank for a changing world, we truly believe that promoting diversity makes it better. We welcome all talents and empower them to prosper in an inclusive workplace. Join us and bring your full self to work with your own experience and identity!

title: Vikarie 60% i svenska och spanska ht 26
description:
Har du idéer för framtiden och drivs du av utmaningar? I Haninge får du utvecklas tillsammans med trygga kollegor som vill göra skillnad redan idag.
