* Lead Award - Erkännande av servicetekniker som tar in försäljningsmöjligheter
* Karriärutveckling


 We offer competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits and programs. We are an equal opportunity employer; all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, pregnancy, age, marital status, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any legally protected status.

title: Senior Category Manager (Indirect Procurement)
description:
**YOUR MISSION AT VOI** 




 As Senior Category Manager (Indirect Procurement), you will own and develop Voi’s indirect procurement for selected categories, from spend analysis and sourcing to supplier relationship management and cost optimisation. You will work closely with Procurement, Supply Chain, R&D, and other teams, as well as senior stakeholders, to secure an efficient value chain and reduce the total cost of ownership. You will play a key role in shaping how Voi partners with suppliers to support our growth and mission.
 



  





*You will:* 



* Set up an optimal structure for the indirect supply base in your categories.
* Drive cost optimisation and continuous improvement programmes with stakeholders, aiming for market benchmarks.
* Lead sourcing activities for indirect categories, proactively scanning the market for new suppliers and offers.
* Manage contracting, supplier relationships and performance evaluations, building long-term partnerships with key suppliers.
* Conduct negotiations with new and existing suppliers to secure availability in key and critical categories.
* Proactively identify supply risks and apply relevant mitigation strategies.
* Act as a subject matter expert in procurement, supporting the organisation with supplier development and procurement best practice.



  





  





**WHAT YOU NEED TO EMBARK** 




 You are a structured, driven, and collaborative procurement professional who enjoys combining strategic thinking with hands-on delivery. You build strong relationships, influence senior stakeholders, and feel comfortable challenging the status quo to find better solutions for Voi.
 



  





*You bring:* 



* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Engineering, Business, Economics, or similar, or equivalent experience
* Several years of experience in purchasing and/or procurement, ideally in an international context
* Proven experience leading improvement or cost optimisation projects with challenging deadlines, managing multiple tasks in parallel
* Strong negotiation skills, with credibility built through business insight and stakeholder management
* Some experience within IT procurement (e.g., equipment, licences, facilities) is an advantage
* .High level of independence, ownership, and accountability in driving results
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, presentation, and communication skills
* Proven ability to work with many stakeholders and projects simultaneously
* Proficiency in English; other European languages are a plus



 Don’t meet every requirement? If you are excited about this role and our mission, and have relevant, transferable skills, we encourage you to apply – even if you don’t check every box
 



  





  





**WHY VOI** 




 Working at Voi is more than just a job; our People Promise includes a personal voyage where you will grow as a professional and be a part of a team and culture that builds something meaningful for society. In addition to this, you’ll have the opportunity to:
 


* Join Europe’s #1 micromobility operator and one of the fastest growing scale-up
* Get “skin in the game” through our employee options program
* Enjoy unlimited free Voi rides and a dog-friendly office
* Work together with inspiring, motivated, and fun colleagues towards a common goal
* Join the micromobility revolution and be a part of creating sustainable cities made for living, free from noise and pollution.

title: Senior Scientist, Scientific Affairs
description:
**Bring more to life.**
 Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?
   

  

 At Cepheid, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.
   

  

 You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.
   

  

 At Cepheid, we are passionate about improving health care through fast, accurate, molecular diagnostic systems and tests. As a member of our team, you’ll get to make an immediate, measurable impact on a global scale, within an environment that fosters career growth and development. Our mission drives us to develop groundbreaking solutions for the world’s most complex health challenges. Together, we bring MORE change to the world.
   

  

 Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.
   

  

 The
 **Sr. Scientist, Scientific Affairs** 
 is responsible for activities pertaining to our participation in proficiency testing surveys and complaint investigations with the purpose to support internal and external customers as well as internal surveillance processes for current and future products. Approximately 10-20% of time will be spent in the laboratory.
   

  

 This position reports to the Vice President of Scientific Affairs and is part of the Scientific Affairs team located in Solna, Sweden and will be an on-site role.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Investigate escalated complaints with regards to discrepant results and other performance issues with patient samples, proficiency samples and control materials and communicate the results to internal and external customers. This may involve using microbiological techniques.
* Maintain and develop the DW lab investigation process in Solna.
* Plan and develop the annual PT/EQA participation to enable our support of Post Market Surveillance and customers for our current and future products.
* Perform Post Market Surveillance activities pertaining to PT/EQA.
* Perform laboratory testing and result analysis for purpose of compatibility testing of Cepheid current and future products.
* Sustain and develop relationships with PT/EQA vendors.
* Draft and update customer facing documents related to Scientific Affairs activities.
* Support laboratory maintenance, inventory and routines as needed.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams such as Medical Affairs, Technical Support, Global Product Support, Failure Investigation, Post-Market Quality etc. as needed for troubleshooting or investigating cases regarding specimens and clinical results.


**The Essential Requirements Of The Job Include**
* Bachelor’s degree in Life Science or Clinical/Medical Laboratory Science with 5+ years of related work experience OR Master’s degree in Life Science or Clinical/Medical Laboratory Science with 3+ years of related work experience.
* 3+ years of experience in position doing work task of scientific laboratory or investigatory tasks
* Fluent written and spoken english


**Travel Requirements**
 Ability to travel – <10% , overnight, global
   

  

**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
* Performing microbiological tests
* Working in a biosafety level 3 laboratory


 Cepheid, a Danaher operating company, offers a broad array of comprehensive, competitive benefit programs that add value to our lives. Whether it’s a health care program or paid time off, our programs contribute to life beyond the job. Check out our benefits at Danaher Benefits Info.
   

  

 Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

title: Produktchef Inlåning
description:
Vill du ta ett helhetsansvar för inlåningsaffären i en modern finansmiljö?
 



 Vi söker nu en Produktchef Inlåning som vill ta ett tydligt ägarskap för vår inlåningsverksamhet – från kundresa och produktutveckling till regelefterlevnad, systemförvaltning och betalningsflöden. Rollen är central i bolaget och passar dig som kombinerar starkt affärssinne med djup kunskap om betalningar och finansiella flöden.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Produktchef Inlåning har du det övergripande ansvaret för bolagets inlåningsprodukter och tillhörande tjänster. Du ansvarar för hela livscykeln – strategi, förvaltning, utveckling och uppföljning – samt säkerställer att verksamheten bedrivs i linje med externa regelverk och interna policys. Rollen omfattar även ansvar för bolagets betalningstjänster.
 



 Du samarbetar nära IT, affär, compliance, risk och externa partners och rapporterar till CIO.
 



  





**Ditt ansvar i korthet** 



* Övergripande ansvar för bolagets inlåningsverksamhet och tillhörande kundresor (egen och via samarbeten)
* Systemansvar för IT-system kopplade till inlåning och betalningar
* Ansvar för produktutveckling, förvaltning och vidareutveckling av inlåningsprodukter
* Uppföljning och ansvar för bolagets betalningar
* Processägare för inlåning, inklusive incident- och avvikelsehantering
* Säkerställa regelefterlevnad inom området (inlåning, betalningar, AML, operativa risker m.m.)
* Ägare av dialog och uppföljning gentemot samarbetspartners och leverantörer
* Driva affärsinitiativ med fokus på lönsamhet, skalbarhet och kundvärde



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som är en affärsdriven produktledare med stark förmåga att kombinera strategi och operativt genomförande i en reglerad miljö.
 



 Du har:
 


* Gedigen erfarenhet av produktansvar inom bank eller finansiell verksamhet, gärna kopplat till sparande/inlåning
* Djup kunskap om betalningar, betalningsflöden och närliggande system
* Stark förståelse för regelverk och regelefterlevnad inom finansiella tjänster
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta nära IT och fungera som kravställare mot systemleverantörer
* Ett tydligt affärssinne och vana att prioritera mellan kundnytta, risk, kostnad och intäkt
* Förmåga att leda tvärfunktionellt och ta tydligt ägarskap



 Meriterande är erfarenhet från:
 


* Tjänster inom in- och utbetalningar, konton, clearing eller liknande
* Samarbetsmodeller med externa partners
* Finansiell produktutveckling i tillväxt- eller förändringsfaser



  





**Varför oss?** 




 Hos oss får du:
 


* Ett strategiskt viktigt mandat med reellt inflytande
* Möjlighet att forma och utveckla inlånings- och betalningsaffären långsiktigt
* Nära samarbete med beslutsfattare i en organisation med höga ambitioner
* En kombination av affär, teknik och regelefterlevnad – på riktigt



  





**Processen** 



* Urval sker löpande, så ansök redan idag. Frågor ställer du i ansökningsflödet. Vänligen observera att vi inte tar emot ansökningar via mejl.

title: Power Platform Management Consultant | Modern Workplace
description:
Unlock the potential of Power Platform as a visionary engineer, transforming challenges into cutting-edge solutions. Embrace continuous learning and collaborate with global teams to shape the future of technology-driven excellence. Join us at Avanade, where creativity, innovation, and career growth thrive.
   

  

 Are you a visionary Power Platform Engineer with a track record of designing and implementing cutting-edge solutions? You thrive on transforming business challenges into powerful automated solutions, and your attention to detail sets you apart. Embrace your passion for continuous learning and seize the opportunity to deliver top-tier results under pressure. Join us as we shape the future with technology-driven excellence!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 As a Power Platform Management Consultant, your focus is on Power Platform solutions within the Workplace services field. Day to day you will design and implement Power Platform applications to meet client requirements. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams under challenging circumstances to deliver high-quality solutions. You will apply your expertise in the Power Platform and Microsoft 365 suite of products translating business requirements into technical deliverables, estimating and managing timing, workforce and demand supply process, and addressing task backlog as well as unit testing phasis for continuous improvement of client solutions. You will share best practices for Power Platform solutions with global Avanade team members and attend partner events for knowledge and delivery model sharing.
   

  

**You Have Previous And Solid Experience With**
* Designing and developing Power Automate flows.
* Applying strong business analysis methodology and requirements-gathering skills.
* Implementing agile development practices.
* Showing a critical thinking problem-solving and troubleshooting skills approach.
* Creating, analyzing, and visualizing data with Power BI.
* Using Dataverse with Power Platform solutions.
* Securing apps and data with the latest and most robust techniques.


**Qualifications**
 You’re a natural communicator who wants to help our partners on their Power Platform implementation journey. You will help improve employee mobility, efficiency, teamwork, and security demonstrating your experience in Microsoft 365 suite. Your interpersonal and communication skills help technical and non-technical clients engage with often complex information.
   

  

**Characteristics That Can Spell Success For This Role Are**
* Embrace challenges with a keen intellect and a thirst for knowledge.
* Collaborate seamlessly, fostering open and effective communication.
* Embrace creativity and explore groundbreaking solutions.
* Stay ahead of the curve, anticipating what lies ahead and adapting to the latest advancements.


**Some Of The Best Things About Working At Avanade**
* Opportunity to work for Microsoft’s Global Alliance Partner of the Year (14 years)


 As you bring your skills and abilities to Avanade, you’ll get distinctive experiences, limitless learning, and ambitious growth in return. As we continue to build our diverse and inclusive culture, we become even more innovative and creative, helping us better serve our clients and communities. You’ll join a community of smart, supportive collaborators to lift, mentor, and guide you, and to lean on your expertise. You get a company purpose-built for business-critical, leading-edge technology solutions, committed to improving the way humans work, interact, and live. It’s all here, so take a closer look!
   

  

**Together We Do What Matters.**
 We work hard to provide an inclusive, diverse culture with a deep sense of belonging for all our employees. Visit our Inclusion & Diversity page.
   

  

 Create a future for our people that focuses on
   

  

* Expanding your thinking
* Experimenting courageously
* Learning and pivoting


 Inspire greatness in our people by
   

  

* Empowering every voice
* Encouraging boldness
* Celebrating progress


 Accelerate the impact of our people by
   

  

* Amazing the client
* Prioritizing what matters
* Acting as one

title: Mid-Market Account Executive - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Overview Of The Role**
 As a Mid Market Account Executive at Salesforce in Sweden, you will own a named set of mid-market accounts — acting as a trusted digital advisor and the central point of coordination across the full Salesforce AI CRM and Agentforce platform. You will work closely with co-prime product specialists, solution architects, and sales engineers to map account strategies and help customers solve their most pressing business challenges. This is a role for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution and a genuine curiosity for technology.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own the full sales cycle across a named set of mid-market accounts in Sweden, from opportunity identification and account planning through to deal closure and customer success
* Act as the central coordinator of internal resources — including co-primes, solution architects, and sales engineers — to build and execute the right strategy for each customer
* Develop deep understanding of each customer's business challenges and goals, translating these into compelling Salesforce and Agentforce solutions that deliver measurable value
* Build and maintain trusted relationships with current and prospective customers, evangelising the full Salesforce platform and identifying expansion opportunities


**Required Qualifications**
* Demonstrated track record of quota attainment in a technology solution sales role, with experience across the full sales cycle including account planning, discovery, solutioning, and commercial negotiation
* Strong communication skills with the ability to engage clearly and effectively with stakeholders at all levels using written, verbal, and presentation formats
* Proven ability to work within and coordinate a team selling motion, aligning internal and partner resources to support deal progression and customer outcomes
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the right to work in Sweden


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Formal sales methodology training or certification
* Experience developing strategic alliances or managing partner-involved sales cycles
* Degree or equivalent relevant experience; backgrounds will be evaluated based on core competencies for the role (e.g. extracurricular leadership, military experience, volunteer roles, work experience)


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Integration Architect / Lead
description:
**About Curoflow** 




 Curoflow is building the operating system for European private healthcare. Our platform gives SME clinics everything they need to run their practice — from digital patient intake and video consultations to EHR, e-prescriptions, lab integrations, and AI-powered clinical support — in a single, CE-marked, GDPR-compliant solution.
 



  





 We are 25 people today, operating customers across 9 geographic markets and we are getting ready to scale to ~70 employees across 5 core markets — and beyond — within ~18 months.
 



  





**We Are Hiring Across the Organisation** 




 This job ad is one of many we are releasing simultaneously. We are building multiple teams in parallel — product, engineering, commercial, operations, and leadership — as we enter the most defining chapter in our company’s history.
 



  





 While we are publishing these roles now (May 2026), we expect most hires for this wave to begin working between September and November 2026. We will take the time we need to find the right person for each role. We would rather wait for the right fit than rush to fill a seat.
 



  





**What Kind of Person We Are Looking For** 




 Let’s keep it simple. Curoflow is a start-up that will be having growth pains — with everything that entails. You will be judged first and foremost by your character. If you are applying for this job thinking it is just any other job, you would be wrong.
 



  





 We will demand a growth mindset and someone who is deeply committed to our goals. You will be compensated accordingly, but we must stress that we are looking for the type of person whose motivation primarily comes from earning stock options and being part of building a great company.
 



 In return you will get that rare, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity that can mark a lifelong memory of what you were part of building.
 



  





**The Role: Integration Architect / Lead** 




 Curoflow operates across multiple European healthcare markets, each with its own lab systems, e-prescription networks, billing providers, and clinical registries. The Integration Architect is the person who turns this complexity into a repeatable, scalable pattern.
 



  





 You will design and own Curoflow’s Integration SDK — the shared framework that allows our market-specific integration engineers to connect any new country’s health infrastructure in weeks, not months. You will set the architectural standards, define the API contracts, and ensure that every integration we build follows a modular, testable, and maintainable pattern.
 



  





 This is a hands-on technical leadership role. You will review code, and mentor the integration engineers who join for each new market. Together with a dedicated "API-team", you will also ensure third-party developers can build on Curoflow’s integration layer. You report to the CTO and work closely with Product Managers, Country Managers and the Head of Quality to ensure every integration meets regulatory requirements.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




***First 6–12 Months***




 • Audit existing integrations (labs, e-Rx, accounting) and refactor into the modular Integration SDK pattern
 



 • Define the standard integration architecture: adapter pattern, error handling, retry logic, data mapping, and monitoring
 



 • Build the Integration SDK that market engineers will use to implement country-specific integrations
 



 • Lead the Denmark and UK integration efforts alongside dedicated market integration engineers
 



 • Establish integration testing frameworks and CI/CD pipelines for integration modules
 



 • Create documentation and onboarding materials so new integration engineers can be productive within their first sprint
 



 • Collaborate with the Open APIs team to ensure third-party developers can build on Curoflow’s integration layer
 



  





***As We Scale (12–24 Months)***




 • Extend the SDK to support the self-service integration marketplace (plug-and-play activation by clinic owners)
 



 • Onboard and mentor integration engineers for several new country market entries
 



 • Reduce new-market integration time from 8 weeks to 3 weeks through SDK maturity and pattern reuse
 



 • Own the integration partner relationships from a technical perspective — lab providers, e-Rx networks, billing systems, etc
 



  





**Who You Are** 




 • 7+ years in software engineering with at least 3 years focused on integrations, APIs, or platform architecture
 



 • Deep experience designing and building integration frameworks, SDKs, or middleware in a multi-system environment
 



 • Strong understanding of healthcare data standards (HL7 FHIR, DICOM, or similar) is a significant advantage
 



 • Experience with multi-market or multi-tenant architectures where the same platform serves different regulatory environments
 



 • Hands-on knowledge: you don't necessarily write production code, but your knowledge is such so that you could do it
 



 • Track record of mentoring engineers and establishing technical standards that others follow
 



 • Fluent English; experience working with distributed teams across European markets
 



  





**Preferably** 




 • Direct experience with Nordic or European healthcare integrations (Swedish 1177/Inera, Danish Sundhedsdatastyrelsen and similar)
 



 • Background in healthtech, medtech, or other regulated software environments
 



 • Experience with event-driven architectures, message queues, and asynchronous integration patterns
 



  





**Why This Role Matters** 




 Every new dedicated market Curoflow enters depends on integrations working reliably from day one. You are the person who determines whether we can enter a new country in 3 weeks or 3 months. You will also be highly important to ensure third-party developers can build on Curoflow’s integration layer.
 



 This role is the technical backbone of our European expansion.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 • A high-impact role where your work directly shapes how Curoflow scales across Europe
 



 • Real ownership — you will own your domain, not just execute someone else’s plan
 



 • Direct access to leadership and the ability to influence product and company direction
 



 • A product and mission that genuinely matters — we are making healthcare more accessible across Europe
 



 • Equity participation (stock options) post probation period, because we want everyone to share in what we are building
 



 • A collaborative, low-ego culture where people care deeply about what they’re building
 



 • Expected start date: September–November 2026
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 Send your CV and a short cover letter explaining why this role excites you. We value substance over polish — tell us what you’ve built, not just where you’ve worked.
 



  





*FYI: We are hiring for many roles simultaneously and are committed to finding the right person for each one — not the fastest. Please bear with us if our response times are longer than usual; we promise every application will be reviewed.*

title: Analytiker till Musts säkerhetskontor
description:
**Vill du ha ett meningsfullt arbete och bidra till ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker värld?**
 Det förändrade omvärldsläget medför att vårt försvar behöver förstärkas och den ökade underrättelseverksamheten mot Sverige och Försvarsmakten är omfattande. Militära underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten (Must) bedriver försvarsunderrättelseverksamhet och militär underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänst till stöd för svensk utrikes-, försvars- och säkerhetspolitik samt i övrigt för kartläggning av yttre hot mot Sverige.
   

  

**Vårt erbjudande** 
 Vi erbjuder ett viktigt och stimulerande arbete där du dagligen bidrar till Sveriges säkerhet. Vi erbjuder också mycket goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling. Hos oss finns det friskvårdsmöjligheter som inkluderar träning tre timmar i veckan på arbetstid samt möjlighet att ha balans mellan fritid och arbete.
   

  

**Om Säkerhetskontoret vid Must**
 Den militära säkerhetstjänsten ska skydda mot säkerhetshotande verksamhet i form av främmande underrättelseverksamhet, sabotage, subversion, kriminalitet och terrorism. Säkerhetskontoret vid Must leder och utvecklar Försvarsmaktens säkerhetsskydd och stödjer utvecklingen av den militära säkerhetstjänsten, försvarssektorns säkerhetsskydd och totalförsvarets signalskydd.
   

  

 Säkerhetsskyddstjänsten arbetar förebyggande så att verksamhet som är av betydelse för Sveriges säkerhet inte ska kunna påverkas av en antagonist samt att uppgifter som omfattas av sekretess och som rör Sveriges säkerhet inte röjs. Säkerhetskontoret arbetar också med bedömningar för att säkerställa att endast personer som är pålitliga ur säkerhetssynpunkt deltar i verksamhet som har betydelse för Sveriges säkerhet. Organisatoriskt tillhör Must Försvarsmaktens högkvarter.
   

  

 Befattningen är placerad vid säkerhetskontorets säkerhetsskyddsavdelning där du genom analys av kvalitativ och kvantitativ data bidrar till att inrikta Försvarsmaktens säkerhetsskydd.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
* För tjänsten relevant akademisk och/eller likvärdig utbildning
* Erfarenhet av strukturering och bearbetning av data
* God förmåga och erfarenhet av arbete med relationsdatabaser
* Goda kunskaper inom områden som underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänst, säkerhetsskydd, eller totalförsvar
* God förmåga att omsätta analyserad data till såväl skriftligt underlag som till muntliga föredragningar


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av att ha jobbat med underrättelse-och säkerhetstjänst, säkerhetsskyddsfrågor eller totalförsvar inom en myndighet
* Flerårig arbetslivserfarenhet inom vad arbetsgivaren bedömer som relevant område
* Erfarenhet av metod och utvecklingsarbete
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom ramen för säkerhetsskyddslagstiftning och dess praktiska nyttjande
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom Försvarsmakten
* B-körkort


**Personliga egenskaper**
 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är van vid att arbeta mot uppsatta mål, såväl enskilt som tillsammans med andra. Du har god förmåga att söka kunskap på egen hand och tar ansvar för ditt eget arbete. Du gillar utmaningar, är engagerad, prestigelös och stimuleras av att arbeta i en föränderlig miljö. Du förväntas ha hög personlig integritet och god förmåga att skapa goda relationer. Stor vikt läggs vid personliga egenskaper och lämplighet.
   

  

 Ovan ställda kvalifikationer ska på begäran kunna verifieras genom intyg, referenser samt arbets- eller urvalstester.
   

  

*För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på www.forsvarsmakten.se).*
**Övrigt**
 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning som inleds med provanställning om sex månader. Tjänsten är öppen att söka för både civil och militär personal.
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm. Resor nationellt och internationellt förekommer.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och friskvårdsmöjligheter som bland annat omfattar fysisk träning på arbetstid.
   

  

**För upplysningar om befattningen eller rekryteringsprocessen kontakta:** 
 hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se, vänligen skriv ”Analytiker M.J” i ämnesraden.
   

  

**Fackliga företrädare**
 Fackliga representanter nås via hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se
   

  

*Varmt välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-01. I ditt CV och personliga brev vill vi att du beskriver på vilket sätt du uppfyller våra efterfrågade krav och meriter. Du ansöker via* 
*jobb.forsvarsmakten.se. Urval sker löpande.*
 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Militära underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten (Must) är en del av Försvarsmaktens högkvarter i Stockholm. Vi ger regeringen och Försvarsmakten kvalificerade beslutsunderlag om omvärldsutvecklingen och hot mot Sveriges och Försvarsmaktens säkerhet. Vår vision är ”Ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker värld”. Must är en kunskapsorganisation och erbjuder både spännande och för Sverige angelägna arbetsuppgifter. Här arbetar både officerare och civila experter inom olika områden, t ex statsvetenskap, IT, ekonomi, teknik, matematik och HR. En stor del av Must verksamhet omfattas av sekretess och vi ber dig därför att inte berätta att du sökt jobb hos Must för andra personer än dina närmaste. Läs gärna mer om Must och vår verksamhet här Varje dag och varje timme gör våra medarbetare insatser som påverkar andra människors liv, både i stort och smått, och både på hemmaplan och runt om i världen. Försvarsmakten ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas som människa och växa i din professionella roll. Vi är en ansvarstagande arbetsgivare och har en öppen organisation där vi ställer upp för varandra. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård och bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Försvarsmakten tillvaratar de kvaliteter som mångfald och jämn könsfördelning tillför verksamheten. Vi välkomnar därför sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter i våra rekryteringar. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: [ITO] (Infra) Software Engineering Manager (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team:**
 The Infrastructure Team operates all networks, servers, and storage platforms used to deliver services to Agoda’s customers. We support every product within the company, working with a wide range of systems and technology stacks. As part of our team, you will be working on a mission critical private cloud with over 800k cores, spread over hundreds of Kubernetes clusters, OpenStack virtual machines and bare metal servers.
   

  

 Each of these opportunities - coupled with an open work environment - are a great way to gain experience on a modern and dynamic platform, constantly evolving to adapt to changes in the business landscape.
   

  

**The Opportunity:**
 Our Compute Platform team in Bangkok is looking for an experienced Engineering Manager to help scale and evolve our Compute Platform, with a strong focus on inventory, platform tooling, and lifecycle management across bare‑metal infrastructure, virtual machines, and Kubernetes.
   

  

 You’ll balance hands‑on technical leadership with people leadership, guiding a small, cross‑functional team while ensuring our platform delivers reliable, high‑quality data and tooling that supports informed decision‑making at scale.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will:**
* Stay hands‑on by contributing to system design and code, performing reviews, and providing expert technical guidance and mentorship to engineers at all levels, including interns and junior contractors.
* Build, lead, and develop a cross‑functional team of software and systems engineers, supported by contractors and interns, operating with agile delivery practices.
* Drive the research, design, and delivery of inventory and compute platform tooling that improves visibility, efficiency, reliability, and lifecycle management.
* Own and support design reviews within the team and across the wider engineering organization, helping shape platform standards and technical direction.
* Own the roadmap, and be accountable for delivery, reliability, and operational outcomes
* Foster a culture of operational excellence, engineering quality, and continuous improvement.
* Continuously learn and explore emerging technologies, proactively sharing knowledge and raising the technical bar across teams.


**What You’ll Need to Succeed:**
* 3+ years of experience as an Engineering Manager, leading, coaching, and developing engineers with a mix of seniority and experience levels.
* Strong hands‑on coding experience in a modern programming language; Golang is preferred as it is our primary language.
* Experience building or supporting platform tooling for large‑scale compute or infrastructure environments, with an understanding of Kubernetes, OpenStack, virtual machines, and containers.
* Proven experience with platform stability, resilience, and observability.
* A strong focus on testing, quality, and delivery, with experience in modern CI/CD environments.
* A data‑driven, scientific approach to decision‑making, particularly around platform health, delivery outcomes, and performance.
* Comfort operating with high autonomy at the team level, including setting OKRs/KPIs, prioritizing work, and taking clear ownership.
* Experience leading Agile/Scrum teams with multiple direct reports.
* Demonstrated experience using Generative AI tools in day‑to‑day engineering and management workflows (e.g. coding, design, documentation, analysis).
* Self‑motivated, approachable, and adaptable, with strong communication skills; English is the working language.


**It’s Great if you Have:**
* Experience designing or building asset and inventory management systems at scale.
* Hands‑on experience with configuration management and automation tools, preferably Ansible and/or AWX.
* Solid understanding of networking fundamentals and protocols in large‑scale infrastructure environments.
* Ability to communicate and collaborate effectively across teams and levels within a large organization.
* Experience using, maintaining, or contributing to open‑source projects.
* Experience integrating GenAI capabilities into platforms, such as MCP‑based or similar GenAI tooling.

title: Expert in Training and Exercises for Disaster Risk Management
company: Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency
description:
**Introduction**
 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency recruits committed and skilled experts for our humanitarian, resilience and peace support operations worldwide on a daily basis. We have great experience on working together and strengthening other organisations for example the UN and the EU in crisis, conflicts or other disasters.
   

  

 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency is now looking for expertise in Training and Exercises for a SIDA-funded\* capacity development project to Yerevan, Armenia. Duration for the mission is 16 months with good possibilities for extension. Employment corresponds to approximately 50% of a full-time position over time (negotiable), but takes place of blocks of full-time engagement and periods without any engagement. Expected start in September 2026. The details of this project might be slightly adjusted as this position is pending on Sida approval of an ongoing project application.
   

  

 The planned project (2026 – 2029) is in collaboration with the Ministry of Internal Affairs in Armenia (MIA) and aims to advance gender-responsive, inclusive and sustainable Disaster Risk Management and divides over three main work packages, which objectives are to:
   

  

* Strengthen capabilities to lead systematic, inclusive, sustainable and learning-oriented communication to enhance public awareness.
* Strengthen capabilities to lead systematic, inclusive, sustainable and learning-oriented Training and Exercises for Disaster Risk Management.
* Strengthen capabilities to work with the European Union Civil Protection Mechanism (UCPM) to enhance harmonization with EU practices.


 The expert on training and exercises will focus on work package
   

  

* “Strengthen capabilities to lead systematic, inclusive, sustainable and learning-oriented Training and Exercises for Disaster Risk Management”.


 The project’s initial four months is expected to review and add detail to the
   

  

 activity plan. Part of the assignment includes working with planning and implementing activities in collaboration with other project experts, including a Gender and Inclusion Advisor and Environmental Advisor, and experts working with the other two work packages.
   

  

* If you are a resident of Sweden and hold a Swedish work permit, some of the work will be done remotely from home, with frequent travels to Armenia.
* If you do not have a Swedish residency or a Swedish work permit, the work must be carried out entirely in Armenia.


 Employed by the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency on an international mission you will receive a comprehensive allowances and benefits package, ranging from free home leave travel to access to psychosocial support.
   

  

* Please note that this position is pending on Sida approval of the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency's project application, including the approval of the proposed funding.


**Introduction swedish**
 Myndigheten för civilt försvar arbetar dagligen med att kompetensförsörja insatser runt om i världen. Vi har stor erfarenhet av att samarbeta och stärka andra organisationer som exempelvis FN och EU i katastrof- och konfliktsituationer.
   

  

 Myndigheten för civilt försvar söker just nu expertis inom utbildning och övning inom krisberedskap till ett SIDA-finansierat\* kapacitetutvecklingsprojekt med stationeringsort i Jerevan, Armenien. Insatsen är på 16 månader med goda möjligheter till förlängning. Tjänsten motsvarar 50% av en heltidstjänst över tid (förhandlingsbart), men arbete sker i block av heltidsperioder och perioder utan arbete. Förväntad start i september 2026. Detaljer kring projektet kan komma att justeras då denna tjänst är beroende av Sidas godkännande av en pågående projektansökan.
   

  

 Det planerade projektet (2026 – 2029) är i samarbete med ”Ministry of Internal Affairs in Armenia” (MIA) och syftar till att främja genusmedvetenhet, inkluderande och hållbar katastrofriskhantering i Armenien och har tre huvudsakliga arbetspaket, vars mål är att:
   

  

* Stärka förmågan att leda systematiskt, inkluderande, hållbar och lärandeinriktad kommunikation för att öka allmänhetens krisberedskap.
* Stärka förmågan att leda systematiskt, inkluderande, hållbar och lärandeinriktad utbildning och övning i katastrofriskhantering.
* Stärka förmågan för att arbeta med EU:s civilskyddsmekanism (UCPM).


 Experten inom utbildning och övning kommer att fokusera på arbetspaket 2) ”Stärka förmågan att leda systematiskt, inkluderande, hållbar och lärandeinriktad utbildning och övning i katastrofriskhantering”.
   

  

 Under projektets första fyra månader ska en detaljerad aktivitetsplan utvecklas för kommande år.
   

  

 Några av aktiviteterna kan vara nödvändiga att planera och genomföra i samarbete med andra experter som arbetar med de andra två fokusområdena.
   

  

* Om du är bosatt i Sverige och har ett svenskt arbetstillstånd kan en del av arbetet komma att utföras på distans hemifrån, med frekventa resor till Armenien, och andra eventuella relevanta projektländer.
* Om du inte har svenskt uppehållstillstånd eller svenskt arbetstillstånd måste arbetet utföras helt och hållet i Armenien, eller andra relevanta projektländer.


 Vi värderar vår insatspersonals välbefinnande högt och du kommer att ha tillgång till stödfunktioner inom hälsa och säkerhet dygnet runt när du är på insats.
   

  

* Vänligen notera att tillsättning av denna tjänst är beroende av Sidas godkännande av projektansökan, inklusive föreslagen budget.


**Duties**
 The expert will lead the planning, implementation, facilitation and evaluation of activities within work package 2, in close collaboration with the partner, Team Leader and other project experts, including a Gender and Inclusion Advisor and Environmental Advisor. The expert will also work in close contact and collaborate with the project management team and other stakeholders.
   

  

 Expected work assignments are (to be further detailed):
   

  

* Plan, update and detail the activity plan for the coming year
* Lead the development of an inclusive stakeholder mapping and needs assessment including a light audit of gender equality, inclusion and environmental sustainability, with specific focus on capacity and needs related to training and exercises
* Support the development and implementation of organizational structures, including clearly defined roles and responsibilities, to strengthen the integration of gender equality, inclusion and environmental sustainability into training and exercises
* Support the partner in developing a multi-year action plan, based on the needs assessment, to enhance gender-responsive, inclusive and environmentally sustainable training and exercises
* Update or develop methods and tools for supporting managers and key staff in integrating gender equality, inclusion and environment into their work
* Plan and arrange webinars and study visits to learn from international good practice
* Plan and facilitate workshops, including Trainer of Trainer components for key staff aimed at developing gender-responsive, inclusive and environmentally sustainable training and exercises
* Yearly update of activity plan, report on progress and contribute to reflection and learning
* Support coordination of multi-stakeholder planning for training and exercise
* Support the development of Training and Exercise Calendar and Plan
* Develop and disseminate inclusive practical tools, guidelines, and methods for use by other stakeholders incorporating aspects of gender equality, inclusion and environment


 Other activities might be added.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Experience**
* Minimum 3 years of professional experience in development, implementation and evaluation of Training and Exercises on Disaster Risk Management
* Previous experience working in international projects, preferably within capacity development
* Proven experience in developing, facilitating and delivering workshops and trainings
* Experience of working with or within the public sector


 Merits:
   

  

* Previous experience in integrating gender-sensitive, inclusive and environmental sustainability approaches into training and exercises for Disaster Risk Management
* Experience of working within the Swedish crisis management system
* Previous experience working in Armenia or other development contexts within the region
* Experience working at a national governmental level
* Good knowledge of the European Civil Protection Mechanism and relevant standards, methodologies and tools
* Experience in communication and awareness raising activities to enhance public knowledge of disaster risk management and preparedness
* Strong skills in report writing and delivering presentations


 We place great emphasis on personal qualities and suitability in this recruitment process.
   

  

**Education**
 A university degree in disaster risk management, civil protection, international relations or other fields relevant to disaster preparedness, disaster risk management and capacity development, including education, pedagogy, learning sciences or training design.
   

  

**Languages**
 Fluency in English is essential, both spoken and written.
   

  

 Knowledge in Swedish, Armenian and/or Russian is considered an asset.
   

  

**Other Requirements**
 We are looking for persons with a strong commitment towards humanitarian relief and disaster operations. It is of utmost priority that you understand, respect and act in the spirit of the mandate and core values of the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency.
   

  

 Prior to employment a medical examination must be carried out and the results must be approved by the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency. Certain diseases and conditions can preclude international deployment. If you have any questions regarding the health requirements, please contact our medical coordinators, medical.coordinator@mcf.se
   

  

 You must inform your regular employer of your potential assignment with the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency.
   

  

 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency operations are based on the needs of populations affected by crisis, and human equality. Through your behavior and work as field staff, you actively strive to prevent discrimination and harassment based on sex, ethnic origin, age, religion or belief, political opinion, disability, sexual orientation and gender identity or expression.
   

  

**Profile**
* You must be able to interact with sensitivity and display respect for diversity and gender in multi-cultural environments
* Experience of working in a complex working environment as work is often performed under demanding conditions, sometimes under a lot of time-pressure where the focus may shift due to changes in priority
* Ability to build lasting relationships with partners and colleagues, based on trust and mutual respect
* Ability to work independently, and seek support when needed
* High level of professionalism and impeccable ethics while implementing duties
* Ability to independently take action to influence events
* Ability to find balance between strategic and practical approach while solving the tasks


**Contractual conditions**
 Working with the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency on international operations means that you are temporarily employed by us. We pay a monthly salary during the mission and you may also receive a salary supplement, if you have experience from working in an international organization with duties very similar to those of this position. We will also pay an additional expenses allowance during the time you are working in the mission country. We also pay for accommodation of appropriate standard and return travel during the contract period. You will also receive a benefits package, ranging from access to psychosocial support, counselling from medical coordinators and insurances during the mission.
   

  

 How to apply:
   

  

 If you wish to apply you first need to create an account on MyPages. Please note; the information that you provide on MyPages will form the basis for your CV. When you have created your account and registered your CV-details on MyPages, you submit your application by clicking on the "Apply" button in the add on www.mcf.se/en, and then follow the specified steps. If you already have an account on MyPages you can go directly to Apply-button in the announcement on www.mcf.se/en. If you find any trouble with MyPages, please contact our MyPages support; mypages@mcf.se
   

  

 It is your responsibility as an applicant to document your skills in a way that allows an objective and qualitative assessment. As a government agency we are subject to the principle of public access to official records. This means that if someone requests copies of application documents, we are obliged to disclose them. If your identity is protected, you should contact the HR officer stated below, before registering any information on MyPages.
   

  

 Please note that your application needs to be in English.
   

  

 The Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency will process the applications on an ongoing basis during the application period, which means that we wish you to submit your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please contact HR officer Ewa Andersson Östlund; ewa.anderssonostlund@mcf.se
   

  

 If your questions concern how to apply, please contact the MyPages support; mypages@mcf.se
   

  

 Welcome with your application!
   

  

**Application deadline**
 2026-06-03
   

  

**Point of contact**
 Ewa Andersson Östlund
   

  

 Ewa.AnderssonOstlund@mcf.se
