title: Payments Solution Architect to Payments Roadmap
description:
Assignment description
   

 For our client we are looking for a Payments Solution Architect to Payments Roadmap
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Strong and demonstrable foundation in banking, financial services and payments products, a deep knowledge and passion for designing technologies in payments, and the ability to lead technical decisions.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • 9+ years’ experience as a Payments Solution Architect.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Strong and demonstrable ability to facilitate or drive the definition and agreement of architectural deliverables such as target architectures, transition architectures, architectural roadmaps, architectural runways, end-to-end flows, etc.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Strong and demonstrable ability to get involved at the detail level in solution design activities with Business Analysts, Product Owners, Channel Owners and Development Teams.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Experience with cloud platforms (Google Cloud, AWS, Azure, OpenShift) and DevOps.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Collaborative mindset, strong communication skills, able to present solution designs or decisions without all the technical details.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Experienced in managing diverse stakeholders in large organizations and navigating ambiguity, you have experience in both traditional waterfall Project Management and Scaled Agile environments.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Flexible and open to jump in where needed and help out across the team on topics relating to Payment Channels, Payments Processing Platform and Payments Reporting.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 • Fluent in English.
   

  

 Required skills
   

 Enterprise Roadmaps
   

 Scaled Agile / DevOps
   

 Payments Architecture
   

 Cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
   

 End-to-End Payment Flows

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**About the Product & Tech Organisation** 



  


  
 


  



 Our Product & Technology organisation drives the development of Trustly’s products. The cross functional teams collectively work with innovative ideas, development of products and platform and set the vision and strategy for the problem spaces they own. The Product & Tech organisation consists of a bit more than 200 people spread across Stockholm, Lisbon, Örebro, Paris, London and Izmir. 
 



  


  
 


  



 All teams consist of a product manager, an engineering manager, a lead developer and engineers. Some teams also have designers and analytics competence in the team. They all work closely together to enable new products and features within existing products within Europe and to make sure the payment platform runs without interruptions and with high performance.
 



  


  
 


  



 We are now looking to strengthen our engineering capacity within Product & Technology with one more senior position. We operate in an agile culture combined with DevOps, allowing our teams to take on full responsibility from code to on-call.
 



  


  
 


  


**About the Role** 



  


  
 


  



 As an
 
**Engineering Manager** 

 at Trustly, you will play a crucial role in leading and supporting an agile team of talented engineers. Working closely with product managers, lead developers, and other stakeholders, you’ll ensure delivery of high-quality, scalable, and reliable systems while fostering a positive and empowering team culture. This is an excellent opportunity to bridge technical excellence and people management, delivering real impact in the payments industry.
 





  




**What you'll do** 
  
* **Team Leadership** 
 : Lead, coach, and support a team of engineers, enabling them to perform at their best while fostering a culture of collaboration, ownership, and continuous learning
  
* **Delivery Excellence** 
 : Drive successful delivery of the team’s commitments, ensuring alignment with domain objectives and product goals
  
* **Technical Collaboration** 
 : Work hands-on with lead developers and engineers to design, implement, and maintain scalable systems and solutions aligned with Trustly’s technical standards
  
* **Product Partnership** 
 : Work closely with the product manager to define and prioritise the team’s roadmap, balancing short-term goals with long-term vision
  
* **Operational Ownership** 
 : Ensure your team’s systems operate reliably in production, with high performance, availability, and maintainability
  
* **Talent Development** 
 : Recruit, onboard, and mentor engineers, creating an environment where they can grow and thrive
  
* **Process Improvement** 
 : Advocate for and implement best practices in agile methodologies, DevOps, and engineering processes to continuously improve team effectiveness
  

  



  




**Who you are** 
  
* Proven experience managing engineering teams in agile environments, with a strong focus on team empowerment and delivery
  
* Hands-on engineering background with expertise in Java and experience in building scalable, robust systems
  
* Familiarity with modern tech stacks including Kubernetes, Docker, Kafka, and Spring Boot
  
* Experience working with cloud solutions (preferably AWS), monitoring, and analytics
  
* Knowledge of service-based architecture and microservices
  
* Strong ability to balance technical decisions with business needs, ensuring delivery without sacrificing scalability, performance, or reliability
  
* Committed to fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, and excellence
  
* Passion for DevOps practices and ownership, with a track record of driving improvements in automation and monitoring
  
* Exceptional communication, problem-solving, and leadership skills
  
* Fluent in English
  

  



  




**At Trustly, you’ll have the opportunity to:** 
  
* Shape the future of payments as part of a global leader in the industry
  
* Work with cutting-edge technology and highly skilled colleagues in an agile and collaborative environment
  
* Take on a role with real impact, where your contributions directly drive the success of your team and Trustly’s mission
  
* Enjoy a supportive and dynamic culture that encourages growth, innovation, and ownership
  

  






  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: FOREX söker IT-drifttekniker med säkerhetsfokus
description:
Vi söker nu en erfaren och
 **IT-drifttekniker** 
 med fokus på IT-säkerhet till vår IT‑avdelning på FOREX.
   

  

 FOREX är Nordens marknadsledare inom resevaluta och erbjuder expertis och tjänster kring resekonomi. Vi hjälper våra kunder med att maxa sin reskassa, både i butik och digitala miljöer med hög tillgänglighet för våra kunder, något som ställer krav på både våra system och våra arbetsprocesser.
   

  

 Som IT-drifttekniker blir du en viktig del av vårt team som ansvarar för att skydda och vidareutveckla FOREX IT‑miljö. På FOREX arbetar vi kontinuerligt med att stärka vår IT‑säkerhet och säkerställa stabil drift i en reglerad miljö. Tjänsten, som är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid, innebär stora möjligheter att utvecklas inom IT‑drift. Du är placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Stockholm.
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Ansvarsområden Inkluderar** 
  

  

* Övervakning av säkerhetsplattformar och SIEM‑lösningar, exempelvis Microsoft Sentinel, för att upptäcka och analysera säkerhetshot
* Hantering av säkerhetsincidenter enligt etablerade processer, inklusive klassning, eskalering och root cause‑analys
* Utförande av sårbarhetsskanningar samt koordinering av åtgärder tillsammans med relevanta team
* Utförande av operativa IT‑driftuppgifter, såsom:
+ Övervakning av tjänsters hälsa och återställning vid incidenter
+ Ärendehantering i servicedesk
+ Administration av klienter (Windows/macOS) och Intune‑policyer
+ Hantering av identiteter i Microsoft Entra ID och Active Directory
+ Certifikathantering och grundläggande nätverksfelsökning

* Dokumentation av incidenter, åtgärder och förbättringsförslag i enlighet med FOREX riktlinjer
* Bidra till ökad säkerhetsmedvetenhet inom organisationen


**För att lyckas i rollen krävs att du:**
 Har Relevant Arbetslivserfarenhet Och Har Arbetat Med IT‑säkerhet Och/eller IT‑drift i Några År. Du Bör Ha God Kännedom Inom Flera Av Följande Områden
   

  

* IT‑säkerhet, incidenthantering och sårbarhetsarbete
* Microsoft‑miljöer såsom Azure, Microsoft 365, Entra ID och Active Directory
* SIEM/SOAR, gärna Microsoft Sentinel
* Patchhantering, backup/restore och certifikathantering
* Grundläggande nätverkssäkerhet (brandvägg, VPN, IDS/IPS)
* Windows‑ och Linux‑miljöer samt härdningsprinciper
* Automatisering och skriptning med PowerShell


**Meriterande kunskaper**
* Molnarkitektur inom Azure (IaaS/PaaS)
* Zero Trust‑principer och moderna säkerhetsramverk
* Intune och klienthantering
* Erfarenhet av arbete i reglerad verksamhet eller finanssektorn


**Vi Söker Dig Som**
 Är intresserad av IT‑säkerhet och håller dig uppdaterad om nya hot, tekniker och trender. Du är strukturerad, ansvarstagande och har ett starkt säkerhetstänk. Du är positiv, prestigelös och har inga problem med att hjälpa till där det behövs.
   

  

 Som IT-drifttekniker på FOREX arbetar du i en utmanande och omväxlande miljö där du kombinerar säkerhet och drift, och där du har stora möjligheter att utvecklas inom IT‑området.
   

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid och placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Stockholm. Om du trivs i en dynamisk arbetsmiljö och vill vara med och stärka säkerheten i en reglerad verksamhet – tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag.
   

  

 Låter det som något för dig?
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om ansökan**
 Av säkerhetsskäl kommer vi att ta en kreditupplysning samt be om ett utdrag ur belastningsregistret innan anställning kan ske. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen vill vi att du som söker den här tjänsten genomför ett kortare test. Testet kommer att mailas till dig, du har sedan sju dagar på dig att besvara och slutföra testet.
   

  

 Frågor om tjänsten besvaras av Head of IT-operations & Infrastructure Michel Ådefjäll, michel.adefjall@forex.se
   

  

 Vid frågor till fackliga företrädare, Unionen, kontakta unionen@forex.se
   

  

 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl.

title: Sales Director
description:
**Company Description**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you get to do in this role:**
* Build a team of direct Sales Executives to drive rapid new business sales growth in the region
* Build and drive sales strategy for the region in conjunction with Sales Operations to effectively Go-To-Market including understanding the competitive landscape, presence and strength within the region
* Actively engage in territory planning, relationship development and opportunity development and driving revenue by supporting and assisting Field Sales Teams in closing opportunities
* Recruit, coach and mentor team members to drive excellence
* Development of territories and quota for the sales team and effectively communicate to set performance expectations within the team
* Manage and report accurate forecast and pipeline to the business
* Achievement of annual sales goals on a quarterly and annual basis is required
* Engage and align effectively in C-level meetings in order to properly understand customer business requirements
* Build effective working relationships with Solution Consulting, Business Units, Professional Services, Marketing, our Partner community and the ServiceNow executive team
* Retain and grow existing customer base with regular non-sales customer engagement activities to deliver an excellent customer experience


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* Extensive track record of new business sales success including presentation and negotiation skills within industry and at C Level
* Strong success in recruiting, coaching and managing an exceptional sales team
* Strong strategic thinking including analytical and financial planning skills to meet and exceed quotas and goals.
* Ownership of accurate CRM reports including current and future quarterly forecasts and opportunity inspection
* Experienced in driving sales process and drive effective working relationships with Sales Operations
* Ability to understand the 'bigger picture' and business drivers around IT
* Ability to build long term strategic and senior level relationships
* Ability to adapt and work effectively within a rapidly changing and growing environment
* Demonstrates strong business and financial acumen
* Built self-motivated sales teams that embrace a culture of collaboration, enthusiasm, and overachievement
* Champions and promotes top performers, constantly develops and coaches the team and themselves, and topgrades appropriately
* Proven partner relationships and networks, and ability to grow the impact of revenue streams and territory development through the partner ecosystem
* Ownership of driving successful pipeline generation activities developed by marketing or the partner community


 JV20
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: Senior Customer Success Manager
description:
Individuals in the Customer Success Manager role have a passion for technology and the ambition to dive head-first into new challenges. We are looking for someone who can thrive with a high level of ambiguity and operate autonomously while maintaining a customer centric approach and helping to build the program. In this role you will also become a main point of contact for MongoDB end users by leveraging your technical and account management skills as well as acting as the account team leader across Sales, Professional Services, Solutions Architects, etc.
   

  

 We are looking to speak to candidates who are based in Stockholm for our hybrid working model.
   

  

 Our ideal candidate will have
   

  

* 7+ years experience working in Customer Success, Technical Account Management, Professional Services or other similarly customer-centric role for a technical product (ideally consumption based)
* 4+ years experience being accountable for customer health and revenue realization for a defined book of business/portfolio of accounts for Forbes Global 2000 customers
* A background and passion for advocating on behalf of your customers - this role should act as an extension of our customers team within MongoDB
* A mind for technology - we’ll teach you about MongoDB and databases, but our customers and product are inherently technical and you should have an aptitude and curiosity to learn about those concepts
* The ability to act with a high level of autonomy, you will be expected to take full ownership of your customer portfolio and make key decisions to drive effective customer outcomes; including deciding when to include our executive team or c-suite in customer escalations, how to de-risk or de-escalate customer issues and conflict and advocating to internal teams including sales, professional services, etc.
* An entrepreneurial mindset - you will be required to both deviate from established procedure and often build entirely new process or practices to ensure we best serve this customer segment
* A team player approach and passion for collaboration - this role will work with some of our most strategic growth customers so must align closely to Sales, Professional Services, Tech Services, and the broader MDB ecosystem
* Demonstrated continuing technical education (e.g., MongoDB DBA track, hyperscaler certifications)
* Prior exposure to database, cloud, and infrastructure technology is a plus


 On a given day in this role you will
   

  

* Work as a strategic advisor to your customer providing them with guidance on MongoDB best practices and their overall technology strategy; this could include running enablement sessions alone or with another internal MongoDB team members, advising the customer on strategies to optimize their technical environment or current spend with MongoDB, positioning and recommending product features and best practices to accelerate customers time to value and growth
* Guide customers through the customer journey to accelerate their time-to-value from MongoDB, overseeing the technical success plan from committed ARR to active consumption. Includes advising customers on on their deployment health & strategies for operating and maturing their MongoDB environments
* Proactively identify and mitigate technical risks for complex accounts by designing custom remediation plans and implementing best practices to pre-empt critical issues.
* Facilitate the resolution of high-stakes customer challenges while identifying strategic opportunities to expand MongoDB usage through optimized technical solutions.
* Collect feedback and identify roadblocks from customers to inform internal teams including Product, Professional Services, and Leadership on how MongoDB can build a stronger product and go to market organization
* Act as the link between our customers and product engineering to develop new innovative solutions. You will be key in building the future roadmap of our product by acting as the Product team’s eyes and ears in this field
* De-escalate and resolve critical customer issues and complaints by finding the best possible solution for both the customer and MongoDB; this could include anything from navigating a customer outage that has a financial impact on their business, to helping an application team devise a custom MongoDB solution or implementation for their critical application, no day is the same
* Build and execute account plans to mitigate risk and drive growth 3+ quarters out across your portfolio
* Lead in-person executive business reviews for strategic customers in your portfolio, including interfacing with C-suite executives and other technical leaders to align to business objectives and agree to a mutual success plan
* Work on strategic internal projects to help build the Customer Success program; our expectation is that anyone in this role has strong business acumen and the ability to create and teach best practices, new process, and enablement to the broader organization
* Document all customer interactions in internal systems, including Gainsight and Salesforce.com
* Provide feedback and guidance to leadership on key signals within MongoDB Atlas that indicate healthy or unhealthy customer accounts; as our product evolves, we’ll need to be constantly adjusting our engagement strategies based on these signals, which you’ll be in the best position to identify and share back with internal teams
* Manage the relationship with Sales Leadership and Account Executives in your territory, including reporting on business performance, training on best practices, and rolling out program updates to ensure sales people and leaders are abreast of best practices for interacting with Customer Success
* Forecast expected churn and growth to your senior leadership team
* Help interview, onboard and ramp new team members - as a more senior team member you will have an immediate role in who joins the team
* Act as a leader amongst your peers, running enablement sessions, product certifications and being vocal in team meetings to ensure those around you grow


**About MongoDB**
 MongoDB is built for change, empowering our customers and our people to innovate at the speed of the market. We have redefined the database for the AI era, enabling innovators to create, transform, and disrupt industries with software. MongoDB’s unified database platform, the most widely available, globally distributed database on the market, helps organizations modernize legacy workloads, embrace innovation, and unleash AI. Our cloud-native platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi-cloud database and is available across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
   

  

 With offices worldwide and over 60,000 customers, including 75% of the Fortune 100 and AI-native startups, relying on MongoDB for their most important applications, we’re powering the next era of software.
   

  

 Our compass at MongoDB is our Leadership Commitment, guiding how and why we make decisions, show up for each other, and win. It’s what makes us MongoDB.
   

  

 To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy, we value our employees’ wellbeing and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys. Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB, and help us make an impact on the world!
   

  

 MongoDB is committed to providing any necessary accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.
   

  

 MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer.
   

  

 Req ID: 426244

title: Senior Cloud Architect Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Senior Cloud Architect (AI Platform)- Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)**
*Tietoevry Public 360 - building secure, scalable digital services for the public sector across the Nordics.*
**About The Role**
 Public 360 integrates cloud-based AI capabilities into standard enterprise software. We are building solutions for 600+ public organizations in the Nordics, and our AI platform runs customer deployments at scale and is evolving fast with GenAI and agentic AI.
   

  

 As Senior Cloud Architect, you own the cloud architecture for our AI platform and shared services. You will define reference architectures, make key technology choices (Microsoft-first, but open), and ensure security, reliability, and automation as we scale.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Design and evolve the target architecture for a public-cloud-first AI platform (Azure preferred).
* Exploration of alternative deployment strategies for high-security customers
* Build secure, compliant foundations: landing zones, identity, networking, encryption, secrets, logging, and policy-as-code.
* Architect for scale and automation: infrastructure as code, CI/CD, GitOps, self-service environments, and operational runbooks.
* Own platform reliability: observability, SLOs, incident patterns, performance, and cost optimization (FinOps).
* Define patterns for AI product integration: APIs, event-driven processing, data pipelines, and multi-tenant considerations.
* Partner with AI engineers/data scientists on MLOps and LLMOps: model delivery pipelines, feature stores, evaluation, and monitoring.
* Drive security and Trustworthy AI practices together with security, privacy, and product teams (GDPR and data residency aware).
* Support solutioning and pre-sales when needed, and mentor architects/engineers across product teams.


**What You Bring**
* Senior – 8-10+ years of relevant experience, including service or solution architecture in complex product environments. More junior profiles will be considered in case of relevant experience – not the time but the type of experience and responsibility is important to us.
* Strong public cloud architecture skills (Azure: AKS/Container Apps, Functions, App Service, API Management, Event Hubs/Service Bus, Storage, SQL/Cosmos DB, Key Vault, Entra ID).
* Experience with multiple deployment scenarios and high security requirements is a plus
* Hands-on experience with automation: Terraform and/or Bicep, CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), and modern deployment practices.
* Proven security architecture skills: threat modeling, zero trust, network segmentation, secrets management, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms: Azure ML/MLflow, model serving, data pipelines, and LLM integration patterns.
* Ability to translate business needs into pragmatic architectures and communicate clearly with both engineers and stakeholders.


**Nice to have**
* Experience with GenAI platforms (e.g., Azure OpenAI) and guardrails: content filters, prompt injection defense, red teaming, and evaluation.
* Knowledge of data engineering components: Databricks/Spark, Delta Lake, data streaming, and search/vector databases.
* Certifications such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure Security Engineer, or similar.


**Impact you will have**
* Own the reference architecture for our cloud-first AI platform supporting AI capabilities for public organizations in the Nordics.
* Raise the security and compliance baseline with zero-trust patterns, policy-as-code, and audit-ready controls.
* Increase delivery speed and consistency through automation: self-service environments.
* Improve reliability and cost efficiency with SLO-driven operations, observability, and FinOps practices.


**Tech we use**
 Azure-first and automation-driven: containers/Kubernetes, serverless, messaging, IaC (Terraform/Bicep), CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), observability, and cloud security tooling. We are open to AWS/GCP experience.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like In 6 Months**
* A clear platform roadmap indicating the next steps for our data and ai platform as baseline for our product teams, supporting our vision of AI-first and agentic-first software offerings in the public sector domain.
* Review and implementation of defined improvements of automation framework and pipelines in place for core platform services.
* Operational excellence established: dashboards, SLOs, alerting, and incident playbooks used in day-to-day operations.
* Security and Trustworthy AI governance embedded: threat models, risk assessments, and guardrail patterns for GenAI use cases.


**Why join us**
* Build technology that improves citizen services - with real-world scale and meaningful impact.
* A highly skilled, collaborative environment with room to influence architecture decisions end-to-end.
* Modern cloud-first stack, strong focus on security and responsible AI, and freedom to explore new approaches (including agentic AI).
* Professional growth, international collaboration, and a culture built on trust, transparency, and ownership.


**Practicalities**
 Location and work setup: flexible/hybrid, ideally near one of our development hubs in Scandinavia (Oslo, Stockholm, Copenhagen or Espoo). Fluent English required; Nordic language skills are a plus.
   

  

**Are you our new colleague?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Geir Are Bjørnsrud (geirare.bjornsrud@tietoevry.com)
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Gemini Enterprise Customer Experience Sales Specialist, Cloud Nordics
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Stockholm, Sweden; Oslo, Norway** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience in a sales role in the enterprise software, cloud space, or AI space.
* Experience promoting the Customer Experience (CX), Generative AI and AI technology stack.
* Experience engaging with, presenting to, and building relationships with executive leaders.
* Ability to travel up to 50% of the time.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience identifying AI use cases to solve customer challenges or selling customer experience.
* Experience working with cross-functional teams, including product, field sales, customer engineering, and solution architects to build business cases for transformation and accompanying plans for implementation.
* Experience working with and managing partners in complex implementation projects, including global system integrators and packaged software vendors.
* Experience in a customer industry including: retail, financial services/retail banking, insurance, telecommunications, automotive, and Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG).
* Understanding of regional or local and industry data privacy and security rules and regulations.


**About The Job**
 As a Gemini Enterprise CX Sales Specialist, you will be responsible for growing our Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience (CX) business by building and expanding relationships with new and existing customers.
   

  

 You will possess the necessary selling skills to effectively build relationships with both AI Sales Specialists (AISS), Cloud Field Sales Representatives (FSRs), Customer Engineers (CEs) as well as new and existing customers.
   

  

 You will develop relationships with external customer stakeholders, identifying innovative ways to multiply your impact and the impact of the team as a whole. You will partner with internal Google Cloud sales teams to grow their Customer Experience (CX) businesses and drive overall value for Google Cloud business cycles, including a combination of expansion agreements, as well as working with product teams to help our customers build new products leveraging our AI.
   

  

 It's an exciting time to join Google Cloud’s Go-To-Market team, leading the AI revolution for businesses worldwide. You’ll excel by leveraging Google's brand credibility—a legacy built on inventing foundational technologies and proven at scale. We’ll provide you with the world's most advanced AI portfolio, including frontier Gemini models, and the complete Vertex AI platform, helping you to solve business problems. We’re a collaborative culture providing direct access to DeepMind's engineering and research minds, empowering you to solve customer challenges. Join us to be the catalyst for our mission, drive customer success, and define the new cloud era—the market is yours.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain executive relationships with customers as the Gemini Enterprise for customer experience subject matter expert, manage complex business cycles, identify suitable use cases for Google Cloud solutions, and influence the long-term strategic direction of your accounts.
* Manage objectives and key results to deliver against quota and achieve or exceed strategic business and growth goals while accurately forecasting and reporting the state of the business for your assigned territory.
* Work with Google accounts and cross-functional teams (e.g., Customer Engineering, Marketing, Customer Success, Product, Engineering, and Partner Ecosystem) to develop go-to-market strategies, drive pipeline, understand the customer, and provide excellence prospect and customer experience.
* Assist customers in identifying GECX and AI use cases suitable for Google Cloud AI products and solutions. Articulate key solution differentiators and the measurable business impact.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: GTM Associate
description:
**About Dentio** 




 Did you know that 90% of dentists spend time on admin work outside of clinic hours? We are here to change that.
 



  





 Dentio is a Nordic tech company on a mission to transform how dental practices run. Our AI listens in on the patient consultation and automatically generates clinical notes, dental status charts, and referrals, giving dentists their time back so they can focus on what really matters: their patients.
 



  





 We recently closed a $2.3M pre-seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), one of the world's leading venture capital firms. After a successful soft launch where over 100 dental clinics are already using our tool, we are now entering our next phase: a broad rollout across Sweden. This is your chance to get in on the ground floor of that rollout.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We are looking for a driven, self-starting salesperson to help build our go-to-market motion in the Swedish dental industry from the ground up. You will own the full sales cycle, prospecting, booking demos, closing, and following up with dental clinics across Sweden. You will essentially be our face in the Swedish market: fearless, hungry for deals, and motivated by seeing your results reflected directly in your commission.
 



  





**What you will do:** 



* Prospect and reach out to dental clinics across Sweden
* Book and run product demos with dentists and clinic owners
* Follow up by email, phone, and in-person visits when needed
* Build long-term relationships and keep our Swedish dental customers happy
* Act as a key voice for the Swedish market back into the product and leadership team



  





**We are looking for someone who:** 



* Has at least 2 years of B2B sales experience, ideally selling to small businesses
* Is self-driven and results-oriented
* Thrives in a commission-based role
* Speaks fluent Swedish and English
* Is based in Sweden with a strong local network or willingness to travel domestically



  





**Strongly preferred:** 



* Experience selling into dental clinics or the broader dental industry in Sweden
* Bonus on top of that: experience selling software or SaaS
* Background in healthcare sales more broadly



  





**Also a plus:** 



* Experience working at or founding a startup



  





**Why Dentio?** 



* Backed by a16z and building in one of the most exciting verticals in AI
* Be the first commercial hire driving our Swedish rollout, with huge ownership and impact from day one
* Generous commission on every subscription you close
* Full training and sales support from our founding team in Stockholm
* Opportunity to grow quickly into a senior role as we scale
* Potential path to equity ownership



  





**How to apply** 




 Send us a short introduction telling us about your background and why you would be a great fit, along with your CV. We review applications on a rolling basis.
 



  





**Contact** 




 Interested or have questions? Reach out at careers@dentio.com or apply directly on our website.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
⭐
 **Ready for your next challenge? Let’s talk.**
 At Bannerflow, we’re always interested in connecting with curious, driven people who want to grow with us. While our needs evolve over time, one thing stays constant: we value great talent and strong team players who want to make an impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 A strong team spirit built on trust & ownership
   

  

 We believe in giving people responsibility and the freedom to succeed. We trust each other, collaborate closely, and assume the best intentions. Together, we decide how to win.
   

  

**Continuous growth and new challenges**
 Our entrepreneurial mindset encourages initiative, experimentation, and learning. If you have ideas on how we can improve, scale, or work smarter — we want to hear them.
   

  

**A passionate and fun culture**
 We take our work seriously, but not ourselves. Expect a diverse and inclusive environment with activities like Health Month, inspirational talks, team events, company trips, board game nights, and more.
   

  

**A stable, global Ad Tech company with strong growth ambitions**
 Based in Stockholm and working with customers worldwide, Bannerflow continues to expand into new markets. With the support of our new owners, we’re well-positioned for continued growth in 2025 and beyond.
   

  

 🦋
 **You + Bannerflow?**
 From time to time, we look for talented Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) who want to grow within B2B SaaS and Ad Tech. In an SDR role at Bannerflow, you’d play a key part in building relationships with future customers, generating qualified leads, and supporting our commercial growth by working closely with Account Executives and the wider go-to-market team.
   

  

**What You Might Work On**
* Generating and nurturing qualified leads using modern tools and data-driven methods
* Engaging prospects and helping them understand the value of Bannerflow
* Managing and improving pipeline data in our CRM
* Staying curious about market trends and sharing insights with the team


**What We Typically Look For**
* 1+ years of experience in sales development or a similar commercial role
* A strong sense of ownership and motivation to grow
* Comfort using prospecting tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Salesloft, or Cognism
* Strong communication skills in English (additional languages are always a plus)
* A commercial mindset and interest in SaaS, Ad Tech, and B2B sales


**Why Bannerflow?**
 We’re a values-driven company built on passion, collaboration, and challenge. Here, you’ll have the chance to grow alongside experienced colleagues, influence how we work, and be part of a team shaping the future of creative automation in Ad Tech.
   

  

 We offer a hybrid work setup, competitive compensation, ITP1 pension, health allowance, parental leave top-up, and health insurance, plus a culture filled with padel tournaments, hackathons, webinars, and Friday beers 🍻

title: Systemarkitekt interna stödsystem
description:
Vill du vara med på Skatteverkets inre resa och bygga upp en säker, effektiv och ändamålsenlig arkitektur för våra interna processer för att driva Skatteverket framåt? Vi söker nu en systemarkitekt med kunskaper inom applikationsutveckling till vår tågledning, som i huvudsak stödjer våra interna förmågor inom ledning, styrning och verksamhetsstöd. Är du en erfaren arkitekt som gillar att bygga upp arkitekturförmåga - då är det dig vi söker. Var med och gör samhället möjligt!
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Genom effektiva digitala flöden ska vi förenkla arbetsdagen för alla medarbetare, ta bort onödiga administrativa moment och fortsätta stärka Skatteverkets varumärke som en attraktiv och modern arbetsgivare. Vi har ett starkt fokus på att effektivisera våra interna processer och behöver en långsiktig, säker, sammanhållen och robust arkitektur där vi nyttjar verktygen optimalt. Vi är i uppbyggnaden av våra arkitekturförmågor och arkitekturstyrning, i vilken du kommer att vara en viktig spelare.
   

  

 Vi utvecklar och förvaltar ett 40-tal system och tjänster som spänner över många olika tekniker, inköpta standardsystem, molntjänster och egenutvecklade produkter. Våra tjänster betjänar i huvudsak våra verksamheter inom ledning, styrning, hr och administrativt stöd. Detta gör att vi både har många leverantörer och intressenter i vår verksamhet och därmed många kontakter både inom och utanför Skatteverket.
   

  

 Skatteverket har infört SAFe som agilt ramverk och du jobbar tillsammans med tågledningen, andra arkitekter och de olika utvecklingsteamen. Du omsätter verksamhetsbehoven till optimerade it-lösningar, bereder och presenterar lösningsförslag inför beslut om anskaffningar eller ändringar, agerar bollplank och säkerställer att arkitekturprodukter, till exempel architectural runway, enablers och icke funktionella krav, implementeras och kommuniceras.
   

  

 Skatteverkets it-avdelning ansvarar för drift, förvaltning och utveckling av myndighetens it-system och levererar idag it-drift till flera kunder. Vi arbetar för att vara Sveriges bästa it-driftleverantör för myndigheter vilket förutsätter samarbeten med arkitekter på andra myndigheter samt kännedom och tillämpning av nationellt framtagna arkitekturprodukter.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet till ständig utveckling och lärande i arbetet. Vi jobbar aktivt med kompetens- och teknikutveckling genom exempelvis innovationssprintar. Du har kunniga kollegor som du utbyter erfarenheter med och du kan utveckla både bredd och spets hos oss. Tack vare att vi är en stor it-organisation kan vi erbjuda goda möjligheter till intern rörlighet. Det är viktigt för oss att du har balans mellan jobb och fritid och vi erbjuder bland annat flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet att jobba delvis hemifrån. Du får en friskvårdstimme i veckan och friskvårdsbidrag.
   

  

 Skatteverkets it-avdelning arbetar aktivt för att främja en inkluderande arbetsplats som präglas av jämställdhet och mångfald där alla medarbetare får lika möjligheter att bidra och utvecklas. Läs mer på Jobba med it hos oss
   

  

 Du tillhör it-avdelningen, med placering i Sundbyberg.
   

  

**Om dig**
 För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss på Skatteverket behöver du vara lyhörd, tänka nytt och ta ansvar. I arbetet är gott omdöme och förståelse för rättssäkerhet och säkerhet viktigt. Du ska också leva upp till vår medarbetarpolicy.
   

  

**I Det Här Jobbet Ska Du**
* ha god samarbetsförmåga, vara hjälpsam och ha ett gott bemötande
* vara lösningsfokuserad och se till både gruppens och din egen prestation
* vara driven och ha en förmåga att kunna engagera andra
* på ett överskådligt och pedagogiskt sätt kunna beskriva och illustrera lösningar och arkitektur anpassat till olika målgrupper
* ha ett strukturerat arbetssätt och vara noggrann
* ha god problemlösningsförmåga, se mönster och kunna göra avgränsningar
* uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska.


**Du Ska Även Ha**
* eftergymnasial utbildning eller flerårig aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant
* flerårig aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet som it-arkitekt i komplex organisation
* flerårig aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet av interna stödsystem inom till exempel ekonomi, styrning eller hr.


 Det är önskvärt att du har erfarenhet av att arbeta inom offentlig verksamhet samt av att verka i en agil utvecklingsmiljö enligt SAFe-ramverket. Vidare är det önskvärt med arbetserfarenhet av applikationsutveckling i ramverk såsom Spring Boot och React, liksom erfarenhet av applikationsdrift i containerbaserade plattformar, exempelvis OpenShift Container Platform. Det är även önskvärt att du har arbetserfarenhet av integrationer, till exempel via API:er och batchar.
   

  

 Det är vidare önskvärt att du har arbetserfarenhet inom arkitektur för ServiceNow-plattformen, exempelvis inom Service Portal, App Engine och HRSD. Vidare är det även önskvärt att du har erfarenhet av arkitektur för RPA och AI-agenter, till exempel baserat på UiPath, MS Copilot och MS Power Automate.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Anställningen är tillsvidare och kan inledas med provanställning i sex månader.
   

  

 En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 På skatteverket.se/jobb kan du exempelvis läsa om vår samhällsbärande roll, fördelarna med att jobba hos oss och hur det går till när du söker våra jobb.
   

  

 När du ansöker bifogar du ditt cv. Vi använder inte personligt brev i våra rekryteringar och du ska därför inte bifoga det i din ansökan.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Data Modeler
description:
Data Modelling
 


* Conceptual, logical (L2), and physical (L3) data modelling
* Dimensional modelling (star and snowflake schemas)
* Normalized and denormalized data structures
* Data product–oriented modelling approaches
* Ability to translate business requirements into technical data models



 Cloud Data Architecture & Platforms
 


* Designing data models for modern cloud-based data platforms
* Hands-on exposure to Azure Data Lake (ADLS)
* Experience working with Databricks and lakehouse architectures
* Strong understanding of layered data architectures (raw, curated, consumption)
* Awareness of performance, scalability, and cost considerations in cloud analytics platforms



 Metadata, Documentation & Governance
 


* Metadata modelling and structured documentation
* Data lineage and traceability concepts
* Data governance principles including ownership and stewardship
* Defining sustainable processes for long-term model maintenance

title: Partner Account Manager
description:
**Job Description**
**Reshape How We Grow and Evolve Partnerships in the ISV Ecosystem**
 At Nexi, partnerships are not transactional—they’re foundational to how we serve millions of European businesses. As our Partner Account Manager for Independent Software Vendors, you’ll play a key role in strengthening long‑term relationships, expanding our ISV ecosystem, and shaping the future of payment integrations.
   

  

 While part of your work will involve identifying new partners, your greatest impact will come from nurturing and transforming the partners already within our network. You’ll help established ISVs modernize their integration models, uncover new joint revenue opportunities, and define shared pathways to success. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on curiosity, values strong relationships, and is driven by sustained, long‑term growth.
   

  

**Why This Role Is Right for You**
 Our ISV ecosystem is diverse and full of untapped potential. Many partners are ready to evolve—whether that means adopting modern integration capabilities, exploring smarter monetization models, or aligning more deeply with our commercial strategies.
   

  

 Rather than focusing solely on aggressive acquisition, we are looking for someone who recognizes the opportunity to elevate the partnerships we already have. You will still bring in select high‑value ISVs, but the heart of this role lies in strengthening, modernizing, and scaling the relationships that define Nexi’s European presence.
   

  

**About Your Future Role**
 In this position, you will:
   

  

**Grow and Deepen Strategic Partnerships**
 You’ll work closely with our existing ISV partners to build long‑term, trust‑based relationships and uncover new revenue opportunities within the current portfolio. A key part of your remit is guiding partners as they shift from legacy integrations toward more modern, scalable commercial and technical models. Throughout this process, you’ll collaborate with partners to define shared success metrics that support growth for both sides.
   

  

**Selective Acquisition of High‑Value ISVs**
 Although the role focuses primarily on existing partnerships, you will also identify a small number of new ISVs that complement and strengthen our ecosystem. This includes developing well‑reasoned business cases grounded in long‑term value creation and leading negotiations that prioritize collaboration and relationship‑building.
   

  

**Drive Commercial & Technical Evolution**
 To support our partners effectively, you’ll immerse yourself in their business models, integration needs, and product roadmaps. You’ll collaborate with internal product and technical teams to ensure integrations are aligned with modern best practices and jointly design go‑to‑market approaches that accelerate growth. A crucial part of this work involves balancing commercial ambition with technical feasibility and smart prioritization.
   

  

**Shape How Nexi Partners Across Europe**
 Your insights from partners and market trends will help influence Nexi’s wider product development and commercial strategy. You’ll challenge outdated processes, introduce new partnership models, and contribute to scaling successful programs across multiple regions. You’ll also help align internal stakeholders around shared objectives that reinforce long‑term partner success.
   

  

**Champion Curiosity, Creativity & Problem‑Solving**
 You’ll bring a solution‑oriented mindset to every challenge, showing genuine curiosity about our partners’ businesses and the industries they serve. Creativity will be essential as you discover practical, meaningful ways to strengthen relationships and deliver mutual value.
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
 We’re looking for someone eager to make a difference. Here’s what we value:
   

  

**Essential Qualifications**
* 8+ years in partnership management, business development, or software‑focused commercial roles
* Demonstrated experience deepening and expanding strategic partnerships
* Ability to navigate complex, multi‑stakeholder environments
* Background working with ISVs, software vendors, or integration‑driven partners
* Proven ability to influence revenue through partnership channels
* Fluency in English and Swedish


**Bonus Skills**
* Experience with ISVs in retail, hospitality, ERP, or vertical SaaS
* Comfort working with technical teams and discussing integration requirements
* Understanding of software ecosystem economics and vertical value chains


*Even if you don’t meet every requirement, your curiosity, adaptability, and partnership mindset may make you an excellent fit.*
**What’s In It For You**
 You’ll have strategic influence within one of Europe’s largest payment companies, gain exposure to major industry developments, and work with a highly experienced, international team.
   

  

**Discover Life at Nexi**
 We’re an international team of 10,000+ people across 25 countries, united by shared ambition and a passion for innovation. Learn more about our culture, Values, and how we’re shaping the future of digital payments. Visit our Life at Nexi page.
   

  

**Diversity and Inclusion at Nexi**
 We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer: together, we succeed by embracing our differences and creating a future where everyone can thrive.
   

  

**Your Next Step Starts Here**
 If this opportunity excites you, we’d love to hear your story. Submit your application today, and let’s shape the future of digital payments together!

title: Software Sales Integration
description:
**Introduction**
 At IBM Global Sales, we bring together innovation, collaboration, and expertise to help clients solve their most complex business challenges. Working across industries and geographies, you’ll partner with colleagues, clients, and partners to co-create solutions that drive digital transformation and lasting impact.Success in Global Sales is built on curiosity, empathy, and collaboration. You’ll connect technical understanding with strong people skills, building trusted relationships and shaping solutions that improve business and society. With world-class onboarding, continuous learning, and a supportive culture, IBM offers the tools and opportunities to grow your career. Join us and be part of a global team that’s passionate about driving innovation and making a difference.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Brand Sales Specialist, you will act as a trusted business advisor to clients, building long-term relationships, and helping organizations realize measurable business value through IBM’s market-leading solutions. You will engage senior stakeholders, understand strategic priorities, and position IBM as a partner that drives growth, efficiency, and competitive advantage.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Client Leadership & Value Creation Own and develop strategic client relationships, clearly articulate IBM’s value proposition, and engage executive decision-makers to drive business outcomes.
* End-to-End Sales Ownership & Collaboration Lead the full sales lifecycle with a strong focus on new business development and expansion, working closely with cross-functional IBM teams to deliver integrated, high-value solutions.
* Ecosystem & Partner Engagement Leverage the IBM ecosystem to scale solutions, accelerate go-to-market execution, and maximize value for IBM clients through strong partner collaboration.
* Forecasting & Commercial Discipline Maintain accurate forecasting and pipeline management within the assigned territory, ensuring transparency, predictability, and commercial rigor.


**Preferred Education**
 Bachelor's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Proven Technology Sales Performance Demonstrated success in complex technology sales, with a strong track record of acquiring new clients and expanding existing accounts.
* Strong Business Acumen & Executive Communication Ability to translate technology into business value and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Influential & Persuasive Engagement Skilled at engaging senior stakeholders in a compelling, credible, and outcome-focused manner.
* Industry Experience Strong experience in complex software sales, preferably within Integration, B2B, and API-driven environments.
* Technical Foundation Solid understanding of modern business infrastructure concepts and technologies, including APIs, SOA, Microservices, ESB, SOAP/REST, Docker, Kubernetes, and major cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP).

title: Java/Software engineer
description:
**Job description:** 




  





 Daily Tasks
 



 Design, build, and maintain scalable Java/Spring Boot microservices.
 



 Lead end-to-end delivery across development, testing, CI/CD, deployment, monitoring, and production support.
 



 Collaborate with product, architecture, and engineering teams to drive technical decisions and resolve risks
