title: Embedded Software System Engineer
description:
**Who We Are**


At MittLogik Group, we’re driven by a passion for solving complex challenges through technology. As a growing IT services provider, we specialize in delivering high-impact consulting and engineering expertise across the Automotive, Embedded Systems, and Telecom industries.


With a strong focus on quality and adaptability, we help our clients accelerate development, scale innovation, and stay ahead in fast-moving technical environments. Our ability to connect niche talent with critical projects has made us a trusted partner to both startups and industry leaders.


Recognized with the DI Gasell award in 2020, 2021, and 2023, we’re proud to be one of Sweden’s fastest-growing companies.


Headquartered in Lund, with teams across Stockholm, Gothenburg, Linköping, and Bangalore, we operate globally with a local mindset.


Explore more at mittlogik.se

**Summary**


We are building a next-generation high-performance vehicle computing platform that powers advanced capabilities such as autonomous driving, connected services, and machine learning. This is part of a major transformation in the automotive industry, moving from distributed ECUs to centralized, software-defined architectures.


Within the Central Execution Environment, the Low Power Unit (LPA) team develops safety-critical platform components fully in-house using Rust. As part of upcoming initiatives, we are now looking for a Senior Embedded Software System Engineer to strengthen the team.


This is not maintenance work. This is deep platform engineering — architecture, systems thinking, and real ownership.

**What you will do:**

* Develop embedded software primarily in **Rust**
* Contribute to system and software architecture design
* Break down system requirements into implementable solutions
* Design and define test cases
* Manage build systems, tooling, and CI/CD pipelines
* Improve and maintain release processes
* Conduct advanced R&D investigations
* Support cross-functional stakeholders and teams
* Perform fault tracing and root-cause analysis
* Work end-to-end in an empowered agile team — from requirements and architecture to implementation and validation

**Who you are:**

You are passionate about modern computing technologies and excited about shaping the future of automotive software. You enjoy solving complex problems and collaborating across disciplines. You take ownership and care about delivering quality.

**Required Qualifications:**

* Strong experience in embedded systems programming and testing
* Solid development experience in **Rust, C++, or C** within embedded environments
* Experience with software system design (as architect or design lead)
* Strong skills in requirement analysis and test design
* Good knowledge of Unix-based development tools and workflows
* Understanding of Automotive Ethernet (UDP/TCP)
* Experience with traditional automotive protocols such as CAN and LIN
* Fluent English (spoken and written)


Preferred Skills:

* Bash and Python scripting
* Diagnostics protocols such as UDS and DoIP
* Experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, Zuul)
* Automotive system architecture background

title: Java Software Engineer
description:
**Role: Java Software Engineer** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Type: Contract** 




  





**Job Description:** 



* Design, develop, and maintain scalable Java-based microservices using modern backend frameworks and cloud-native principles.
* Lead end-to-end delivery across software development, testing, CI/CD automation, deployment, monitoring, and production support.
* Collaborate closely with product, architecture, and engineering teams to drive technical decisions, mitigate risks, and deliver high-quality solutions.
* Contribute to system reliability, scalability, performance optimization, and engineering best practices.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives across development processes, tooling, and platform capabilities.



 Technical Requirements
 


* Strong experience with Java (Java 17+) and modern enterprise application frameworks.
* Solid expertise in microservices architecture and cloud-native application development.
* Hands-on experience with containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes.
* Proficiency with relational and/or NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL, Cosmos DB, or similar technologies.
* Strong understanding of testing methodologies including TDD, integration testing, and performance testing.



 Experience & Leadership
 


* Hands-on software engineering experience in enterprise or large-scale distributed systems environments.
* Proven ability to independently own and deliver complex services or technical domains.
* Experience mentoring engineers and contributing to engineering standards, code quality, and development best practices.
* Strong decision-making skills with the ability to balance scalability, quality, delivery timelines, and business priorities.
* Excellent collaboration and stakeholder communication skills.



 Preferred Qualifications
 


* Experience working in agile and fast-paced engineering environments.
* Exposure to cloud platforms and modern DevOps practices.
* Relevant technical certifications are a plus, but not mandatory.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Software Engineer – C# / .NET** 




 📍
 **Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid – 2–3 days onsite)
 



 💰
 **Salary:** 
 55,000 – 65,000 SEK/month
 



 🕒
 **Type:** 
 Full-time
 



  





 My client is one of the leading travel and hospitality technology businesses in Northern Europe, building software platforms used by hotels, resorts, attractions, transport providers, and experience operators across the continent. Their products help power bookings, ticketing, e-commerce, integrations, and digital guest experiences at scale.
 



  





 They’re looking for a
 **C# /.NET Engineer** 
 to join their Stockholm-based engineering team, helping build and evolve business-critical backend systems and integrations used across a large-scale SaaS platform.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* Design, build, and maintain backend services using
 **C# / .NET**
* Develop scalable APIs and integrations across platform services
* Work on modern cloud-based systems and distributed architectures
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams on new feature development
* Improve system reliability, performance, and maintainability
* Contribute to architecture discussions and technical decision-making
* Support CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and engineering best practices
* Participate in code reviews and knowledge sharing across the team



  





**What They’re Looking For** 



* Strong commercial experience with
 **C# /.NET** 
 development
* Experience building APIs, backend services, and scalable applications
* Comfortable working with SQL databases and distributed systems
* Experience with cloud environments and modern development practices
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work across teams



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience within SaaS or product-led businesses
* Exposure to integrations, payments, booking, or e-commerce platforms
* Experience working in agile product environments



  





**Why Join?** 



* Modern product engineering environment with strong technical ownership
* Hybrid working model in Stockholm
* Collaborative and international engineering culture
* Opportunity to work on large-scale SaaS products used across Europe
* Strong long-term growth and investment in technology

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
description:
We are looking for a
 **Senior Software Engineer -Java** 
 for a global retail company in
 **Stockholm.** 




  





**Start is in ASAP, 7-month limited contract to begin with, possibility of extension after that.** 




  





**Job description** 
 :
 



  




* Design, build, and maintain scalable Java/Spring Boot microservices.
* Lead end-to-end delivery across development, testing, CI/CD, deployment, monitoring, and production support.
* Collaborate with product, architecture, and engineering teams to drive technical decisions and resolve risks



  





**Minimum Technical Skills** 



* Java 17+, Spring Boot, and Spring Framework.
* Strong microservices and cloud-native architecture experience.
* Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD/continuous deployment.
* SQL/NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL or Cosmos DB.
* Testing strategy, TDD, integration testing, and performance testing.
* Leadership / Experience Level
* Senior engineer with 6–9+ years’ hands-on software engineering experience.
* Owns complex services or domains with minimal guidance.
* Mentors engineers and contributes to engineering standards.
* Makes pragmatic architectural decisions, balancing speed, quality, scalability, and business impact.



  





**Please submit your application with an updated English CV as soon as possible.** 




  





 This is a full-time consultant position in
 **Stockholm** 
 through Incluso. Start is in
 **ASAP, 7 months limited contract** 
 to begin with. This role is 100% onsite in
 **Stockholm.** 




  





 Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.
 



  





 For more information about this role, please contact
 **Kanika Singhal** 
 recruiter at
 **Incluso.**
